name: Donkey foal
description: This Schleich Donkey foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The donkey has been serving mankind for thousands of years and can be used for a variety of tasks. Donkeys are very efficient mammals. They support the farmer at his work, transport loads, sire mules, keep horses company, tend sheep and are even kept as pets. In many regions they are also appreciated for their ability to live in the desert. Thanks to their robust stomachs and an ability to extract water from food, donkeys are superior to horses in that aspect. Donkeys were well-known for their use in war and their general reliability. Their numbers and popularity continue to grow.

name: Cat, sitting
description: This Schleich Cat, sitting figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: Cats have an extraordinary sense of balance. And even if they should fall, they hardly get hurt. It is even said that they always land on their feet. And it is true: If they fall back first, they first turn the head and front legs towards the floor, then the spine and then back legs. By stretching the legs and spreading their paws, they stop the fall additionally - like a parachute. With this ability, they can absorb almost any impact gently.

name: Hereford cow
description: This Schleich Hereford cow figure captures the realistic markings and sturdy build of this essential farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Hereford cattle come from the English county of Herefordshire, where they have been bred since the 17th century. They are extremely good-natured and undemanding animals. Since they can survive in almost any climatic conditions, they are now bred throughout the world, from Australia to Argentina.

name: Starfish with color change
description: This Schleich Starfish with color change figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The starfish lies very still on the seabed. Its yellow color makes it hard to spot on the sand. The perfect camouflage from its enemies, such as fish and sea turtles. A turtle is swimming past. She comes dangerously close to him. Perhaps she has discovered him after all. Well, what's that? Suddenly the starfish changes colour and is now dangerously red. The turtle doesn't dare to approach and prefers to keep swimming. The starfish is a quick-change artist and can change colour. Well done!

name: English Thoroughbred Mare
description: This Schleich English Thoroughbred Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Thoroughbred, the fastest breed on the racecourse, depicting the sleek, athletic build and competitive spirit of this legendary racing horse.
marketingDescription: The English Thoroughbred mare is slender and agile, yet muscular and strong. She outruns everyone in the race. Right now, however, she is taking it easy. She strides leisurely across the pasture to keep the handsome English thoroughbred stallion company. Where is it again?

name: English Thoroughbred Stallion
description: This Schleich English Thoroughbred Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Thoroughbred, the fastest breed on the racecourse, depicting the sleek, athletic build and competitive spirit of this legendary racing horse.
marketingDescription: The handsome English thoroughbred stallion puts his ears up in a good mood and gallops across the pasture, his light brown mane fluttering. What is he so happy about? He has probably heard that he will soon be allowed to take part in a competition again. He particularly enjoys doing this. You can tell that he loves speed. His slender physique really comes into its own on the run. When will the time finally come?

name: Knabstrupper Gelding
description: This Schleich Knabstrupper Gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the Knabstrupper breed from Denmark, featuring the eye-catching spotted coat pattern that has made this breed famous since 1812.
marketingDescription: The Knabstrupper gelding has a particularly pretty pattern with its snow-white coat and black spots. He always cuts a great figure when out riding. At the moment, however, he has something completely different in mind. He stretches his long neck forwards and pulls up his nose, sniffing. Maybe he wants to make eyes at the pretty Knabstrupper mare?

name: Knabstrupper Mare
description: This Schleich Knabstrupper Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Knabstrupper breed from Denmark, featuring the eye-catching spotted coat pattern that has made this breed famous since 1812.
marketingDescription: The beautiful Knabstrupper mare with the eye-catching coat pattern attracts everyone's attention. The Knabstrupper gelding in particular has cast a spell over her. But she doesn't even realize that. She is completely absorbed in her powerful gallop across the pasture. She loves it when the wind plays in her thick mane and her tail flutters at full speed. Life is marvellous!

name: Lusitano Stallion
description: This Schleich Lusitano Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: Does the impressive, jet-black Lusitano stallion know how beautiful he is? In any case, he clearly enjoys putting himself in the limelight in front of admiring glances. Now he is showing his best side again. He is about to stand on his hind legs and rears up majestically to his full height, shaking his flowing mane as he does so. A real show talent!

name: KWPN Gelding
description: This Schleich KWPN Gelding figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: The KWPN gelding is highly focussed. He is in the middle of a competition and wants to show what he can do in dressage. He has been rehearsing his piaffe for a long time, and now he finally performs it with pride. The white contrasting coat over the hooves emphasizes the stride particularly well. The gelding holds his neck in an elegant arch and shows off his beautiful braided hairstyle. He is sure to win the prize!

name: Mustang Mare
description: This Schleich Mustang Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Mustang, the free-roaming horse of the West, capturing the hardy, independent spirit of these resilient horses.
marketingDescription: The spirited mustang mare not only looks wonderful with her white-brown piebald coat. She is also quite curious. Now she pricks up her ears attentively and her soft, black eyes look alertly into the distance. She must have heard something. Perhaps the neighing of the mustang stallion? She stamps her small, maneuverable hooves into the ground. She is ready to gallop off at any moment and throw herself into an adventure.

name: Mustang Stallion
description: This Schleich Mustang Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Mustang, the free-roaming horse of the West, capturing the hardy, independent spirit of these resilient horses.
marketingDescription: This mustang stallion has a particularly fiery temperament, you can see that just by looking at him. It rises powerfully onto its strong hind legs and stretches its front legs into the air. He raises his slender head proudly. He loves freedom and adventure, there's no doubt about that. He loves to gallop across the prairie at a stretched gallop so that the dust swirls up under his hooves. Who's coming along?

name: Black Labrador Retriever puppy
description: This Schleich Black Labrador Retriever puppy figure is a lovingly detailed replica capturing the loyal character and distinctive breed features, with the irresistible charm of a puppy. Hand-painted with realistic colouring.
marketingDescription: Plop – the little Labrador Retriever puppy lands in the middle of a haystack! Curious, he explored the barn and lost his balance. Now he looks puzzled with alert black beady eyes. He's about to jump up and dash on – maybe there's a treat somewhere? This lively puppy learns quickly and loves company. Preferably with his favourite people. A heartbreaker on four paws!

name: Black Labrador Retriever female
description: This Schleich Black Labrador Retriever female figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: Early in the morning, the black Labrador is already waiting impatiently at the farm gate. Aren't you going for a walk across the fields soon? She looks over to the farm with an alert gaze. When will her human finally arrive? Ah, there's Farmer Paul on his way to her. She greets him happily. Now we can finally get started. She loves movement. But she loves it even more when you teach her little tricks or set her tasks. She loves learning and is also quite intelligent. She is simply the ideal farmyard dog: loyal playmate, helper or cuddly toy.

name: German Shepherd female
description: This Schleich German Shepherd female figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: Who is it? The German shepherd dog stands in the middle of the yard with her ears pricked up. There was just a noise that doesn't belong here. What was that? The watchful dog listens and stretches her neck so that she doesn't miss anything. She knows the farm inside out and knows when something is wrong. She is unbeatable as a herding dog. Vigilant, but gentle with her favourite people – she makes sure that everyone can feel safe. Her puppy is also never far away and keeps a close eye on what mum is doing. Maybe he can go on patrol today?

name: German Shepherd puppy
description: This Schleich German Shepherd puppy figure is a lovingly detailed replica capturing the loyal character and distinctive breed features, with the irresistible charm of a puppy. Hand-painted with realistic colouring.
marketingDescription: What's that rustling in the straw over there? The German Shepherd puppy raises its head in alarm and listens intently – just as it has observed its mother doing. Then he plods along curiously. When it comes to the farm, he is as fearless as he is curious. He is always ready to get to the bottom of any noise, just like the grown-ups! He is sure to become a reliable yard dog one day.

name: Peacock
description: This Schleich Peacock figure showcases the Peacock, with its magnificent iridescent tail feathers featuring eye-like markings. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail.
marketingDescription: The peacock is undoubtedly the most elegant inhabitant of the farm. With his head held high, he strides majestically across the courtyard. He knows exactly how beautiful he is. He carries his long neck stretched out and balances a delightful crown of feathers on his small head. It makes a magnificent wheel out of its long tail feathers. Then you can see the colourful feathers in blue, green and gold. Even the hens are amazed – their cockerel can't do that! The peacock originally comes from India, but it also feels at home with Farmer Paul as long as it has enough space to strut its stuff.

name: North Swedish Cold Blooded Mare
description: This Schleich North Swedish Cold Blooded Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: Slowly, the North Swedish cold-blooded mare puts one hoof in front of the other. The wind whistles across the fields, tugging at her tail and sweeping through her mane. But she is not deterred. Their thick fur protects them perfectly from the cold – which is exactly what they are made for. Powerful and calm, it helps with work in the field. And when it's not needed? Then she stands relaxed in the stable and lets herself be cuddled. A strong shoulder to lean on – with heart and hooves!

name: Alpaca
description: This Schleich Alpaca figure captures the soft fleece and gentle expression of this charming South American camelid. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Who's taking a leisurely stroll across the pasture? Long neck, super thick fur and a distinctive hairstyle on the small head – of course, that's the alpaca! As soon as it discovers its favourite human, it comes trotting along. It likes to be in company. It also rightly hopes for treats and cuddles. With that woolly fur, he's sure to get them – who could resist! It also needs its thick fur, as it originally comes from the high mountain regions of South America. But it also feels at home with farmer Paul. The treats are definitely better here!

name: Boer Goat
description: This Schleich Boer Goat figure captures the nimble build and curious expression of this agile and intelligent farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Two bold movements and the Boer goat is already standing on the hill. The pretty goat with the white fur and brown head is a very skilful climber. No terrain is too steep for her! Because it is also so adaptable, it feels just as at home on the farm as it does at windy altitudes, where it is actually at home. Above all, she needs company to be happy. She never lets her kid out of her sight, but she also enjoys regular visits from farmer Paul. Shouldn't he be here by now with a few treats? She'll have a look!

name: Boer Goat kid
description: This Schleich Boer Goat kid figure depicts a charming young animal with the nimble build and curious expression of this agile and intelligent farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Eww! The cute little Boer goat whines exuberantly in the pasture and makes one leap after another. How beautiful life is! The little white goat with the distinctive brown head and long floppy ears tests his strength extensively. It jumps around full of energy. What there is to discover! Only now and then does it take a quick look to see if its mother, the pretty Boer goat, is still nearby. All good, let's move on. The Boer goat has such beautiful fur that you simply have to stroke it. Perhaps it will stop by for a cuddle during its discovery tour?

name: Rockhopper Penguin
description: This Schleich Rockhopper Penguin figure captures this penguin, with its distinctive black-and-white plumage and upright waddle. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The rockhopper penguin is well equipped to withstand the cold. He doesn't mind the icy temperatures. Its dense plumage protects it perfectly from the cold. It shoots through the sea with powerful fin strokes – on the hunt for fish. He turns out to be a real professional swimmer! Once it has its prey in its sights, there is no escape. As cute as the rockhopper penguin looks with its waddling gait on land: Here, too, it moves amazingly skilfully. He balances over rugged rocks and steep cliffs. Impressive!

name: Sea lion
description: This Schleich Sea lion figure is a hand-painted marine creature replica, capturing its natural form with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Err-err! You can hear the sea lion calling piercingly. Meal time! He is lying on a rock with his head held high. A moment ago, he was letting the sun shine on his thick, brown fur. But our appetite is starting to kick in, so we head straight back into the sea. There he is in his element. He is feared as a hunter!

name: Capybara
description: This Schleich Capybara figure captures the rounded body and calm expression of the world's largest rodent. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The cute capybara looks a bit like an extra-large guinea pig. With its round body, it can move skilfully. The rodent is always on the lookout for aquatic plants because it loves to eat them. It has spotted a few treats on the shore – let's go! His friends from the Capybara group have also discovered the beautiful feeding area and are on their way. What a feast!

name: Meerkat
description: This Schleich Meerkat figure captures the alert, upright sentinel posture these social desert mongooses are famous for. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The meerkat stands as still as a statue and keeps an eye out. Only its pointed nose twitches from time to time, scenting. Did something move in the tall grass? The other clan members are happily digging for insects while this meerkat keeps watch. Brave! When danger threatens, it emits a shrill call to warn the others. But this time everything is quiet. Slowly it also gets hungry. Time to dive into the group hustle and bustle. Maybe it will find a fat beetle?

name: Squirrel
description: This Schleich Squirrel figure captures the bushy tail, bright eyes, and alert posture of this agile tree-dweller. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: Shoo! The squirrel dashes across the forest floor so quickly that you can only see it out of the corner of your eye. It jumps purposefully onto the trunk of the hazelnut tree, then higher up into the fork of the branch. Here hang the delicious nuts! It hurriedly picks a fruit from the branch and climbs down the tree to its hiding place. Here it collects nuts for the winter. The squirrel is a master of stockpiling. And it's cute too!

name: Racoon
description: This hand-painted Schleich Racoon figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2026, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: What's that rattling? Now a loud smacking sound. The cute raccoon has given himself away. He is once again on the prowl and has probably discovered a treat... He looks so cute that you simply can't be mad at him. When it's not smacking its lips, the nocturnal predator with the distinctive face mask is usually silent in the night. Its grey fur is the perfect camouflage. During the day it hides in its tree hollow. There the cheeky badger rests until his next foray.

name: Hippopotamus
description: This Schleich Hippopotamus figure captures the massive barrel-shaped body and wide-opening jaws of the third-largest land mammal. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Hippos are supposed to be here? Nothing to see. Yes, there! Only the small ears and the nostrils look out of the water. The hippopotamus dozes there with relish and cools down. The African sun can be quite hot. The grey giant therefore prefers to spend its time in the water. Here it moves almost weightlessly – and that with this massive body! It only comes ashore at night to graze on a meadow. It trudges around with its heavy body on short legs. But it should not be underestimated. The hippopotamus can also pick up quite a bit of speed on land once it gets moving. Watch out!

name: Koala (circular)
description: This Schleich Koala (circular) figure captures the fluffy ears, button nose, and tree-clinging posture of Australia's most beloved marsupial. Hand-painted with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Koalas are quite the sleepy heads. They spend about 14 hours each day taking extensive naps. The rest of the time, they are busy eating eucalyptus leaves. They consume about a kilogram of them every day. They are very picky and will only go for 12 of the about 300 eucalyptus species.

name: Hyacinth Macaw (circular)
description: This Schleich Hyacinth Macaw (circular) figure showcases this Macaw, with vibrant multi-coloured plumage and powerful curved beak of the largest parrot species. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail.
marketingDescription: The Hyacinth Macaw skillfully clings on to the bark of the tree. With its powerful claws and the help of its beak, the parrot climbs up the tree trunk in no time at all. I wonder where it's going? Ah, it's spotted some delicious nuts hanging up high in the tree! One of its favorite dishes! The beautiful Hyacinth Macaw has bright blue plumage with golden yellow skin around its beak and eyes. It contrasts beautifully with the iridescent plumage!

name: Cougar (circular)
description: This Schleich Cougar (circular) figure is a hand-painted woodland creature replica with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription:
Cougars can't roar, but they can purr, meow, and whine about doing chores. Cougars in the wild can leap 40 feet - that's longer than 90 schleich® cougar figurines lined up end to end!

schleich® wild animal figurines for toddlers and kids introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From realistic ocean and jungle animal figurines to our popular playsets, schleich® WILD LIFE lets your stories run wild. Authentic wild creature figurines toys prowl, swim, and soar with rich, accurate detail and texture, while our full-featured wild life playsets bring learning to life. Our wild animal toys love cross into new play worlds to create stories with schleich® enchanted creature toys, farm animal figurines and dinosaur toys! schleich® wild animal toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national and international safety standards.

name: Beaver (circular)
description: This Schleich Beaver (circular) figure captures the flat tail, dense fur, and strong teeth of nature's most accomplished engineer. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription:
Like most beavers, this one built his lodge out of branches he chomped on his own...but now he's eager to find a place in your home. He's a hard worker, well-behaved, and comes with an excellent dental plan.

schleich® wild animal figurines for toddlers and kids introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From realistic ocean and jungle animal figurines to our popular playsets, schleich® WILD LIFE lets your stories run wild. Authentic wild creature figurines toys prowl, swim, and soar with rich, accurate detail and texture, while our full-featured wild life playsets bring learning to life. Our wild animal toys love cross into new play worlds to create stories with schleich® enchanted creature toys, farm animal figurines and dinosaur toys! schleich® wild animal toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national and international safety standards.

name: African Lion
description: This Schleich African Lion figure captures the powerful build and commanding presence of the "King of the Jungle". Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The African lion looks majestic. It likes to show itself from a distance, standing on a rock to scare off its enemies. Even now, he looks vigilantly into the distance. Didn't he hear a noise? He knows no mercy with attackers. After all, he has to protect his pride! Anyone who gets too close can expect a fierce battle. It is best to give it a wide berth and admire it from a distance.

name: American Wolf
description: This Schleich American Wolf figure captures the powerful build, thick fur, and intense gaze of this iconic pack predator. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The American wolf lifts its nose into the wind and attentively pricks up its pointed ears. Did he smell something? He calls the pack together with a howl – it's hunting time! The wolf silently stalks its prey. He is not alone. He knows his pack is close by. Side by side, they roam the wilderness together and surround their prey. They can even take on the much larger bison. Together they are strong!

name: Elk
description: This Schleich Elk figure captures the impressive antlers and powerful build of one of the largest deer species. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The elk stands quietly at the edge of the forest and gazes into the distance. It's rutting season – and he's showing his best side. He strides majestically through the tall grass, ready to impress a doe. Its powerful body and antlers make it a worthy leader of its herd. I'm sure he can win a heart there.

name: Spinosaurus
description: This Schleich Spinosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Spinosaurus, the largest carnivorous dinosaur, featuring the distinctive sail-like back structure and crocodile-like snout. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: Oh horror! The dangerous Spinosaurus is once again on the hunt and opens its jaws menacingly. Has he picked up the scent? It's best to avoid the prehistoric giant, because its hunger is enormous. No wonder: as one of the largest known dinosaurs, it can grow up to 18 metres long and weigh nine tons. He needs a regular supply of food. If you don't want to end up between the huge pine trees, it's best to get out of the way.

name: Triceratops
description: This Schleich Triceratops figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Triceratops, showcasing its three facial horns and large bony frill that made it one of the most recognisable dinosaurs. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Triceratops seems to want to eat undisturbed. With its head lowered, it plucks grass and bushy herbs – its favourite food – with its pointed mouth. As this herbivore weighs up to twelve tons, it has to eat quite a lot to get its fill. That takes a while! So it's no wonder that the dinosaur with the easily recognizable horns is often seen feeding in a meadow.

name: Brontosaurus
description: This Schleich Brontosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The stately brontosaurus is usually travelling at a leisurely pace. This is not surprising, because with its long neck and massive body, the giant dinosaur is not exactly manoeuvrable. And it doesn't have to be, because the peaceful prehistoric giant is in no hurry. As a vegetarian, it only eats plants. It doesn't need to go hunting and is happy if you let it pluck leaves from the branches.

name: Dimetrodon
description: This Schleich Dimetrodon figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Dimetrodon, with its distinctive sail-like back structure — a Permian creature more closely related to mammals than to dinosaurs. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: At up to three metres long and weighing 250 kilograms, the Dimetrodon may not be the largest dinosaur, but it should not be underestimated. As a carnivore, it is constantly on the hunt and always on the lookout for a snack. It is already opening and closing its powerful jaws expectantly, its sharp fangs flashing dangerously. Once he grabs hold, there is no escape. You'd better get out of here quickly!

name: Mammoth
description: This Schleich Mammoth figure is a meticulously detailed replica of the Woolly Mammoth, with its shaggy fur and massive curved tusks, an icon of the Ice Age. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The giant mammoth may look a little scary with its impressive size and long tusks, but don't worry, it is usually peaceful. The prehistoric giant prefers to use its long trunk to comfortably pluck leaves from the trees and nibble on twigs. If you don't get in its way, you can make friends with this giant from the Ice Age, whose woolly, dense fur is the perfect defence against the cold.

name: Smilodon
description: This Schleich Smilodon figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Smilodon the sabre-toothed cat, featuring the enormous canine teeth of this iconic Ice Age predator. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The maneuverable sabre-toothed tiger stalks its prey on silent paws. With its brown-pied coat, it is well camouflaged in the tall grass of the primeval savannah. Only the gentle waving of the grasses could betray its arrival. Once it has reached its target, the big cat suddenly lunges out of cover and opens its mouth with a dangerous snarl. With a quick leap, it pounces on its prey. Save yourself who can!

name: Galaxy Rainbow Unicorn Stallion
description: This Schleich Galaxy Rainbow Unicorn Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The Galaxy rainbow unicorn stallion is a born leader. He looks after his herd and never leaves their side. Only sometimes at night, when the beloved northern lights appear in the sky, does he stay a little out of the way to enjoy them. Then he shakes his magnificent mane and gazes enchantedly into the sky. His fur glitters like the starry sky and the vast galaxies. What secrets are hidden up there among the stars? How he would love to air them ...

name: Galaxy Rainbow Unicorn Mare
description: This Schleich Galaxy Rainbow Unicorn Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The Galaxy rainbow unicorn mare gracefully bows her head with her soft pink nostrils. She watches her Galaxy rainbow unicorn foal play with a gentle gaze. She has chosen a particularly beautiful spot to watch: she is standing in front of an enchanted waterfall that sparkles enchantingly in the sun. This is her favourite spot because she can sparkle in the water. The sun's rays not only make the waterfall glow, but also the shimmering coat of the Galaxy rainbow unicorn mare. Somehow magical!

name: Shadow Lemure
description: This Schleich Shadow Lemure figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The shadow fingered animal is a lemur and can therefore climb very well. With its long fingers, it clings to the trees at lofty heights. As pitch black as it is, you can hardly see this insidious inhabitant of the shadow world of ELDRADOR®. Up there, the lemur pricks up its big ears and hears immediately when someone enters its realm. Sitting in a tree, the shadow animal lies in wait for its opponents and swings skilfully from branch to branch until it suddenly pounces on them as if from nowhere. Watch out – he's not good for cherries!

name: Ice Lynx
description: This Schleich Ice Lynx figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The ice lynx is known far beyond the world of ice throughout ELDRADOR®. It is a fantastic hunter and finishes off its prey with a powerful paw strike. If you mess with it, you have to be careful: Once caught in its sharp fangs, there is no escape. It is also impossible to surprise the ice lynx. With its excellent hearing, it detects even the tiniest crunch of an ice crystal and prepares to attack with its ice-cold eyes flashing. It's better to steer clear of him!

name: Stone toad
description: This Schleich Stone toad figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The stone toad should not be underestimated. It may not be as big as the other creatures in ELDRADOR®, but it is twice as mean. In the stone world, she crouches motionless between the rocks. With its grey lizard skin, it is perfectly camouflaged and barely visible to the uninitiated. If you accidentally get too close to it, it suddenly sticks out its long, sticky tongue. The tongue is their most dangerous weapon. It simply wraps up opponents so that they can no longer get away. So keep your eyes open in the world of stone!

name: Unicorn Mare Seraphina
description: This Schleich Unicorn Mare Seraphina figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The graceful unicorn mare Seraphina is a dream come true with her purple and pink colors. Her elegant pose, harmonious color tones, and lovingly designed details make her a favorite of all unicorn fans.

name: Unicorn Stallion Orchid
description: This Schleich Unicorn Stallion Orchid figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: Orchid goes perfectly with his family members – the gentle unicorn mare Peach (ref. 70860) and the enchanting unicorn foal Iris (ref. 70861). The stallion and his foal are done in very similar colors. Stallion Orchid and foal Iris share the same shimmering purple – a captivating connection that makes their magical kinship recognizable immediately.

name: Turtle 90 Years Edition
description: This Schleich Turtle 90 Years Edition figure captures this sea turtle, with its streamlined shell and powerful flippers for graceful ocean navigation. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The high-quality figurines from schleich® have been setting hearts racing for 90 years. The turtle in the 90th anniversary edition now available in a very special anniversary look. In a lifelike pose with head slightly raised, she seems to be swimming through the ocean. The snow-white shell features a colorful rainbow design. This figurine is strictly limited and only available for a limited time. This limited edition is an exclusive collector’s item for schleich® fans of all ages.

name: Collectible Foal Delilah
description: This Schleich Collectible Foal Delilah figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The adorable collectible foal Delilah curiously raises her head and pricks up her ears ready for adventure. She looks over the meadow in anticipation. Maybe a playmate will come from that direction? The little foal with its cream coat and cute black nose has six friends, the others collectible foals. This cute herd is inseparable. Delilah is happiest when the foal herd is complete. Delilah gives her favourite person a poster of all of them together It’s sure to look great in the children’s room! Who will be the first to collect all 4 foals?

name: Collectible Foal Dipper
description: This Schleich Collectible Foal Dipper figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The adorable collectible foal Dipper curiously raises his head and pricks up his ears ready for adventure. He’s always there when there’s an adventure to be had. He is already stretching his neck with anticipation and approaches on his graceful legs. Perhaps he could polish off a crisp carrot? The little foal with its pretty white-brown coat and delicate pink nostrils has six friends, the other collectible foals. This cute herd is inseparable. Dipper is happiest when the foal herd is complete. Dipper gives her favourite person a poster of all of them together. It’s sure to look great in the children’s room! Who will be the first to collect all 4 foals?

name: Collectible Foal Darcy
description: This Schleich Collectible Foal Darcy figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The adorable collectible foal Darcy curiously raises his head and pricks up his ears ready for adventure. The temperament of the little rascal is immediately obvious. Expectantly, the foal raises her small, cream-coloured tail a little and stops in her tracks. There was a happy whinny coming from back there. She must check it out right away! The little foal with its grey-brown coat and cheeky appearance has six friends, the others collectible foals. This cute herd is inseparable. Darcy is happiest when the foal herd is complete. Darcy gives her favourite person a poster of all of them together. It’s sure to look great in the children’s room! Who will be the first to collect all 4 foals?

name: Collectible Foal Diamond
description: This Schleich Collectible Foal Diamond figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The adorable Diamond collectible foal is the star on the pasture. No wonder: No one else has such a beautiful shiny coat. It shines golden all over. When she and her friends are having fun in the meadow, it looks especially pretty. She raises her head curiously and pricks its ears ready for adventure. Maybe a playmate will come from that direction? The little foal with the golden coat has six friends, the others collectible foals. This cute herd is inseparable. Diamond is happiest when the foal herd is complete. Diamond gives her favourite person a poster of all of them together. It’s sure to look great in the children’s room! Who will be the first to collect all 4 foals?

name: Cat, standing
description: This Schleich Cat, standing figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: Cats have an extraordinary sense of balance. And even if they should fall, they hardly get hurt. It is even said that they always land on their feet. And it is true: If they fall back first, they first turn the head and front legs towards the floor, then the spine and then back legs. By stretching the legs and spreading their paws, they stop the fall additionally - like a parachute. With this ability, they can absorb almost any impact gently.

name: Donkey
description: This Schleich Donkey figure captures the long ears and sturdy build of this hardworking farm companion. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The domestic donkey comes originally from the African donkey. It copes well with hot temperatures and makes little demands on its food. It is often described as stubborn and stupid when he stops for seemingly no reason at all and refuses to move on. However, the opposite is the case. Donkeys cannot run as fast as horses, so it would be senseless for them to flee in panic in a dangerous situation. They first try to consider if they are actually in danger and if so, what would be the best escape route.

name: Domestic Pig
description: This Schleich Domestic Pig figure captures the round body, curly tail, and expressive snout of one of the farm's most intelligent animals. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: OINK OINK! Like any pig, our Pig from schleich® FARM WORLD has a great sense of smell thanks to its powerful nose. The pink hoofed animal likes using it to sniff out food. On hot summer days, the pig's favorite place to hang out is in a mudhole or in the cool shade of your bed. The oinking farmyard resident doesn't mind that he's not always spotlessly clean. Even when it accidentally leaves small marks on your T-shirt with its hooves. Why don't you use an eraser to get rid of them. Does that work?

name: Rabbit
description: This Schleich Rabbit figure captures the long ears, cotton-ball tail, and alert posture. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: A rabbit's favourite foods are juicy herbs, fresh clover, salad, twigs and peelings. Rabbits are very sociable animals. When sensing danger, they thump their hind legs on the ground so as to warn their relatives. If a predator comes too close, they flee in zigzag formation.

name: Sheep
description: This Schleich Sheep figure captures the woolly fleece and gentle stance of this beloved farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Sheep have a cuddly wool that protects them from the cold in winter. But why does wool actually stay so nice and warm? It is a very airy material that still manages to trap body heat. At the same time, it can absorb a lot of moisture, providing a pleasant, dry warmth.

name: Maine Coon cat
description: This Schleich Maine Coon cat figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: Maine-Coon cats are large and heavy, but very calm, balanced cats with a noble, long coat. That's why they are often referred to as gentle giants. Maine Coon cats do not lay around all day, but love to roam the countryside. They are not afraid of water either - on the contrary, they even love it.

name: Pig
description: This Schleich Pig figure captures the round body, curly tail, and expressive snout of one of the farm's most intelligent animals. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: OINK OINK! Like any pig, our Pig from schleich® FARM WORLD has a great sense of smell thanks to its powerful nose. The pink hoofed animal likes using it to sniff out food. On hot summer days, the pig's favorite place to hang out is in a mudhole or in the cool shade of your bed. The oinking farmyard resident doesn't mind that he's not always spotlessly clean. Even when it accidentally leaves small marks on your T-shirt with its hooves. Why don't you use an eraser to get rid of them. Does that work?

name: Lop-Eared Rabbit
description: This Schleich Lop-Eared Rabbit figure captures the long ears, cotton-ball tail, and alert posture. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Who's the best hopper? Our Long-eared Rabbit from schleich® FARM WORLD, of course. Its strong hind legs mean that it hops over your desk faster than anyone else - despite its long floppy ears. These let the rabbit hear particularly well. Especially when his favorite songs are playing on the radio again. Then he gets a dreamy look in his eyes as he wishes that his ears could not only hear well but also help him fly. He's vegetarian and only uses his strong rabbit teeth for carrots, grains or grass. And laces that are too long.

name: Bichon Frise
description: This Schleich Bichon Frise figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: The cute Bichon Frisé has what it takes to be a regal salon lion with its thick curly mane. But it also likes to romp across the meadow and chase balls. You can't help loving this cute cotton ball on four legs. Especially when it happily curls up on your lap to enjoy a few cuddles. Who wouldn't want to snuggle with this curly bundle of fun?

name: Collie
description: This Schleich Collie  figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: The Collie raises its head attentively and pricks up its ears. What’s going on back there? Nothing escapes its watchful eye. This beautiful four-legged friend always makes sure that there are no uninvited guests on the farm. Because it notices everything, it also makes sure that all its animal and human friends are safe and that everyone is tucked up safely in their bed or stable at night. What a good watchdog!

name: Welsh Corgi
description: This Schleich Welsh Corgi figure is a hand-painted replica of the Welsh Pony, known for hardiness and gentle temperament, depicting the refined build that makes Welsh breeds popular worldwide.
marketingDescription: Woof! The little Welsh Corgi pipes up with an energetic yelp. It’s probably bored. This pretty family dog with big ears doesn't like to be alone and prefers company. I’m sure he wants to play. Considering it has such short legs, it’s still amazingly fast and can catch every ball. Will you throw it again?

name: Indri
description: This Schleich Indri figure is a hand-painted wildlife replica capturing the natural beauty of this species with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The black and white Indri opens its yellow button eyes attentively and listens intently. It sits on all fours and waits for its turn. The Indris’ famous morning songs in Madagascar have just begun. Of course it wants to join in! Every morning, the friends sing beautiful, melodic songs. They can be heard up to two kilometers away. They enjoy singing. They also use song to mark their territory and communicate with each other. Shh, the concert is about to start!

name: North Atlantic Right Whale
description: This Schleich North Atlantic Right Whale figure captures this whale species, capturing the graceful proportions and gentle nature of these ocean giants. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The North Atlantic Right whale swims slowly through the sea with its small front flippers. It keeps its large body on course with its broad, transverse tail fin. It only travels around 8 km per hour. It swims slowly, because as it glides through the water, it filters small crabs and fish called Krill through the sieve in its mouth, which it then eats with relish. A full meal takes quite a long while for a giant like him. After all, the sea giant weighs up to 100 tons, so its appetite for krill is neverending!

name: Bison
description: This Schleich Bison figure captures the massive head, shoulder hump, and shaggy mane of North America's largest land mammal. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The bison is the largest mammal in North America and this bull here is a particularly beautiful example. He stands confidently on the lush meadow with strong legs, grazing with slow relish. Suddenly his head jerks up. Was it something he heard? The bison turns his large head to the side and looks out over the wide plain. Nothing there. He continues to graze on. This big guy is quite peaceful. But if he has to, he defends himself and his herd courageously. What you would least expect: He can even run really fast. Bison can reach speeds of up to 56 km per hour! Once they pick up speed, they hurtle towards their opponents like an avalanche of hooves. Fortunately, that only happens in an emergency.

name: Arctic Wolf
description: This Schleich Arctic Wolf figure captures the powerful build, thick fur, and intense gaze of this iconic pack predator. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The Arctic wolf pricks up its pointed ears and watches closely with its beautiful, amber-colored eyes to see what’s going on. Is the pack getting ready to leave? That’s fine, because it's hungry. Time to go hunting. The wolves always go hunting in the pack. With their snowy-white fur, they are perfectly camouflaged in the Arctic. And the cute Arctic wolf cub can come along too. Let’s go!

name: Arctic Wolf Cub
description: This Schleich Arctic Wolf Cub figure captures the powerful build, thick fur, and intense gaze of this iconic pack predator. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring. This young figure captures the curious nature of a juvenile.
marketingDescription: This little one already knows exactly what it wants! The cute Arctic wolf cub stretches its jet-black snout into the air and opens its blue eyes. It might be hungry! During the hunt, the grown-up Arctic wolves have filled their bellies. But they always make sure the little on gets a tasty morsel. Surely he doesn't want to eat it on his own? Of course not! Who could resist those sweet blue puppy-dog eyes?

name: European Tree Frog
description: This Schleich European Tree Frog figure showcases the smooth skin and powerful hind legs of this fascinating amphibian. Hand-painted with lifelike colouring and texture.
marketingDescription: The European tree frog looks smart and up for anything. Luckily, the job of weatherman, stuck in a jam jar, is a thing of the past. Now it gets to sit on rain-dampened leaves or use the sticky discs on its feet to shimmy up aquatic plants. Right now it is feeling very contented. Its belly is filled with crispy crunchy flies, and it can just enjoy the sunshine. Croak!

name: Chimpanzee
description: This Schleich Chimpanzee figure captures the expressive face and intelligent posture of our closest living relative. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The chimpanzee is calmly standing by, watching its large family. Someone is always in the mood for a game or a nimble climb on one of the jungle giants. The chimpanzee is happy. It’s watching its young one take its first steps. That kid is sure to become a great climber one day! Maybe it will be a gymnast too? That would be a plus for the whole family!

name: Baby Chimpanzee
description: This Schleich Baby Chimpanzee figure captures the expressive face and intelligent posture of our closest living relative. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy. This young figure captures the endearing proportions of a juvenile.
marketingDescription: The Chimpanzee cub has stopped clinging to its mother, and is going on a journey of discovery. It takes its first steps in the jungle. It’s not the most elegant gymnast yet. Plop! Once again it's landed on its butt. But the little one doesn't mind. A quick check to see if the big chimpanzee is nearby and then it gives it another go. After all, you have to keep trying if you want to succeed!

name: Giant Panda
description: This hand-painted Schleich Giant Panda figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2025, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: With its striking black and white fur, and black circles around its eyes, the giant panda looks just like a cuddly toy. But today it doesn't have time to cuddle. The bear, which can weigh up to 160 kilos, has to make sure it gets enough food. Because it eats almost nothing but bamboo, and the plant is not particularly nutritious, it has to keep eating for up to 16 hours a day! No wonder it has no time to play; it has to digest up to 40 kilos of bamboo! And that takes time.

name: Giant Panda Cub
description: This hand-painted Schleich Giant Panda Cub figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2025, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The panda cub peers curiously out of its black shiny eyes. It stretches its fat head and wiggles its small, black ears a little. Was that something that it heard?  Maybe it’s looking for its mother, the giant panda. Right now, she’s busy foraging in the bamboo forest. There are a few forests in China, where the panda cub feels at home. Just as well, because the little panda already loves to eat bamboo shoots.

name: Goat
description: This Schleich Goat figure captures the nimble build and curious expression of this agile and intelligent farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The cheeky goat is curiously observing what is happening on the other side of the fence. It’s so curious, always wanting to know every detail and is certainly not shy. Even now, it only shakes its goatee briefly before moving in for a closer look. It just loves company! And who knows, maybe it can make some new friends? You can never have enough friends, can you?

name: Mule
description: This Schleich Mule figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: The pretty mule waits good-naturedly in the yard for its turn. It likes to help its favorite people – for example when carrying heavy loads or pulling a cart. After all, it’s very strong and can work hard for long periods. That’s why it doesn’t mind the effort. I wonder what jobs it has to do today? No matter what it is, one thing is for sure: A crunchy carrot will be waiting as a treat. Delicious!

name: Llama Foal
description: This Schleich Llama Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: What soft cozy fur! The little llama foal is still young, but it already has thick, brown fur. The wool certainly keeps you nice and warm. In its native South America it is pretty cold, with the wind whistling in the mountains, so it certainly needs all that fur. When the spring comes, it’s happy to be sheared and give away its wool to be knitted into a nice warm sweater. You can’t beat that!

name: Mangalica Piglet
description: This Schleich Mangalica Piglet figure depicts a charming young animal with the round body, curly tail, and expressive snout of one of the farm's most intelligent animals. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The little woolly piglet runs off with a loud squeal. Did it get a scare? Surely not. It cheekily stretches its snout into the air. Oh yes, it's spotted its mother, digging for treats in the ground. What did she find? The cute piglet definitely doesn't want to miss out. Hey, leave some for me!

name: Andalusian Mare
description: This Schleich Andalusian Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Andalusian breed, originating from the Iberian Peninsula, showcasing its elegant build and powerful yet graceful stance suited to classical dressage.
marketingDescription: The pretty Andalusian mare is used to regular training. She is simply unbeatable when it comes to the art of dressage. Even now, she is eagerly pawing the sand with her front hoof. She probably wants to go to the riding hall for a training session. She pricks up her pointed ears and tilts her head playfully. She bows her neck elegantly. A few thick bangs fall over her eyes. Who can she persuade to practise with her?

name: Andalusian Stallion
description: This Schleich Andalusian Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Andalusian breed, originating from the Iberian Peninsula, showcasing its elegant build and powerful yet graceful stance suited to classical dressage.
marketingDescription: The Andalusian stallion’s thick mane flutters in the wind. Wow, what crazy weather! A gust of wind sweeps the bangs out of his eyes. It's the perfect day for the proud Spaniard to go for a ride. The graceful white horse is already looking forward to being out and about. As a loyal soul, he particularly enjoys keeping his favorite person company. Who's going to rides out with him? Or should he train with the Andalusian mare in the indoor arena? He’s also an ace at dressage.

name: Marwari Foal
description: This Schleich Marwari Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The cute Marwari foal pricks up its ears, which are curved inwards. Is someone coming? It lifts its pretty head expectantly and looks over to the fence. It’s always up for a game and happy to have company. The foal has the most fun when it is allowed to jump across the pasture with its long, slender legs. It likes to take a few leaps for joy. It looks simply enchanting. Who wants to play?

name: Marwari Mare
description: This Schleich Marwari Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The beautiful Marwari Mare watches attentively, as her little Marwari foal plays in the pasture. As she does so, she pricks up her crescent-shaped ears. With a little imagination, from a distance, it looks as though she is wearing a crown. The Marwari mare is curious and doesn't want to miss out on anything. Lucky that she can hear so well with her extraordinary ears!

name: Marwari Stallion
description: This Schleich Marwari Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The beautiful Marwari stallion gracefully bows his slender neck and flares his soft nostrils. He pricks up his black, sickle-shaped ears and listens: Is that a whinny he can hear back there? Maybe it's the Marwari mare calling him. He’ll probably trot over there straight away. The little Marwari foal is also close by. With the three of them together, the horse family is complete. Perfect!

name: Paint Horse Foal
description: This Schleich Paint Horse Foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Paint Horse, featuring the unique combination of white and dark markings that make each individual distinctively patterned. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.
marketingDescription: Where’s the cute Paint Horse foal off to now? You can tell that it has a plan, because it has pricked up its pointed ears and looks ready to go. Full of determination it points its dainty hooves and trots across the pasture. Flaring its nostrils, it sniffs the air. I wonder what it’s up to? Maybe it has caught a whiff of a tasty carrot somewhere? The foal comes closer. Surely someone will give in and let it have a tasty snack, as a reward for being so determined?

name: Paint Horse Gelding
description: This Schleich Paint Horse Gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Paint Horse, featuring the unique combination of white and dark markings that make each individual distinctively patterned.
marketingDescription: The piebald Paint Horse gelding is in the mood for adventure today and wants to have some fun! He gallops across the pasture with such temperament that his black mane and lush tail flutter in the breeze. Who will do him a favor and ride out with him? Western riding is particularly fun with him. But he also likes other styles. As long as he is in good company he’s up for anything.

name: Paint Horse Mare
description: This Schleich Paint Horse Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Paint Horse, featuring the unique combination of white and dark markings that make each individual distinctively patterned.
marketingDescription: The patient Paint Horse mare is just like a real family member. She loves to spend time with her little Paint Horse foal or with her favorite people. Because she is so friendly and even-tempered, children are particularly fond of her. She takes her first attempts at riding with them or plays cattle herding in Western riding style. Even now she looks up for an adventure. Anyone want to be the bull?

name: Grizzly bear (circular)
description: This Schleich Grizzly bear (circular) figure captures the massive size, distinctive shoulder hump, and silver-tipped fur of North America's most powerful bear. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: Grizzlies are tall, strong animals - they stand up to 2.4 metres high and weigh roundabout 450 kilograms. They have sort of a hump on their back and strong hind limbs. Grizzly bears are able to run up to 55 kilometres per hour. They are loners and frequently behave aggressively. Sometimes they gather at waters to catch salmon. Since they are omnivores, these bears feed on fish, plants and large mammals like moose, deer and black bears. They are also known to steal food from wolves or humans.

name: Polar bear (circular)
description: This Schleich Polar bear (circular) figure captures the powerful build and impressive stature of this formidable mammal. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The polar bear's habitat is the Arctic. In winter, the temperature there can drop to -50° Celsius. Although its fur coat appears white, its hair is transparent and hollow on the inside. The air inside these hairs is warmed by the sun, so that polar bears do not freeze even at icy temperatures.

name: Muriel the Owl
description: This Schleich Muriel the Owl figure showcases this owl, with its large forward-facing eyes and silent-flight feathers adapted for nocturnal hunting. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail.
marketingDescription: Muriel the owl is very popular with the magical animals. No wonder: with her big, friendly eyes and childlike charm, she has a sympathetic ear for everyone. She patiently listens to worries, comforts with gentle words or conjures up a smile with a cheerful flap of her wings. Sometimes she also sings a little song – often off-key, but heartfelt. She likes to use it to cheer up the magical animals if necessary. Just a real friend.

name: Fitzgeraldo the Tarsier
description: This Schleich Fitzgeraldo the Tarsier figure is a hand-painted wildlife replica capturing the natural beauty of this species with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Fitzgeraldo the goblin lemur is the sporting cannon among the magical animals. He is very adventurous and always up for an escapade. He whizzes around the neighborhood, ready at all times for new adventures. His eyes are wide open so that he doesn't miss a thing. It grasps every situation at lightning speed and reacts immediately. A real jack of all trades!

name: Pinkie the magpie
description: This Schleich Pinkie the magpie figure is a hand-painted bird replica, capturing the plumage, posture, and distinctive features with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Pinkie can hardly resist: She always has a funny line for her boss, Mortimer. The cheeky magpie starts chattering excitedly and opens its blue eyes. As the loyal companion of Mortimer Morrison, owner of the magical pet shop, she knows exactly how to annoy her boss. And where she can find magical animals together with him. A very clear case!

name: Caspar the chameleon in rainbow colors
description: This Schleich Caspar the chameleon in rainbow colors figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Hupsi-pupsi – here comes Caspar the Chameleon. Caspar is a pretty versatile guy. He has the best fun changing color to suit himself and his surroundings. That makes sense, doesn’t it? After all, we all have many different sides to us. Why not show them all off? Caspar is only too happy to demonstrate how much fun it can be. Right now, he has opted for a layer of glitter on his green skin. I wonder what other looks he has?

name: Velociraptor
description: This Schleich Velociraptor figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Velociraptor, featuring the distinctive sickle-shaped claw and alert posture of this intelligent feathered predator. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The two-meter-long Velociraptor rears up on its hind legs and stretches its flat snout in the air. It has picked up a scent. It lets out a dangerous-sounding growl and opens and closes its mighty jaw a few times. With its sharp fangs, it can shred everything it can get its claws on. Off it runs across the plain. Although its lizard skin is covered in feathers, this carnivore cannot fly. Nevertheless, it’s still fast enough to stay hot on the heels of its prey. Let’s get out of here!

name: Dilophosaurus
description: This Schleich Dilophosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Dilophosaurus, featuring the pair of distinctive rounded crests on its skull. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: Weighing just 500 kilos, the Dilophosaurus is almost a lightweight compared to the other dinosaurs. But it should not be underestimated. The carnivore is a real predator and can crush fish or smaller dinosaurs like peanuts between its strong fangs. Because it has such strong hind legs, it’s a very good runner and can easily catch up with its prey when hunting. Better not let it catch your scent in the first place.

name: Diplodocus
description: This Schleich Diplodocus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Diplodocus, showcasing the extraordinary length of one of the longest dinosaurs ever discovered. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Diplodocus trudges in a leisurely fashion through the prehistoric world. It’s in no hurry at all, especially as it is on the heavy side. But this colossus doesn’t need to be scared of anyone. At that size, nobody wants to mess with it. If it does get angry, it whips its long tail threateningly from side to side. Watch how fast everyone disappears! Now it can get back to its favorite hobby: nibbling branches.

name: Carcharodontosaurus
description: This Schleich Carcharodontosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Carcharodontosaurus is also known as the sharp-toothed lizard, which sums up this handsome dinosaur pretty well. It has two rows of extraordinarily sharp fangs in its movable jaw. The carnivore also needs them to dismember its prey. When it is hungry, it pursues its dinner persistently until he has snatched it. With its long hind legs, it’s quite fast when it comes to hunting. Best only meet up with the Carcharodontosaurus when it has already had its dinner!

name: Megalodon
description: This Schleich Megalodon figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Megalodon, the largest shark that ever lived, capturing the terrifying scale of this ancient ocean predator. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Megalodon with its grey, scarred skin is a real prehistoric giant. Despite its impressive size of around 17 meters and a weight of up to 60 tons, it swims through the sea at lightning speed – always on the lookout for prey. No wonder: Because of its size, it is always hungry and has to eat a lot. He opens his large mouth threateningly and reveals his sharp shark teeth. Once he grabs his prey, there’s no escape!

name: Golden Retriever puppy
description: This Schleich Golden Retriever puppy figure is a lovingly detailed replica capturing the loyal character and distinctive breed features, with the irresistible charm of a puppy. Hand-painted with realistic colouring.
marketingDescription: The golden retriever, one of the most popular dog breeds, has a long history. The credit for the development of this breed is due to Lord Tweedmouth, who wanted to breed a strong, but gentle dog. Golden retrievers are the perfect family dog and need only daily exercise and sufficient attention. These sociable and sporty dogs have a friendly character. They like to swim and carry things in their mouths - take care where you put your shoes!

name: German Shepherd puppy
description: This Schleich German Shepherd puppy figure is a lovingly detailed replica capturing the loyal character and distinctive breed features, with the irresistible charm of a puppy. Hand-painted with realistic colouring.
marketingDescription: The German Shepherd dog was originally bred to herd sheep. But no matter what task you give it, it will take on any challenge enthusiastically and master it with unparalleled determination and great courage. Therefore, it is also ideal as a guide dog, a dutiful guard and police dog and as a reliable rescue dog. When well trained, it is also a great family dog and very chield-friendly. But the energetic, active dog would not be satisfied with a life on a sofa.

name: Asian elephant, female (bundle)
description: This Schleich Asian elephant, female (bundle) figure captures the wrinkled skin, large ears, and powerful trunk of the world's largest land animal, with the impressive tusks of a bull elephant. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The trunk of an elephant is as versatile as a Swiss army knife. Not only can the elephant smell really well with it, it uses it to suck in water, steady itself, lift trees up high, or spray itself with cool mud. The elephant eats by wrapping its trunk around leaves and grasses, whereby it plucks them from the tree and feeds them into its mouth. A grown animal devours up to 150 kg of green foliage a day. Elephants can even pronounce human-like words with their trunks. To do this, they put their trunks in the mouth and place it on the tongue.

name: Grizzly bear (Bundle)
description: This Schleich Grizzly bear (Bundle) figure captures the massive size, distinctive shoulder hump, and silver-tipped fur of North America's most powerful bear. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: Grizzlies are tall, strong animals - they stand up to 2.4 metres high and weigh roundabout 450 kilograms. They have sort of a hump on their back and strong hind limbs. Grizzly bears are able to run up to 55 kilometres per hour. They are loners and frequently behave aggressively. Sometimes they gather at waters to catch salmon. Since they are omnivores, these bears feed on fish, plants and large mammals like moose, deer and black bears. They are also known to steal food from wolves or humans.

name: Collectible Unicorn-Lemon
description: This Schleich Collectible Unicorn-Lemon figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: Lemon, the cute unicorn foal from schleich® BAYALA®, and the other 11 foals in its herd are lovingly known as the little fruits to the fairies, dragons and other inhabitants of BAYALA®. Because every unicorn owes its appearance to exactly the fruit that it first ate - as in Lemon's case, a lemon. And that is also just where its cute fruit marking comes from. Lemon is a bit calmer and always very relaxed. The foal doesn't think it's necessary to hurry. On the contrary, it would love to relax all day long. Its funny, calm mood often makes the others laugh.

name: Collectible Unicorn-Orange
description: This Schleich Collectible Unicorn-Orange figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: Orange, the cute unicorn foal from schleich® BAYALA®, and the other 11 foals in its herd are lovingly known as the little fruits to the fairies, dragons and other inhabitants of BAYALA®. Because every unicorn owes its appearance to exactly the fruit that it first ate - as in Orange's case, an orange. And that is also just where its cute fruit marking comes from. Orange is very, very hard-working by nature and is always there to help when there is something to do. Lending a hand, getting involved and just not getting bored, that's what Orange thinks is the most fun.

name: Collectible Unicorn-Mint Chocolate
description: This Schleich Collectible Unicorn-Mint Chocolate figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription:
A sprinkle of magic and a twinkle of imagination...a delicious enchantment is stirring in the secret gardens of BAYALA®. Colorful unicorn foals with curious markings frolic in the wooded groves.  It's the candy unicorns! Meet the newest addition - Ice Pop Unicorn! Available for a limited time.

The enchanted figurines and playsets of schleich® BAYALA® introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From majestic owls and woodland elves to glittering flower houses and unicorn stables, schleich® BAYALA® lets your stories run wild. Mythical creature figurines twinkle in rich detail, while authentic playsets enrich every tale! Our fairy toy figurines love to be whisked away into stories featuring schleich® dinosaur toys, wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® mythical creature toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and enchanted kingdom safety standards.

name: Rainbow Baby Dragon
description: This Schleich Rainbow Baby Dragon figure is an intricately detailed dragon with powerful wings, sharp claws, and formidable features. Hand-painted to bring the mystery of dragonkind to life.
marketingDescription: With its large, violet eyes, the rainbow baby dragon looks like butter wouldn’t melt in its mouth. But don’t be fooled, this little one can really pack a punch. Despite looking cute with its lemon yellow tousled hair. With its shiny wings, it can fly skilfully through the skies of BAYALA®, doing somersaults in the sky and playing all kinds of tricks. When it grows up, it can even paint rainbows in the sky! Who would have thought it!

name: Stone Triceratops
description: This Schleich Stone Triceratops figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Triceratops, showcasing its three facial horns and large bony frill that made it one of the most recognisable dinosaurs. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The green eyes of the Stone Triceratops gleam angrily in the darkness of the cave. Creepy! It lets out an angry snort. It’s pretty cramped here. With its mighty head, it’s not easy to move around. The only thing left for it to do is run away! It lowers its mighty head to attack and takes a run-up. Let’s get out of here quickly before it gets us with the three sharp crystal horns on its head. Yikes!

name: Shadow Worm
description: This Schleich Shadow Worm figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Anyone venturing into the shadow world should take good care. The nasty shadow worm is aways lurking around here. With its agile, fully mobile joints, it slithers through the shadow world at lightning speed. It can even dig through the earth in no time at all. So you don’t notice anything until it suddenly shoots out of the ground in front of you. That can be scary! Hissing, it opens its mouth, filled with pointed teeth, with red eyes glowering. Let’s get out of here!

name: Flower Unicorn Mare
description: This Schleich Flower Unicorn Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The flower unicorn mare is a real celebrity in BAYALA®. With its mane of flowers and lush tail of blossoms, its well known for its beauty, far and wide. When she trots gracefully across the pasture, she trails a delicate scent of roses behind her. She enchants everyone who is lucky enough to meet her. Simply beautiful!

name: Flower Unicorn Foal
description: This Schleich Flower Unicorn Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The cute flower unicorn foal opens its pitch-black eyes curiously. Who's coming to visit? It stretches its snout into the air and flares its pink nostrils. It must be a playmate coming! Straight away it takes off and gallops across the meadow, fast as the wind. But it’s careful not to trample any flowers, because that would be too bad! The dense, white mane of flowers and the lush flowery tail flutter in the wind. Isn't life in BAYALA® wonderful?

name: Fire saurian vs. Jungle lizard
description: This Schleich Fire saurian vs. Jungle lizard figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Who will claim victory here? The red Fire Dinosaur, with its flaming lizard comb and menacing yellow eyes? Or the Jungle Lizard, with its green back armour made of lianas and its two fearsome heads? Both warriors are fighting to the bitter end. Its terrifying roar can be heard from miles away. Horrifying! Run for cover before innocent bystanders get caught in the crossfire! Help!

name: Jungle Chimpanzee
description: This Schleich Jungle Chimpanzee figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Jungle Chimpanzee is feared across ELDRADOR®. And rightly so! It moves swiftly through the dense jungle, using its powerful, spike-covered liana tail. Silently, it swings from branch to branch, staying hidden among the treetops. Nothing escapes its keen eyes. With sharp yellow eyes, it watches every jungle visitor. If someone ventures too close, it leaps down from above, jaws wide open in a fearsome attack. So be careful! And always keep an eye above!

name: Moon Lion
description: This Schleich Moon Lion figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: What’s that noise? You can hear the friendly moon lion coming from afar, its mighty wings beating through the night sky. The moon lion flies through the darkness of BAYALA® and keeps an eye on things. It always follows its nose. As long as it is circling the skies above BAYALA® you can be sure that everything is fine. All the inhabitants can sleep peacefully. He shines in the dark just like the moon.

name: Lava Snail
description: This Schleich Lava Snail figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The mean Lava Snail is approaching with a trail of slime. Very slowly, she fixes her victim with her poisonous yellow eyes and then approaches. She is certainly not the fastest. But she shouldn't be underestimated! When she goes into battle, she has a clever strategy: She retreats into her shell and hides there. Her shell is impenetrable, because it’s covered in spikes. If the attacker turns away, she emerges from her shell again and bites with her sharp teeth. This tactic works frighteningly well and has made her feared throughout ELDRADOR®. Nasty!
