name: Jungle Boar
description: This Schleich Jungle Boar figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: It's a bad idea to mess with this ELDRADOR® resident, you can see that right away. The Jungle Wild Boar lifts his mighty head and instantly opens his giant mouth. This troublemaker rarely avoids a dispute. Why should he? With his huge, curved teeth, the boar can defend itself very well and does so with passion. If you look into his yellow eyes, you can see immediately: Negotiating is pointless. Let’s get out of here!

name: Jungle Raptor
description: This Schleich Jungle Raptor figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: A screech in the sky over ELDRADOR® announces his arrival from a distance: The Jungle Bird of Prey circles there. He wants to be heard, because he guards the Jungle World from above. Nothing goes unnoticed by his sharp eyes. He immediately detects intruders. Anyone who doesn't flee in fear at his screech, he pounces on from the air at the speed of an arrow. With its powerful claws, it loves to grab intruders by the head and render them helpless. It is best not to attempt to enter prohibited territory at all.

name: Cosmos Unicorn Stallion
description: This Schleich Cosmos Unicorn Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The Cosmos unicorn stallion looks impressive with its glittery mane and shimmering star tattoo. Sometimes you can see him from a distance in the magical forests of BAYALA® when his coat shines between the trees as he gracefully moves through the forest. It is particularly impressive when Cosmos is on the road together with the unicorn mare Cassiopeia. The two make a beautiful pair! The inhabitants of the forest like to come to him, because he is wise and likes to help. As a good friend, he protects everyone he holds dear.

name: Cassiopeia Unicorn Mare
description: This Schleich Cassiopeia Unicorn Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The Cassiopeia unicorn mare attracts everyone’s attention – if they see her at all. She prefers to move around at night. Then she can look at the stars without interruption and dream up into the sky. She then gallops lazily through the magical forests of BAYALA®. After her night rides, she often leaves a trace of stardust. She particularly likes exploring with Cosmos the unicorn stallion. Who could wish for a better friend?

name: Unicorn Mare Peach
description: This Schleich Unicorn Mare Peach figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The unicorn mare Peach is aptly named: Her coat has a delicate peach tone from head to toe. schleich® fans voted for this colour. A good choice, because it is reminiscent of the magical peach garden of BAYALA®. That is where the mare once discovered a sweet secret. Could this be referring to her little unicorn foal Iris? She has a beautiful tattoo on her side as a reminder. When asked about the exact meaning of the tattoo, Peach looks patiently with her black eyes and tilts her head charmingly to the side. In the peach garden, the trees are said to bear golden fruit, but Peach reveals nothing. Like true friends, she can keep a secret to herself!

name: Unicorn Foal Iris
description: This Schleich Unicorn Foal Iris figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: Nobody knows exactly where the pretty unicorn foal Iris comes from. There are many legends about her origins. Does the unicorn mare Peach have anything to do with this? Some believe that the foal was born from the heart of a flower on the enchanted flower meadow. With her delicate shape, purple fur and flower tattoo on her side, this could be true. Incidentally, Iris owes the beautiful fur colour to the schleich® fans, who were given the chance to vote. A good choice! Does Iris really carry the magic of nature inside her? When the foal looks on with her shiny black eyes, she is definitely enchanting.

name: Hanoverian mare
description: This Schleich Hanoverian mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Hanoverian warmblood from northern Germany, showcasing the athletic build and powerful gaits that make this breed a champion in equestrian sport.
marketingDescription: In Germany, Hanoverians have been successfully bred and advanced according to the highest standard since 1735. The Hanoverian is a typical, modern-day sport horse in rectangular format (longer than high). The Hanoverian is characterised by an excellent motion, predestined for the great sport. It can be trained for both dressage and show jumping at the highest level and is considered teachable, attentive, balanced, but also spirited.

name: Black Lion, roaring
description: This Schleich Black Lion, roaring figure captures the powerful build and commanding presence of the "King of the Jungle". Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Stop, stop whatever you're doing right now! And take a look. The Black Friday Lion from schleich® WILD LIFE is a real eye-catcher. And with his majestic mane and unique color, he just stands out. Which actually makes him quite nervous. He prefers to prance in private through the savannah or your playroom. And pretend not to see the stares – because that's not cool. At least that's what he thinks, even if he doesn't really know what that actually means. Maybe you can explain it to him?

name: Pura Raza Española Stallion
description: This Schleich Pura Raza Española Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The Pura Raza Española Stallion from schleich® HORSE CLUB is a proud black horse with an elegant arching neck, a noble head shape, a long, flowing mane and a luxuriant tail. Horses of this breed are often mistaken for Andalusians, and vice versa. This comes as no surprise because they are a separate breeding line within the Andalusians. The stud books are kept according to fixed rules to differentiate them from other horses.

name: Paint horse mare
description: This Schleich Paint horse mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Paint Horse, featuring the unique combination of white and dark markings that make each individual distinctively patterned.
marketingDescription: How can you tell apart a Paint horse mare and a pinto mare? It’s easy to mix them up, because they both have patched coats. Essentially, the only way to tell for sure is to consult the studbook: while pintos are only a colour breed, Paint horses are an official breed in their own right.

name: Andalusier Stallion
description: This Schleich Andalusier Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: Attentively he pricks up his pointed ears and swings his thick tail back and forth expectantly. The proud Andalusian stallion waits anxiously. Is his owner perhaps coming back to pick him up for training? Hopefully, because he loves that more than anything. You can tell, because the beautiful, pitch-black stallion is world class in this discipline. A quick learner and patient, he practices certain sequences over and over again until both he and his rider have mastered them perfectly. So, how about another training session?

name: HORSE CLUB ride out
description: This Schleich HORSE CLUB ride out figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: Join the four HORSE CLUB girls Hannah, Lisa, Sofia and Sarah with their horses Cayenne, Storm, Mystery and Blossom on their adventures around Lakeside. Where will their next ride take them?

name: Lava Bear
description: This Schleich Lava Bear figure is a fearsome warrior from the Eldrador® Creatures range, featuring dramatic armour, weapons, and elemental powers for epic battle play.
marketingDescription: The Lava Bear is rarely seen, as his duty is to guard the BattleCave and protect the world crystal. However, he sometimes wanders through the Lava World. Would you really want to cross paths with this fiery beast on your journey? He has a scorching temper and is always ready for a duel. He opens his massive jaws and bares his fangs. At the very least, his thunderous roar sends everyone fleeing. Run for it!

name: Shadow Tiger
description: This Schleich Shadow Tiger figure is a fearsome warrior from the Eldrador® Creatures range, featuring dramatic armour, weapons, and elemental powers for epic battle play.
marketingDescription: It’s instantly clear that the Shadow Tiger is the perfect guardian of the BattleCave, protecting the world crystal inside. He takes his duty seriously, watching everyone with his piercing red eyes. If someone gets too close, he lets out a warning hiss. Anyone bold enough to approach him should be ready for a fight: The Shadow Tiger doesn't joke around. He bares his fangs and lets out a thunderous roar. With his mighty paw and razor-sharp claws, he sends any attacker running in terror. No chance of defeating him!

name: Golden Anniversary Reindeer
description: This Schleich Golden Anniversary Reindeer figure captures the graceful proportions and alert ears of this elegant woodland herbivore. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: To commemorate the 90th anniversary. For schleich®’s anniversary, the golden anniversary Reindeer is presented in a special edition with exclusive decoration. The figurine impresses with shimmering golden fur, sparkling glitter on its legs, and elegant, glossy black details. The red and gold striped pattern on the antlers makes the figurine a true eye-catcher. A perfect gift for the festive season – or a unique collector’s item for fans!

name: Animal print T-Rex
description: This Schleich Animal print T-Rex figure is a meticulously detailed replica of the fearsome T. rex, capturing the powerful jaws and menacing stance of one of the largest land predators that ever lived. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: This T-Rex has a very striking colour scheme: The limited special edition comes in a striking pink leopard look – the design chosen by schleich® fans on Instagram. With this exclusive special painting, the dinosaur is a real eye-catcher and an indispensable addition to any collection. The figurine impresses with its lifelike posture. The prehistoric giant stands on two strong legs and stretches its threatening, large head high. The powerful jaw shows of its sharp teeth. The figurine is limited and only available in the online shop for a limited time.

name: Pegasus Stardust Metallic Edition
description: This Schleich Pegasus Stardust Metallic Edition figure depicts the legendary winged horse with magnificent feathered wings. Hand-painted to capture the majesty and freedom of this mythological creature.
marketingDescription: The Pegasus Stardust in the Metallic Edition from schleich® is a prized collector’s item. The winged horse from Greek mythology symbolises poetic inspiration and is shown here in elegant black. The gold dust in the mane, tail, and wings gives this mythical figurine an especially elegant appearance. A must-have for every collector!

name: Frosty Christmas Horse
description: This Schleich Frosty Christmas Horse figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: Holiday Horse #1 is available for a limited time and in strictly limited numbers exclusively in the online shop. This figurine marks the start of a new collectible series that fans won’t want to miss! The coat of the elegant horse figurine features an exclusive special paintwork in snow white with soft blue accents. Tail, mane, and hooves shimmer in silver. The coat and slender forehead are also adorned with intricate ice crystal decorations. A truly magical sight. The dense, flowing mane is particularly impressive. An absolute must-have!

name: Golden Rabbit
description: This Schleich Golden Rabbit figure captures the long ears, cotton-ball tail, and alert posture. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The golden rabbit from schleich® is a must-have for every Easter nest. The cute Easter messenger not only makes a stylish gift, but is also a lucky charm! Thanks to the exclusive special paintwork, it is bound to be a coveted collector’s item. With its thick fur and classic posture, it looks deceptively real, just about to bound away.

name: Saber Tooth Tiger
description: This Schleich Saber Tooth Tiger figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: What is that bone-chilling sound? The roar of the fearsome sabre-toothed tiger echoes through the Ice World, heard from miles away. He greets every intruder with bared fangs and a snarl that chills the blood. He bares his giant, transparent fangs. Like frozen daggers, they protrude from his mouth, striking fear into attackers. Anyone daring to challenge the sabre-toothed tiger is in for a tough fight. Its thick back armour of ice floes is completely impenetrable. Nothing and no one gets past it.

name: Shadow bear
description: This Schleich Shadow bear figure is a fearsome warrior from the Eldrador® Creatures range, featuring dramatic armour, weapons, and elemental powers for epic battle play.
marketingDescription: The Blizzard Bear has returned! Now he fights for the dark side as the fearsome Shadow Bear. After falling in battle against the Shadow World, he underwent a dark transformation. With his new, mystical Shadow World look, he is even more imposing and menacing than before. A unique collectible figurine that will make every schleich® fan’s heart race and enhance any collection!

name: Paso Fino stallion - LOVE edition
description: This Schleich Paso Fino stallion - LOVE edition figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The Paso Fino Stallion from the exclusive LOVE Edition from schleich® is a unique collector’s item that is only available in the online shop in limited quantities for a limited time. This adorable figurine stands out thanks to its meticulous paint and the two hearts on the side. Flowers are braided into the pink/gray mane and the luxuriant tail features a pretty braided style with purple ribbons. This elegant stallion is the perfect gift for all those who want to treat their loved ones. Perfect for Mother’s Day or Valentine’s Day, this charming item is sure to bring lots of joy and is a loving message to those close to your heart.

name: Mini Creature Series 6
description: This Schleich Mini Creature Series 6 is a collectible miniature from the popular Mini Creatures series, carefully crafted to capture distinctive features in a compact format perfect for collecting and trading.

name: Holstein cow
description: This Schleich Holstein cow figure captures the realistic markings and sturdy build of this essential farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Cows show affection by licking each others' heads, shoulders and backs. If they are separated from their friends, they often get stressed and sad. It's not difficult for cows to tell each other apart: they have unique voices and scents. In addition, the animals can identify up to 100 faces from their herd and are highly intelligent. Not only can they solve puzzles, but they actually really enjoy them. If they work out how to open a gate with a button, they jump up and down and frolic around.

name: Holstein calf
description: This Schleich Holstein calf figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription: After birth, the calves are lovingly licked dry by their mothers in their stall. After just a few days, they can join the other cows out on the pasture to frolic around and play. A few weeks later, they start eating grass and hay. However, they still can't digest the fresh green fodder as well as adult cows. That's why calves keep drinking their mother's milk for six to twelve months. They are fully grown by the age of around five, and can live to an age of between 20 and 25.

name: Simmental cow
description: This Schleich Simmental cow figure captures the realistic markings and sturdy build of this essential farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Grass is hard to digest. That's why cows chew an average of 50 times per minute - a total of 30,000 times per day. Even if we humans really make an effort, we generally don't chew a morsel of food more than 30 times. Cows produce over 150 litres of saliva per day as a result. This makes them very thirsty, so they also drink a lot of water: up to 180 litres per day. This is equivalent to a large bathtub filled to the top. If they are very thirsty, they can even drink 25 litres per minute.

name: Rooster
description: This Schleich Rooster figure is a hand-painted bird replica, capturing the plumage, posture, and distinctive features with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: All fowl have a crest on their head. It consists of a flap of skin and is particularly large and noticeable on roosters. The serrated comb, which looks like a blazing fire, is the best known. In addition, there are butterfly, rose and pea-shaped combs.

name: Hen
description: This Schleich Hen figure is a hand-painted bird replica, capturing the plumage, posture, and distinctive features with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Hens lay between 250-300 eggs per year. Although it may look that way at first, no two eggs are the same. They are of varying size and never have the same colour. They can be white, light or even dark brown. Even the small spots and speckles are always a little different.

name: Braunvieh cow
description: This Schleich Braunvieh cow figure captures the realistic markings and sturdy build of this essential farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Braunvieh cows are a domestic cattle breed that originated in Switzerland. They have been reared in the Alpine region for many centuries. Braunvieh cattle normally have single-coloured brown or grey coats, beautifully intermingled with different shades, and a black muzzle ringed with lighter fur. Although they are very muscular, their appearance is refined and graceful.

name: Jack Russell Terrier
description: This Schleich Jack Russell Terrier figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: The Jack Russell Terrier from schleich® FARM WORLD has the typical coat pattern of this dog breed - white with brown markings on the body and face. Its ears are characteristically v-shaped and are folded forward. Jack Russell Terriers love being active and are the perfect pets for people who enjoy being outdoors and getting lots of exercise.

name: Piglet
description: This Schleich Piglet figure depicts a charming young animal with the round body, curly tail, and expressive snout of one of the farm's most intelligent animals. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Look! A mini oink! Our cute Piglet from schleich® FARM WORLD might be small, but it's already full of energy. His curly, pink tail always wags especially quickly as he romps around on the sofa or does a belly flop into the freshly ironed pile of clothes. Even at a young age, his classic pig nose is perfect for sniffing out all kinds of things. Like leftover cookies in your bed. Did you know that pigs love to cuddle and even sleep nose-to-nose with each other? Isn't that cute?

name: Galloway Cow
description: This Schleich Galloway Cow figure captures the realistic markings and sturdy build of this essential farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: I wonder if the white Galloway cow knows that she is quite special, with her black ears and hooves? Her companions usually have a darker coat. But their fluffy fleece with little curls ensures they stay warm even in the coldest winter. That's why the Galloways prefer to stand outside in the pasture all year round. In the snow, the white Galloway cow is really well camouflaged. Only her black nose and ears shine boldly out amidst the white!

name: Percheron Mare
description: This Schleich Percheron Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The friendly Percheron Mare trots up trustingly. She is always happy to have visitors, especially if they have a crunchy carrot in their pocket. She carefully accepts it with her soft, black muzzle. I wonder what her plans are for today? Because of her build, she finds long gallops rather strenuous, but she is very strong and is good at moving heavy loads. Maybe she can pull a carriage? In any case, she is always helpful and happy to join in on excursions. How can you use her help?

name: Friesian Stallion
description: This Schleich Friesian Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Friesian breed from the Netherlands, capturing the striking all-black coat, flowing mane and tail, and noble bearing of this elegant breed.
marketingDescription: The long hair of its mane flows luxuriantly over its back as it canters along. The proud Friesian Stallion is black as night and, with his stately size, he draws admiring looks wherever he goes. He looks especially proud out in the pasture with his cute Friesian Foal (sold separately). This big, strong horse is gentleness personified and very reliable. The Friesian Stallion prefers to stay close to people he can trust.

name: Friesian Foal
description: This Schleich Friesian Foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the Friesian breed from the Netherlands, capturing the striking all-black coat, flowing mane and tail, and noble bearing of this elegant breed. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.
marketingDescription: The cute Friesian Foal curiously pricks up its ears and stretches its long neck. What's it discovered that is so interesting? No doubt it will trot across the pasture on its long legs to take a closer look. The pitch-black Friesian Foal is sure to look just like its father, the handsome Friesian Stallion (sold separately) when it grows up. A great future awaits with a career in horse shows or as a dressage horse. This old horse breed is particularly well suited for that kind of work. Friesians are also known to be reliable and gentle – perfect friends.

name: Mangalarga Marchador Stallion
description: This Schleich Mangalarga Marchador Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The Mangalarga Marchador Stallion is ready: Who wants to fetch him from the paddock and take him for a ride? He flares his nostrils and snorts in anticipation. He is ready to go out for an energetic ride. Riders appreciate the fact that he is quite manageable and not too big. Originally, the Mangalarga Marchador comes from Brazil. The name Marchador is derived from the way he walks, a gentle gait called "Marcha."

name: Norwegian Fjord Horse Gelding
description: This Schleich Norwegian Fjord Horse Gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the Norwegian Fjord, one of the world's oldest breeds, showcasing the distinctive dun colour with dark dorsal stripe and compact, powerful build.
marketingDescription: The solid-built Fjord horse gelding examines his surroundings with an alert gaze. He pricks up his small, pointed ears and listens. Can he hear someone coming across the field? He tilts his head thoughtfully. No, it was probably nothing – just the wind rustled the leaves. It's a pity really, because the sociable gelding with its distinctive stripe on his back and the two-tone mane really likes company. Maybe he'll just trot over to the Fjord Horse mare (sold separately) for a little chat.

name: Norwegian Fjord Horse Mare
description: This Schleich Norwegian Fjord Horse Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Norwegian Fjord, one of the world's oldest breeds, showcasing the distinctive dun colour with dark dorsal stripe and compact, powerful build.
marketingDescription: The friendly Fjord Horse Mare looks so pretty today. Her dark brown hooves and muzzle stand out d from the rest of the coat, which is a striking yellow. Just like the Fjord Horse Gelding (sold separately), she has the typical dark stripe along her back, as well as  the trademark of all Fjord Horses – a two-tone mane. She is especially proud of it, because her hair is trimmed into a nice stiff standing mane. It shows off her coloring perfectly. Doesn't she look adorable?

name: Arabian Stallion
description: This Schleich Arabian Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Arabian breed, capturing the distinctive dished face profile, high tail carriage, and spirited expression that have made Arabians prized for centuries.
marketingDescription: When the black Arabian Stallion stands next to the snow white Arabian Mare (sold separately), the two make a stunning pair. But the beautiful thoroughbred also cuts a great figure on his own. With his long, graceful legs and slender neck, he looks simply breathtaking. But he is also really sporty and loves nothing more than a good horse race. His temperament is a perfect match: He is vivacious and outgoing, but also quite sensitive.

name: Arabian Mare
description: This Schleich Arabian Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Arabian breed, capturing the distinctive dished face profile, high tail carriage, and spirited expression that have made Arabians prized for centuries.
marketingDescription: The beautiful Arabian Mare sets her delicate hooves down gracefully and looks over the pasture with an alert gaze. A thick strand of yellowish-white mane falls over her forehead. It looks great! I wonder if she knows how beautiful she is. Only the hooves and the muzzle with the large nostrils are dark. She has a pink patch on the front of her muzzle. The rest of her coat is a brilliant white. Attentively she pricks up her ears. Where has her Arabian Foal (sold separately) gone? She'd better go and have a look.

name: Arabian Foal
description: This Schleich Arabian Foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the Arabian breed, capturing the distinctive dished face profile, high tail carriage, and spirited expression that have made Arabians prized for centuries. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.
marketingDescription: Something's going on back there! The little Arabian Foal certainly doesn't want to miss it! Although it comes from the most noble breeding stock, the little thoroughbred doesn't have the slightest desire to behave like nobility. On the contrary, the Arabian Foal is extremely curious and playful. That's why it pricks up its little ears attentively and has already trotted off for an adventure. On long legs it gallops across the pasture. It looks so graceful that it is sure to become a successful racehorse one day.

name: Plymouth Rock Chicken
description: This Schleich Plymouth Rock Chicken figure is a hand-painted bird replica, capturing the plumage, posture, and distinctive features with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The beautiful Plymouth Rock chicken struts its stuff around the farm. It’s on the look-out for food. Perhaps the farmer has dropped a crisp lettuce leaf? Because it’s quite tame, its favorite people occasionally give it a treat. In return, the friendly chicken loves to be stroked. Its dense, fluffy plumage is unbelievably soft. So pretty!

name: Hyacinth Macaw
description: This Schleich Hyacinth Macaw figure showcases this Macaw, with vibrant multi-coloured plumage and powerful curved beak of the largest parrot species. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail.
marketingDescription: The Hyacinth Macaw skillfully clings on to the bark of the tree. With its powerful claws and the help of its beak, the parrot climbs up the tree trunk in no time at all. I wonder where it's going? Ah, it's spotted some delicious nuts hanging up high in the tree! One of its favorite dishes! The beautiful Hyacinth Macaw has bright blue plumage with golden yellow skin around its beak and eyes. It contrasts beautifully  with the iridescent plumage!

name: American Black Bear
description: This Schleich American Black Bear figure captures the powerful build and impressive stature of this formidable mammal. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The American Black Bear wanders through the woods at a leisurely pace. Where is it going? It's probably on the look-out for food as usual. Thanks to its stately size it's almost always hungry. Its favorite hobby is fishing. There it is, standing right in the middle of the river, skillfully catching a salmon in its mighty paws. If it gets really lucky, it might even  find some honey in a tree hollow. Thanks to its thick bristly coat, it's almost impossible for the bees to get through to sting it.

name: Fire Salamander
description: This Schleich Fire Salamander figure is a fearsome warrior from the Eldrador® Creatures range, featuring dramatic armour, weapons, and elemental powers for epic battle play.
marketingDescription: Oh look, a Fire Salamander! Anyone who manages to spot this particularly beautiful amphibian in the forest or along a stream can count themselves lucky. Most of the time it prefers to  move around at night. During the day it likes to hide in a hole in the ground or a cave. Thanks to its striking black and yellow patterning, most animals keep their distance. They know it's a warning, letting them know it might be poisonous. This specimen here, however, can be stroked by friends without any danger.

name: Japanese Macaque
description: This hand-painted Schleich Japanese Macaque figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2024, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The Japanese Macaque looks so friendly. It almost looks as if it is smiling, tilting its bushy head with the small reddish face: "Do you have a treat for me?" Who could resist! Like all monkeys, this macaque loves fresh fruit. If it's sweet, like bananas, it loves it all the more. The Japanese Macaque is curious and sociable and likes to make friends. Once it has got to know you, it's  sure to let you cuddle its thick furry back.

name: African Buffalo
description: This Schleich African Buffalo figure is a hand-painted wildlife replica capturing the natural beauty of this species with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The mighty Cape Buffalo raises its head and sniffs the air. With its black muzzle, it can sniff out exactly whether strangers are approaching the herd. The buffalo finds it hard to decide: can they keep on grazing or is an enemy closing in? If a strange buffalo tries to approach the herd, it doesn't miss a beat. At a gallop, he charges the uninvited guest, stopping just short of the stranger and lowers its big head. It snorts angrily, pawing at the ground. Its huge horns look so impressive that most intruders will trot off right away. All the better!

name: Ibex
description: This hand-painted Schleich Ibex figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2024, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Skillfully, the Ibex climbs up and down among the high mountain rocks. Setting its dainty hooves with caution, with an eye on the trail, the Ibex can move effortlessly through the difficult terrain of the Alps. More confidently than any other mammal here. It can easily scramble to heights of 3,500 meters! But when it gets hungry, it usually descends again from those lofty heights, because the juicy alpine meadows with the tasty herbs are usually lower down.

name: Armadillo
description: This hand-painted Schleich Armadillo figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2024, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The Armadillo is unmistakable and certainly has a very descriptive name. Its thick scaly armor is composed of several belts that run around its entire body. It looks kinda cute. Especially when it runs nimbly across the desert on its short legs. It has probably tracked down a tasty morsel with its sensitive nose. Most of all it loves to eat insects. When it's digging them out of their underground hiding places, the armadillo can hold its breath for up to six minutes! After that, we have to admit, it has really earned its meal.

name: Bonobo Female
description: This Schleich Bonobo Female figure captures the intelligent expression and graceful proportions of humanity's closest relative. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Is the female Bonobo on her lunch break? She's just sitting there, resting her hands on her knees. Maybe she just misses her playmates. Bonobos are very social and don't like to be alone. The female bonobo prefers to spend time with her family and, of course, her friends. Where has everyone gone? Maybe there will be someone around soon to keep her company.

name: Hawskbill Sea Turtle
description: This Schleich Hawskbill Sea Turtle figure captures this sea turtle, with its streamlined shell and powerful flippers for graceful ocean navigation. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The Hawksbill Sea Turtle glides elegantly through the Caribbean Ocean. It uses its front flippers to skillfully swim through the waves and knows how to take advantage of the currents. If you're lucky enough to encounter this beauty while diving, you'll surely never forget it! You're in with a good chance of meeting this enigmatic sea creature near coral reefs. That's where the sponges grow that it loves to eat. With its pointy beak, it picks the plants delicately from the corals and enjoys its meal.

name: Goat Kid
description: This Schleich Goat Kid figure depicts a charming young animal with the nimble build and curious expression of this agile and intelligent farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The little kid goat cheekily stretches its short stubby tail into the air. It’s already just as curious as its mom. It cranes its neck as long as it will go to see what's going on back there. But at the same time it’s a bit shy. Maybe you can tempt it to come closer with a little salt? It really likes to lick it out of your hand. That tickles!

name: Silkie Chicken
description: This Schleich Silkie Chicken figure is a hand-painted bird replica, capturing the plumage, posture, and distinctive features with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: With its lush plumage, the Silkie chicken always makes a dazzling appearance. It has certainly earned its name: Its feathers look so soft. How nice that it is so tame and likes to be stroked. Even now it comes bouncing up in its typical chicken walk, jerking its plump head back and forth. Which do you think it prefers – cuddles or treats?

name: Mangalica Pig
description: This Schleich Mangalica Pig figure captures the round body, curly tail, and expressive snout of one of the farm's most intelligent animals. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The Mangalica pig wanders around  the enclosure, ears bobbing. It squeaks energetically. I wonder what it's up to? It stretches its snout into the air and has a sniff. Its snout wiggles back and forth. What's that smell? Acorns! The woolly pig snuffles around in the earth and before you know it it has hit on some acorns! They are a real delicacy! It grunts with relish and crunches the nuts with its strong jaws. Yummy!

name: Rabbat the fox
description: This Schleich Rabbat the fox figure captures the bushy tail, pointed ears, and clever expression of one of nature's most resourceful predators. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: Although Rabbat originally comes from Norway, he is already very much at home in the School of Magical Animals. That's no surprise, since this clever fox has already made some good friends here. They have so many adventures together. Rabbat always shows himself to be a really good friend: He is honest and caring. Even now, he keeps a close eye on everything, making sure nothing bad happens. He pricks up his cute fox ears to make sure he doesn’t miss anything.

name: Juri the penguin
description: This Schleich Juri the penguin figure captures this penguin, with its distinctive black-and-white plumage and upright waddle. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: What tall tales is Juri telling again? The self-confident penguin stands around with a swagger, spreading his short wings and gesticulating wildly. I’m sure Juri has another cool story in store. He’s always at his best when he’s the center of attention. But perhaps he is also plotting a prank. There’s always fun to be had when you hang out with Juri. He’s such a good buddy. Who else can he make friends with?

name: Henrietta the turtle
description: This Schleich Henrietta the turtle figure captures this sea turtle, with its streamlined shell and powerful flippers for graceful ocean navigation. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Not bad, not bad at all! Henrietta the Tortoise catches a whiff of a juicy lettuce leaf nearby with her wrinkly nose. Despite her short legs, she can be surprisingly fast. When Henrietta is not out hunting for vegetables, she supports her friends with good advice. Henrietta has been around the block a few times and has experienced quite a lot in her long life. And she also knows how to tell funny stories about her experiences. She’s definitely worth listening to!

name: Caspar the chamaeleon
description: This Schleich Caspar the chamaeleon figure is a hand-painted reptile replica with lifelike scales, textures, and natural posture.
marketingDescription: Hupsi-pupsi – here comes Caspar the Chameleon. Caspar is a pretty versatile guy. He has the best fun changing color to suit himself and his surroundings. That makes sense, doesn’t it? After all, we all have many different sides to us. Why not show them all off? Caspar is only too happy to demonstrate how much fun it can be. Right now, he has opted for a layer of glitter on his green skin. I wonder what other looks he has?

name: Karajan the cat
description: This Schleich Karajan the cat figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: Mon Dieu!! What’s going on here? Karajan the Cat may sometimes be a little moody, but he’s still a good friend. You can count on him, especially when things get tough. He usually manages to come up with a good plan. But right now, he is checking out the situation and seems worried. Is an unappetizing scent disturbing his delicate French nose? Or did someone behave inappropriately? After all, he comes from a family of aristocats. He attaches great importance to manners.

name: Rick the crocodile
description: This Schleich Rick the crocodile figure showcases the powerful jaws and armoured body of one of nature's most ancient predators, unchanged for 200 million years. Hand-painted with lifelike colouring and texture.
marketingDescription:
Yummy, yummy, in my tummy! Rick the Crocodile must have filled his belly with something delicious again. All vegan, of course. In any case, Rick’s belly is looking pretty full as he stands there, keeping a lookout for his friends. Or is he just looking for more treats to eat? You would never think it of a crocodile, but Rick is not dangerous at all.
On the contrary, Rick is very friendly and loves nothing more than a cuddle with his friends. But don’t get him upset. Because then he will have to burp, and that’s always a bit embarrassing. But what else can he do?

name: Bonobo Female (circular)
description: This Schleich Bonobo Female (circular) figure captures the intelligent expression and graceful proportions of humanity's closest relative. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The female Bonobo looks very much like a Chimpanzee. No wonder: both come from the same ape family. But experts can recognize bonobos immediately by their light lips and distinctive middle parting. A pretty cool hairstyle for the female Bonobo, don't you think?

name: Moros Intrepidus
description: This Schleich Moros Intrepidus figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The Moros Intrepidus is admittedly much smaller than its relative, the famous Tyrannosaurus Rex. Its legs are only about 1.20 meters long. Nevertheless, it can also be quite dangerous. Its hunger for fresh meat can hardly be satisfied, which is why it’s always hunting. When it discovers its prey it can run faster than almost every other dinosaur. Once it has something in its sharp fangs, it won't let go without a fight. So we'd be better off keeping our distance!

name: Stegosaurus
description: This Schleich Stegosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Stegosaurus, with its iconic double row of bony plates and four-spiked tail, one of the most distinctive dinosaurs. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Stegosaurus is easy to spot  from afar, and not only because it's so huge: the fiery red double row of boney curved armored plates on its back is unmistakable. It forms a beautiful contrast to its yellowish lizard skin. With its head lowered, it trudges across the meadows, always holding its long tail up a little. Its favorite thing to do is graze. That's what a Stegosaurus does all day long because it takes a while for the 4.5-ton herbivore to eat enough to keep going. Fancy a munch?

name: Concavenator
description: This Schleich Concavenator figure depicts a prehistoric creature from the Ice Age era, hand-painted with anatomical detail to bring this ancient animal to life.
marketingDescription: It looks a bit poisonous, the Concavenator. That's probably because of its yellow-green lizard skin and the fiery red hump on its back. I wonder if it has a purpose other than scaring people. It's certainly impressive. The prehistoric giant's height of six meters also commands respect. But if you mess with it, you'll soon realize that the Concavenator isn't in the mood for fun: its powerful jaws open and close menacingly as it exposes his razor-sharp teeth. Time to head for the hills!

name: Bajadasaurus
description: This Schleich Bajadasaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Bajadasaurus trots through the jungle in a leisurely manner. It's probably looking for a lush meadow to graze. It also needs a substantial meal if it wants to maintain its weight – a remarkable 4,000 kilograms. To ensure that no one disturbs it while dining, it has deterrent spines along its neck and back. While it appears to be pretty fierce, it's actually quite a nice dino. It just likes to have a little peace and quiet while eating...

name: Allosaurus
description: This Schleich Allosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Allosaurus, capturing the fearsome build and serrated teeth of the dominant Jurassic apex predator. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: Who's that coming around the corner? You can tell it's the Allosaurus from afar, thanks to its heavy footsteps. Standing tall, the giant walks on two legs through the jungle, looking for prey. Although it is so big, it's pretty well camouflaged. In fact, its lizard skin is patterned so that it blends in perfectly with its surroundings. It inspects the area with beady yellow eyes. Let's hope it doesn't suddenly decide it wants a snack! No wonder this fearsome carnivore is one of the most dangerous predators in the dinosaur world.

name: Brachiosaurus
description: This Schleich Brachiosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Brachiosaurus, capturing the incredible height and long neck of one of the tallest dinosaurs to walk the Earth. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The huge Brachiosaurus can be seen from far and wide: As high as a house, its long neck juts out above the treetops. What is it doing there anyway? With its sharp teeth, it plucks leaves and twigs from the branches. It's rarely disturbed during mealtimes, and not just because of its size. The prehistoric giant is covered from head to the tip of its tail in fiery red lizard skin. It's a clever way for the Brachiosaurus to keep attackers at bay. But, as a vegetarian, it's not usually in the mood for a fight.

name: Bernese Mountain Dog, female
description: This Schleich Bernese Mountain Dog, female figure is a lovingly detailed replica capturing the loyal character and distinctive breed features. Hand-painted with realistic colouring.
marketingDescription: The Bernese mountain dog, originating from the Alps region, is a gain for every family. These dogs enjoy human company and want to be in the thick of it all the time. Bernese mountain dogs are gentle and friendly and know how to behave. they like being outdoors, particularly in the winter months. Regular tasks are weekly grooming and daily walks. Bernese mountain dogs generally weigh around 45 kilos and carry out draught, shepherding and driving tasks.

name: Rabbit hutch
description: This Schleich Rabbit hutch figure captures the long ears, cotton-ball tail, and alert posture. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Two baby rabbits are moving into their new home! The spacious hutch has already been prepared for them, so they can eat from the food bowl and drink from the water bottle right away. The little ones can spend all day larking around in their rabbit run. In the run, they discover a tunnel that's perfect for playing hide and seek.

name: Happy Cow Wash
description: This Schleich Happy Cow Wash figure captures the realistic markings and sturdy build of this essential farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription:
It's time to get the cows ready for the fair! Will you help the farmer wash and brush the cows? A warm bath feels so nice -the baby calf loves bath time!

Happy Cow Wash playset is a blue-ribbon addition to the schleich® FARM WORLD collection. This set includes a toy cow and toy calf, a functioning wash station, and other cow care tools found on the farm. The authentic detail that makes schleich® toys famous worldwide is found in each component of the Happy Cow Wash set.

schleich® farm toys for toddlers and kids introduce the endless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From little donkey foal figurines to big barns filled with horses and cows, schleich® FARM WORLD has all the animal figures and farmer figures and sets you need to let your stories run wild! For even more action and adventures, our farm toys and figures play well with schleich® unicorn toys, dinosaur toys, wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® playsets are built to last. All our toys meet the highest national and international safety standards.

name: Puppy Agility Training
description: This Schleich Puppy Agility Training figure is a lovingly detailed replica capturing the loyal character and distinctive breed features, with the irresistible charm of a puppy. Hand-painted with realistic colouring.
marketingDescription: To make sure that his dogs Rosi and Bobby stay fit and can learn cool tricks, FW boy Ben trains them with the new set Puppy Agility Training from schleich® FARM WORLD! He teaches his bulldog Rosi and miniature schnauzer Bobby how to balance on the seesaw and jump through rings. They improve with every training session. While the dogs share their reward bone, Ben swings as high as he can on his tire swing. It's so much fun! The set arrangement can be varied and provides limitless playing fun!

name: Sheep Friends
description: This Schleich Sheep Friends figure captures the woolly fleece and gentle stance of this beloved farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Don't you just love this woolly gang! Curiously, the three fluffy sheep keep an eye out to see who's approaching the pasture. But they are a little shy. The brown and the brown-and-white spotted Southdown Babydoll Sheep sidle close up to the third in the group – the white Hampshire Sheep with its black muzzle. I wonder if this one is braver than the others? Together, the three woolly sheep friends definitely feel braver than if they were alone. And they are right: Life is better with friends!

name: Penguin Family Fun
description: This Schleich Penguin Family Fun figure captures this penguin, with its distinctive black-and-white plumage and upright waddle. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: These penguin kids are pretty wild! The older penguin just can't get enough of the ice slide. Again and again it hurtles down the slippery ice chute. And splash - it lands in the water. It quickly swims back over to the ice floe with the slide. Wait what's that cracking sound? Oh, the little baby penguin is hatching from its egg! It wants to join in the penguin family fun right away. Look how cute it is, waddling awkwardly up the slope to get to the ice seesaw.

name: Rabbit hutch
description: This Schleich Rabbit hutch figure captures the long ears, cotton-ball tail, and alert posture. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: In the rabbit hutch, the lionhead rabbit watches its two kids playing. They are using the hollow tree trunk to hop around in. They haven't discovered the slide yet, which mom is very happy about. She doesn't want them going too crazy, because they are still young. She tries to keep them close by offering them a crunchy carrot. Although it smells wonderful, the two little ones would much rather carry on romping around. Maybe she'll have better luck with some lettuce?

name: Eldrador Mini Creature Series 5
description: This Schleich Eldrador Mini Creature Series 5 is a collectible miniature from the popular Mini Creatures series, carefully crafted to capture distinctive features in a compact format perfect for collecting and trading.

name: Ice Dragon
description: This Schleich Ice Dragon figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Ice Dragon circles high above ELDRADOR®. Nothing that moves on the ground below can escape its beady and sharp gaze. Is danger lurking down there? The dragon does not hesitate: It folds its silver wings close to its body and plunges into the depths. The attacker on the ground won't know what hit it. As if from out of nowhere, the Ice Dragon appears, shaking its silver mane. It opens its beak to reveal a set of needle-sharp teeth. Threateningly, the dragon flexes its muscles and tears deep furrows in the ground with its claws. Together with its comrades-in-arms, Ice Monster and Snow Wolf, it's off to battle they go! (Figures sold separately.)

name: Jungle Dragon
description: This Schleich Jungle Dragon figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Jungle Dragon has a firm grip on the Jungle World. No one dares dispute its supremacy. Why? Just one look at those powerful jaws, ready to crush anything, is enough. It bares its needle-sharp teeth threateningly. Anyone who gets too close is in danger of a painful blow from that powerful tail. It's even covered in sharp spikes for good measure. The dragon is better viewed from a distance, like when he spreads his huge wings and soars into the air. That's also its favorite place to be, because, from up there, it can keep an eagle eye on ELDRADOR®.

name: Shadow Bat
description: This Schleich Shadow Bat figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Shadow Bat from ELDRADOR® is a creature of darkness. Its whole body is perfectly suited to getting up to no good in the dark. Its oversize ears catch every sound. Attackers have no chance to sneak up undetected. If they try, this bat is already prepared for any uninvited guests. It digs its claws into the ground and spreads its wings. If the enemy approaches, it takes to the air and circles around the attacker, swooping down to bare its sharp vampire teeth. Will things end badly for the visitors?

name: Magic Deer
description: This Schleich Magic Deer figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Curiously, the Magic Deer opens its. big beautiful eyes and sniffs the wind with its black muzzle. It must have sniffed out the scent of roses. It's setting off at a trot already, to get to the roses quickly. There it can decorate its magnificent golden antlers with fresh flowers. This is a daily routine, carefully choosing only the roses that exactly match its pink coat. No wonder this vision of beauty is one of the best in BAYALA®!

name: Magic Peacock
description: This Schleich Magic Peacock figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Gracefully, the Magic Peacock spreads its transparent wings to take to the skies. From up there, the Magic Peacock has everything in view - wonderful! It circles above our heads, gazing down on the meadows and forests below. Suddenly it feels like doing something crazy and does a loop with its moving wings. It can do some great acrobatics in the air. What a pleasure to watch it sailing through the clouds. Maybe it can carry someone on its back on its next adventurous flight?

name: Collectibles Unicorn Terra
description: This Schleich Collectibles Unicorn Terra figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: The Collectible Unicorn from the Universe family can hardly wait: it wants to join in the fun! It stretches its pretty head with the brightly colored glittery mane and looks curiously at what's going on. Meanwhile, the other unicorns are already jumping around happily. Maybe it should join in? At a fast canter, drumming its glittery hooves, it runs across the meadow to its friends. It loves to make new friends, gifting them with a pretty poster of itself. It will look perfect on the playroom wall! Doesn't the herd look wonderful?

name: Collectibles Unicorn Sunny
description: This Schleich Collectibles Unicorn Sunny figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: The Collectible Unicorn from the Universe family can hardly wait: it wants to join in the fun! It stretches its pretty head with the brightly colored glittery mane and looks curiously at what's going on. Meanwhile, the other unicorns are already jumping around happily. Maybe it should join in? At a fast canter, drumming its glittery hooves, it runs across the meadow to its friends. It loves to make new friends, gifting them with a pretty poster of itself. It will look perfect on the playroom wall! Doesn't the herd look wonderful?

name: Collectibles Unicorn Shooting Star
description: This Schleich Collectibles Unicorn Shooting Star figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: The Collectible Unicorn from the Universe family can hardly wait: it wants to join in the fun! It stretches its pretty head with the brightly colored glittery mane and looks curiously at what's going on. Meanwhile, the other unicorns are already jumping around happily. Maybe it should join in? At a fast canter, drumming its glittery hooves, it runs across the meadow to its friends. It loves to make new friends, gifting them with a pretty poster of itself. It will look perfect on the playroom wall! Doesn't the herd look wonderful?

name: Collectibles Unicorn Vialactea
description: This Schleich Collectibles Unicorn Vialactea figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: The Collectible Unicorn from the Universe family can hardly wait: it wants to join in the fun! It stretches its pretty head with the brightly colored glittery mane and looks curiously at what's going on. Meanwhile, the other unicorns are already jumping around happily. Maybe it should join in? At a fast canter, drumming its glittery hooves, it runs across the meadow to its friends. It loves to make new friends, gifting them with a pretty poster of itself. It will look perfect on the playroom wall! Doesn't the herd look wonderful?

name: Collectibles Unicorn Saturnia
description: This Schleich Collectibles Unicorn Saturnia figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: The Collectible Unicorn from the Universe family can hardly wait: it wants to join in the fun! It stretches its pretty head with the brightly colored glittery mane and looks curiously at what's going on. Meanwhile, the other unicorns are already jumping around happily. Maybe it should join in? At a fast canter, drumming its glittery hooves, it runs across the meadow to its friends. It loves to make new friends, gifting them with a pretty poster of itself. It will look perfect on the playroom wall! Doesn't the herd look wonderful?

name: Apollo Unicorn Stallion
description: This Schleich Apollo Unicorn Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The proud Apollo Unicorn Stallion represents sustainable solar energy. No wonder, because with his golden-brown coat and the golden serrated crest on his neck, he shines as brightly as the sun. Impatiently, he swishes his lush curly tail back and forth and paws with his hooves: Where are Flowy Unicorn Mare and Stormy Unicorn Foal? They wanted to go on a family outing together and explore the beautiful world of BAYALA®! But maybe someone else will keep him company?

name: Flowy Unicorn Mare
description: This Schleich Flowy Unicorn Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: When the Flowy Unicorn Mare trots across the meadow, everyone turns to look at her. She looks beautiful. Her flowing blue tail looks like a waterfall and her lush glittery mane flows elegantly down her back. Everything about this gorgeous unicorn reminds us of water. Maybe that's why the pretty mare is the perfect symbol for hydropower? In any case, she is happy to stand up for a climate-friendly BAYALA®.

name: Stormy Unicorn Foal
description: This Schleich Stormy Unicorn Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The Stormy Unicorn Foal spreads her big light blue wings and stretches them into the wind. Just the right weather for the spirited foal! When its glittery mane flutters in the headwind and its blue-turquoise tail is tossed back and forth by the storm, it is really in its element. The little whirlwind loves stormy times. That's why the Unicorn Foal is only too happy to campaign for sustainable wind power.

name: Ice Bug vs. Fire Kraken
description: This Schleich Ice Bug vs. Fire Kraken figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Ice World vs. Lava World! It looks dangerous when the Ice Bug and the Fire Kraken fight each other. I wonder who is the stronger of the two? It's hard to tell, because they both look so scary. The Ice Bug keeps trying to grab the Fire Kraken with its sharp claws. But it defends itself with its flaming tentacles. The Ice Bug tries to dodge its countless suction arms, because they burn like fire and have dangerous pincers at the ends. This will be some fight!

name: Shadow Lynx vs. Rock Crusher
description: This Schleich Shadow Lynx vs. Rock Crusher figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Threateningly, the Shadow Lynx opens its huge jaws to reveal its powerful fangs. But the Rock Crusher doesn't retreat one step. On the contrary: It comes closer and closer on its powerful clawed feet, waving its thick tail menacingly back and forth. This one is studded with transparent crystals that could be quite dangerous to its attacker! Then the Shadow Lynx raises its huge paw and tries to strike a blow at the Rock Crusher with its sharp claws. But it dodges unexpectedly fast, baring its teeth. It's hard to tell who the winner will be!

name: Crystal Dragon
description: This Schleich Crystal Dragon figure is an intricately detailed dragon with powerful wings, sharp claws, and formidable features. Hand-painted to bring the mystery of dragonkind to life.
marketingDescription: There is a buzzing in the air: The crystal dragon shoots through the skies of BAYALA® at full speed. It hugs its wings close to its slender body so that it can go faster. It looks like a blue arrow. Where is it going in such a hurry? But the crystal dragon can also go slow: On calm days, it spreads its elegant wings and sails high up through the thermals. Then it can be seen from afar and attracts admiring glances. It looks wonderful!

name: Andalusian mare
description: This Schleich Andalusian mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Andalusian breed, originating from the Iberian Peninsula, showcasing its elegant build and powerful yet graceful stance suited to classical dressage.
marketingDescription: This beautiful Andalusian mare is the darkest black. She is one of the purebred Menorcans, a special type of Andalusian horse that is usually white. Doesn't she look beautiful, the way she sets down her hooves? Her thick mane is particularly striking. It falls elegantly over her neck when she lowers her head. She is already waiting impatiently! When will she finally be saddled and taken out of the stable to go for a ride? After all, the weather is just perfect!

name: Mustang stallion
description: This Schleich Mustang stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Mustang, the free-roaming horse of the West, capturing the hardy, independent spirit of these resilient horses.
marketingDescription: You can tell right away that this fiery Mustang stallion loves his freedom. Look at him standing firm, snorting his nostrils. What do you think he can smell? It must be the whiff of adventure, because he looks ready to gallop off. If you swing on his back like an American Indian, without a saddle, he'll gladly take you along!

name: Holsteiner mare
description: This Schleich Holsteiner mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Holsteiner warmblood from northern Germany, showcasing the powerful, athletic build that produces top-level show jumping competitors.
marketingDescription: The Holstein mare's lush black mane and thick tail are not yet braided for the show. During training, her mane is allowed to flutter freely in the wind as she elegantly takes a run-up to the next obstacle. She daintily bows her head and immediately jumps skillfully over the wall. Doesn't she look impressive? With her long legs, she also cuts a fine figure in dressage. She's sure to win another trophy!

name: Lunar New Year Dragon
description: This Schleich Lunar New Year Dragon figure is an intricately detailed dragon with powerful wings, sharp claws, and formidable features. Hand-painted to bring the mystery of dragonkind to life.
marketingDescription: If you're not careful, you can easily be blinded by the radiant appearance of the Chinese messenger of the sky. The sun glitters on the lizard's skin and the golden spikes on its back reflect its rays. The bringer of luck was inspired directly by the Year of the Dragon. Hopefully it will stick around for a while, because it looks great with those fiery red stripes along its back and the red markings on its head. It certainly knows how to defend itself with its sharp claws. Yet, it's usually it's very friendly, as you can see by the expression in its pretty green eyes. Who wouldn't want to have a friend like that?

name: Cheval de Selle Francais mare
description: This Schleich Cheval de Selle Francais mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The Cheval de Selle Francais mare is an excellent show jumper. That's thanks to her strong hind legs, with which she can overcome any obstacle. But she also simply enjoys showing what she is made of at tournaments. That's why she's always up for a workout. She also likes to look out for fallen trees during rides, to jump over before galloping off. With her strong legs, shiny brown coat and slender neck, this horse impresses the entire world of HORSE CLUB.

name: Quarter Horse Gelding
description: This Schleich Quarter Horse Gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Quarter Horse, the most popular breed in the United States, showcasing the compact, muscular build ideal for sprinting and ranch work.
marketingDescription: The Quarter Horse gelding is curious to see how its appearance is received. With its light gray coat and dark gray mane, it is a beauty in all respects. And to top it all off there are those pretty blue bows in its mane. Delightful! Inquisitively, it trots across the pasture to the other horses and proudly shows off its finery. But the soft muzzle makes it especially adorable. This one is black and has a delicate pink patch between the nostrils. Too cute! With these looks, it's easy to forget what a powerhouse this Quarter Horse gelding is. With its compact growth and strong legs, it can easily pull the heaviest of loads.

name: Limited-Edition Frosty Christmas Reindeer
description: This Schleich Limited-Edition Frosty Christmas Reindeer figure is a fearsome warrior from the Eldrador® Creatures range, featuring dramatic armour, weapons, and elemental powers for epic battle play.
marketingDescription: Ho, ho, ho! The Limited-Edition Frosty Christmas Reindeer is all dressed up and looking forward to the holiday season. Finally it can go on the road again with Santa Claus and transport all the children's gifts in the sleigh. Every year it's a truly special experience. The reindeer stretches its neck and pricks up its ears: Didn't it hear something? A ringing of bells, perhaps? That must be Santa Claus already preparing the sleigh before the great ride! It should probably go and check.

name: Limited-Edition Lucky Golden Pig
description: This Schleich Limited-Edition Lucky Golden Pig figure captures the round body, curly tail, and expressive snout of one of the farm's most intelligent animals. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The old year comes to an end and the new year begins. This exclusive Lucky Golden Pig loves the turn of the year and celebrating with friends. Together they look back on the beautiful moments of the past year and looks forward to everything exciting that lies ahead. To celebrate this occasion in a fitting manner and to help luck along little, it has really dressed up to the nines. From head to toe it shimmers in gold and its flank is adorned with a lucky tattoo - a four-leaf clover. So the new year is bound to get off to a great start! Are you throwing a New Year's Eve party for the Lucky Pig? It certainly shouldn't be missing from your collection!

name: Lava Hyena
description: This Schleich Lava Hyena figure is a fearsome warrior from the Eldrador® Creatures range, featuring dramatic armour, weapons, and elemental powers for epic battle play.
marketingDescription: When the Lava Hyena isn't guarding the BattleCave and the World Crystal, it's clearly looking for trouble. Restlessly roaming ELDRADOR®, it's always looking for trouble. If you're smart, you'd better not get involved. The Lava Hyena is a fearsome opponent. When it opens its jaws to reveal those sharp fangs, it sends an icy chill down your spine. And just wait till it throws its head back, breaking into a gruesome hyena laugh, your blood will run cold.  No doubt: The Lava Hyena has already defeated many attackers. Let's get out of here fast!

name: Stone Chameleon
description: This Schleich Stone Chameleon figure showcases the independently moving eyes, curled tail, and textured skin of this extraordinary colour-changing lizard. Hand-painted with lifelike colouring and texture.
marketingDescription: The Stone Chameleon creeps through ELDRADOR® on silent soles. It's guarding the BattleCave and keeping a close eye on what's going on in the Stone World. Usually it sits tucked away and well hidden on a branch, encircled with its strong tail. From above it can see everything that's going on. It opens its large, rotating eyes. Is anyone coming? It deftly drops from the branch, appearing out of nowhere in front of the attacker. Opening its jaws you can see all those pointed rows of teeth! Let's get out of here fast!

name: Jungle Tarantula
description: This hand-painted Schleich Jungle Tarantula figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2024, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Anyone traveling in the jungle world should keep their eyes open for the dangerous Jungle Tarantula. You don't want to bump into it unexpectedly, because it's always ready to attack. But it can be hard to avoid. That's because the Jungle Tarantula likes to sit, well camouflaged and ready to ambush. When attacked, it likes to bite and spray its venom. Maybe we could take this trip to the jungle another time? That might be a good idea!

name: Shadow Bug
description: This Schleich Shadow Bug figure is a fearsome warrior from the Eldrador® Creatures range, featuring dramatic armour, weapons, and elemental powers for epic battle play.
marketingDescription: The Shadow Isopod is no walk in the park when it comes to battle. Its armor is so hard and impenetrable that even the sharpest teeth shatter like glass. Its transparent, purple shimmering armor is also its strongest defense. Apart from its red glowering eyes, with which it fixes its victims. Small and mean, these eyes emerge in the darkness and are often the first thing you'll see of the Shadow Isopod. If you don't run away fast enough, it won't be long before you feel its sting. So watch out!

name: Limited-Edition Unicorn Beach Edition Wave
description: This Schleich Limited-Edition Unicorn Beach Edition Wave figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: Attentively the pretty Unicorn Beach Edition watches the hustle and bustle on the beach. The unicorn paws briefly with its graceful hooves in the sand and gallops off. It looks just great, splashing in the ocean with its blue fur and glitter mane blowing in the wind. It jumps exuberantly over a few more waves, then trots over to its playmates. The exclusive and limited edition summer unicorn as a collectible figure should not be missing in your collection!

name: Shadow hound
description: This Schleich Shadow hound figure is a fearsome warrior from the Eldrador® Creatures range, featuring dramatic armour, weapons, and elemental powers for epic battle play.
marketingDescription: Stop! Not one more step! This is the realm of the Shadowhound. No way does it want any visitors. Broad-legged, it blocks the way and flexes its muscles. Help, it has two heads! The Shadowhound lowers one head and bares its teeth, while slowly raising its other head and showing off its impressive set of teeth. No question: The Shadowhound is dangerous as can be. I wonder if it has always been this mean. After all, it used to be a Hellhound, before it was defeated in battle against the Shadow World and was transformed into a Shadowhound.

name: Triceratops yellow
description: This Schleich Triceratops yellow figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Triceratops, showcasing its three facial horns and large bony frill that made it one of the most recognisable dinosaurs. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription:
With its bright yellow scales, this popular herbivore spreads good vibes among its fellow triceratops. The triceratops particularly likes plants on ground level so that it doesn’t have to crane its neck up too high.

But anyone who might think the triceratops is small and harmless couldn’t be more wrong!

At around nine meters in length, it’s bigger than a bus, and its huge neck frill and three pointy horns make it a formidable opponent that can hold its own in any fight.

name: Lunar New Year Snake
description: This Schleich Lunar New Year Snake figure captures the sinuous form and detailed scale pattern of this snake species. Hand-painted with realistic colouring.
marketingDescription: The Lunar New Year snake impresses with its exclusive special golden paintwork and fiery red accents and, together with the Lunar New Year dragon, makes for a perfect collector’s duo. The two figurines not only complement each other visually, but also embody the deeper symbolism of the Chinese New Year. The snake, with its elegantly curved body and raised head, flashes its slender tongue – a fascinating detail that emphasizes its graceful appearance. As a symbol of wisdom and beauty, it is perfect for 2025, the year of the snake, and will be a valuable addition to any collection. This artistically designed figurine not only brings good luck, but will add a touch of exclusivity to any New Year celebration.

name: Lipizzaner Gelding
description: This Schleich Lipizzaner Gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the Lipizzaner breed, famous for the Spanish Riding School in Vienna, capturing the classical elegance and strength of these renowned dressage horses.
marketingDescription: Lipizzaners are sociable horses that are easy to train. They are therefore a favourite breed among horse lovers. With his pretty bow on his tail, he also looks great in any nursery. The wonderful Lipizzaner gelding from the wedding carriage is now available exclusively in the schleich® online shop as a single figurine!

name: Simmental calf
description: This Schleich Simmental calf figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription: Calves are born around once a year. It's very important they drink their mother's milk within the first few hours. This is a special yellowish liquid known as colostrum that cannot be drunk by humans. It contains numerous antibodies that help the calf to resist diseases. After around five days, the calf will have had enough colostrum and will then drink normal cow's milk for around ten months until it can nourish itself exclusively from grass and other plants.

name: Goat kid
description: This Schleich Goat kid figure depicts a charming young animal with the nimble build and curious expression of this agile and intelligent farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Goat and kids recognize each other by the sound of their calls, not by their appearance. Kids suckle for a period of six months, before they begin to eat leaves and grass. Their age can be determined by their teeth. A one-year-old kid has, for example, two teeth, while a two-year-old has four teeth and is then considered adult.

name: Labrador Retriever female
description: This Schleich Labrador Retriever female figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
