marketingDescription: Labrador Retrievers enjoy a swim and are frequently described as water dogs. They have a topcoat of somewhat longer hair and a thick undercoat, which keeps out the water like a kind of diving suit. Between their toes the dogs even have webbing.

name: Cat
description: This Schleich Cat figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: Cats use their long facial whiskers to measure gaps. They use them to find out whether they fit through an opening or are too big or fat for it. The older a cat is, the longer its whiskers, as it becomes less mobile with age

name: Texas Longhorn bull
description: This Schleich Texas Longhorn bull figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription: Texas longhorns have the longest horns of any cattle. The first signs of the horns can be seen at the age of just three weeks. The horns grow sideways out of the head and twist slightly at the tips. By around the time a bull turns one, its horns will already have grown to around half their adult length.

name: Black bull
description: This Schleich Black bull figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription: Bulls have been the symbol of Spain for centuries. They can weigh well over 1,000 kg and are extremely strong. Before a bull attacks, it displays warning behaviours. It shows itself from the side so that it looks bigger, tosses its head back and forth, scrapes the ground with its front hoof and bellows.

name: Black Angus bull
description: This Schleich Black Angus bull figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription: Angus cattle are beautiful and strong black cattle with somewhat shorter legs. Usually the animals do not have horns - they have been bred out so that the cattle do not injure each other. This is especially important for the heavy, strong bulls. Black Angus cattle are very undemanding and therefore very popular with farmers.

name: Lamb
description: This Schleich Lamb figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription: Sheep that are not older than one year are referred to as lambs. A few days after birth, their wool begins to grow. They quickly learn to find their way amongst the herd and are smarter than assumed to be. Sheep can distinguish not only the faces of their own species, but also those of humans.

name: Miniature schnauzer
description: This Schleich Miniature schnauzer figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: The Miniature Schnauzer has a moustache, thick, long eyebrows and wiry fur. The breed originates from Germany and resulted from crossing the Schnauzer with the Poodle and Affenpinscher. Miniature Schnauzers are considered to be particularly clever, attentive, lively and fearless.

name: American Shorthair Cat
description: This Schleich American Shorthair Cat figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: The beautiful spots on the face and body of the American Shorthair Cat from the schleich® FARM WORLD show how varied and exciting the coat pattern of this cat breed can be. The animals have a wonderfully affectionate and gentle nature, which almost always puts them in the top 10 most popular cat breeds. American Shorthair Cats are also very intelligent. For example, they enjoy puzzles.

name: Poodle
description: This Schleich Poodle figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: The Poodle from schleich® FARM WORLD is a beautiful dog that pants happily and curiously watches what's going on around it. Poodles are popular pets, and are known for their soft, curly coat. Poodles, like border collies, have a lot of energy and are very intelligent. That's why they need a lot of physical and mental activity such as learning tricks.

name: Bengal Cat
description: This Schleich Bengal Cat figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: The Bengal Cat from schleich® FARM WORLD looks like a mini leopard. But the coat is not the only unusual thing about this cat; it also has a unique character. The Bengal Cat is very lively and could spend all day everyday climbing and jumping around. It watches everything that's going on curiously and inquisitively. It is also one of the few cat breeds that enjoys playing with water.

name: Highland Bull
description: This Schleich Highland Bull figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription: The Highland Bull from schleich® FARM WORLD has a long, warm coat. It is so thick and wooly that even icy cold doesn't bother him. That's why he can stay outside all year round. The bulls are easy to distinguish from the cows - the horns of males are bent forward almost horizontally. The horns of females are significantly longer and curve upwards.

name: Ram
description: This Schleich Ram figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription: Boof! The Ram from schleich® FARM WORLD has two extra-large horns for ramming. He is very powerful and can protect himself from almost anyone. Annoying siblings, for example. But he only does it in an emergency. The hoofed animal doesn't really like fighting. He prefers jumping through colorful children's rooms and over mum's car with his friends. His big eyes help him to see what's behind him without turning his head. Can you do that too? Actually, you don't need to when you have him as a friend.

name: Afghan Hound
description: This Schleich Afghan Hound figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription:
Can an Afghan Hound figure be more than a toy? Sure, why not! It can be a magic carpet to carry a child to faroff dreamlands. Or an aspiring fashion star determined to chase her own destiny. The schleich® Afghan Hound figurine may look like an ordinary toy dog, but it's really a character ready to star in fabulous stories and magical tales.

schleich® farm toys for toddlers and kids introduce the endless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From little donkey foal figurines to big barns filled with horses and cows, schleich® FARM WORLD has all the animal figures and farmer figures and sets you need to let your stories run wild! For even more action and adventures, our farm toys and figures play well with schleich® unicorn toys, dinosaur toys, wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® playsets are built to last. All our toys meet the highest national and international safety standards.

name: Goldendoodle
description: This Schleich Goldendoodle figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: The name of our Goldendoodle from schleich® FARM WORLD comes from the fact that the breed is a mixture of golden retriever and poodle. This is where his typical poodle curls come from. They are perfect for petting, and also for painting. Then they're no longer so wonderfully golden but are perfect as a brush. Like all dogs, our crossbreed is color blind, so he won't hold it against you. He won't even notice it.

name: Ragdoll Cat
description: This Schleich Ragdoll Cat figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: Fear of heights? Our Ragdoll Cat from schleich® FARM WORLD doesn't have that problem. Not only is it particularly cute, it's also a skilled acrobat. Her furry tail helps her balance effortlessly on trees in FARM WORLD or muesli bowls. The silky coat of the largest cat breed is also striking. This makes it look even more elegant when it skillfully jumps from the bunk bed onto the bookshelf and then lands in your arms. Just watching it makes you dizzy!

name: Haflinger Mare
description: This Schleich Haflinger Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Haflinger breed from the Austrian mountains, featuring the characteristic chestnut coat with flaxen mane and tail.
marketingDescription: The friendly Haflinger mare trots happily across the meadow. Does she want to go for a ride today? Why else has she dressed up so finely? Doesn't she look pretty with the red bow in her white mane. I wonder if her friends have already discovered the little bow in her tail. She definitely wants to be seen, that's for sure!

name: Haflinger Foal
description: This Schleich Haflinger Foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the Haflinger breed from the Austrian mountains, featuring the characteristic chestnut coat with flaxen mane and tail. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.
marketingDescription: The Haflinger foal is prancing spiritedly across the meadow, busy discovering the world. It pricks up its ears attentively. I wonder what's going on over there at the fence? This foal is so curious; it's sure to run over to have a look. Maybe it can cadge a tasty carrot from some visitors? Who could refuse, once it starts gently muzzling with its soft brown nose.

name: Peruvian Paso Stallion
description: This Schleich Peruvian Paso Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: Watch how this proud Peruvian Paso stallion is prancing around the yard! With his thick mane and gracefully arched neck, he attracts everybody's attention. The pretty ears are pricked up attentively. Maybe he is already waiting to win all the prizes at the next show? It certainly looks like it! He can show off his special Paso Llano gait, which only Peruvian Pasos can do.

name: Peruvian Paso Mare
description: This Schleich Peruvian Paso Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: What has the pretty Peruvian Paso mare discovered over there? Attentively she pricks up her ears and stretches her neck. Even her nostrils are a bit flared - maybe she has sniffed out a crisp apple? She's about to trot off to have a look. She certainly deserves a treat with her beautifully styled mane. She even has braids in her tail.

name: Peruvian Paso Foal
description: This Schleich Peruvian Paso Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: You can see how temperamental the little foal is right away: trotting across the meadow on its long  legs, it's happily exploring the area. No wonder, it is a Peruvian Paso and has fire in its blood! Its ears are perked up and its tail is also raised in the air: time for an adventure! When there are no other foals around to play with, it likes to go and nuzzle the walkers at the fence, who always stop to admire the cute foal.

name: Selle Français Mare
description: This Schleich Selle Français Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The Selle Français mare is on the look-out for an adventure today. Maybe someone wants to ride out with her? Then she could gallop across meadows and jump over fallen trees. Or even better, she could take part in a show jumping competition! That's her favorite thing of all. With her long, strong hind legs, she easily can overcome even the highest obstacles. No wonder she's already won so many prizes!

name: Selle Français Stallion
description: This Schleich Selle Français Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: When is it finally his turn to strut his stuff? The elaborate braided hairstyle in his mane sits perfectly. The spirited Selle Français stallion is ready and hard to restrain. Show jumping is what he loves most of all! The proud stallion sets his eyes firmly on the next obstacle and takes off at an elegant trot. Victory is within reach, so nothing can stop him now.

name: Selle Français Foal
description: This Schleich Selle Français Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: Who wants to play with me? This sweet Selle Français foal has its ears pricked in a good mood and is on the lookout for playmates that are just as curious. Like its parents, it has jumping in its blood. Prancing merrily across the meadow it flicks its short tail jauntily into the air. Watch out while it takes a big leap with its powerful hind legs and jumps over a felled tree. Who wants to join in?

name: Noriker Stallion
description: This Schleich Noriker Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: With white socks on his hind legs, the otherwise pitch-black Noriker stallion looks really friendly. No wonder: These horses are known for their sweet nature. Has he won your heart over yet? Standing firm  and compact, the Noriker is not easy to upset when he's in his  paddock. And that's la good thing, because he can't afford to lose his nerve when winding up the narrow mountain trails of his home country!

name: Camarillo Mare
description: This Schleich Camarillo Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: Snow-white coat, white hooves and light pink nostrils - the Camarillo mare is a true beauty. No wonder she loves to be shown off at parades. Her immaculate coat is a true rarity. That is because all pure white Camarillos can be traced back to one small family of horses in the USA. The original stallion was called Sultan. What are you going to name this pretty mare here?

name: American Spotted Donkey
description: This Schleich American Spotted Donkey figure captures the long ears and sturdy build of this hardworking farm companion. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: With its brown spots and light coat, the spotted donkey looks really pretty and differs from its mostly gray or brown counterparts. Like them, however, the American donkey has the typical long ears. it can hear really well, especially when it is being as attentive as now, with ears pricked. It pays close attention to everything going on in the farmyard. Pretty clever, isn't it?

name: Great Dane
description: This Schleich Great Dane figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: Proud and awe-inspiring, this dog towers above all others when it raises its heavy head: The Great Dane with its beautiful black coat is huge - and everything about it is big, including its paws, ears and head. Lucky for you, this one fits snugly into your hand. That's nice, because the Great Dane is a loyal companion. It will follows its friends anywhere they go. See, even its heart is really big!

name: Abyssinian Cat
description: This Schleich Abyssinian Cat figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: With its oversized ears and light brown coat, the Abyssinian cat looks like a miniature cougar. Unlike the puma, however, the Abyssinian cat is quite sweet and gets along well with other pets. It loves to roam outside and explore its surroundings. It stalks through the neighborhood on its long legs and is sure to pop in on you along the way!

name: Valais Blacknose Sheep
description: This Schleich Valais Blacknose Sheep figure captures the woolly fleece and gentle stance of this beloved farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The Valais blacknose sheep is so gorgeous with its white wool and classic black face. It's not easily upset by anything and is happy to be on its home pasture no matter what the weather is like in the Swiss mountains. It can even withstand the coldest temperatures in winter. No wonder: who could freeze with that thick fur coat on?

name: Bull Terrier
description: This Schleich Bull Terrier figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription:
What if a tiny Bull Terrier figure was more than a toy? What if a pint-sized paw pal could turn rainy days into giggles of laughter? What if a Bull Terrier could speak "farmer-ese," or conduct an invisible orchestra? Some dogs are good at snuggles...and some, like this one, help the littlest storytellers let their imaginations run wild.

schleich® farm toys for toddlers and kids introduce the endless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From little donkey foal figurines to big barns filled with horses and cows, schleich® FARM WORLD has all the animal figures and farmer figures and sets you need to let your stories run wild! For even more action and adventures, our farm toys and figures play well with schleich® unicorn toys, dinosaur toys, wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® playsets are built to last. All our toys meet the highest national and international safety standards.

name: Jersey Cow
description: This Schleich Jersey Cow figure captures the realistic markings and sturdy build of this essential farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The Jersey Cow gives the visitors at the pasture fence a friendly look with her black eyes. She comes trotting over right away because she's very trusting. Good friends are even allowed to get close enough to stroke her yellowish coat. She loves to be patted like that. Gently she pokes at their hands with her soft muzzle: Don't stop! She's only 1.20 meters high and so much smaller than many other cattle breeds. Together, the herd loves to stand on the pasture, where they can always find lush new grass. Everyone enjoys these regular visits.

name: Old English Sheepdog
description: This Schleich Old English Sheepdog figure captures the woolly fleece and gentle stance of this beloved farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The Old English Sheepdog runs happily across the meadow. Life is just wonderful! The wind blows the dog's fur coat like a hairdryer. You can see how thick it is. The bright white on its forehead and chest blend beautifully into a light gray on its back. Come on, it barks invitingly – come and play!  The Old English Sheepdog is always up for a little game. It especially likes to romp around with children. You can trust it with the little ones, because this herding dog is used to watching over animals and people all the time.

name: Galloway Calf
description: This Schleich Galloway Calf figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.
marketingDescription: The little Galloway Calf looks a bit lost as it stretches its black snout into the air. It can't really be cold, because its thick curls keep it warm out in the pasture all year round. Maybe it is hungry?  The little Galloway Calf probably wants to drink some milk. So where is its mother, the Galloway Cow (sold separately)? She can't be far away. Surely she's grazing over there, where the grass look so lush and juicy. Still a little unsteady on its feet, the little calf stumbles over to its mother. It won't be leaving her side anytime soon!

name: Angora Goat
description: This Schleich Angora Goat figure captures the nimble build and curious expression of this agile and intelligent farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: Don't be deceived by the appearance of the Angora Goat. With its silky coat and small snout, it looks really cute. But this is one stubborn goat if it doesn't get exactly what it wants. Temperamentally, it sticks its short legs firmly into the ground, ready to take flight at any moment. But most of the time, it can be quite agreeable and gets along well with the other goats. If it does gets annoyed with another Billy goat, it will lower its head and just go for him. Best run for cover;  otherwise, you might get to know the wrong end of those long, curved horns!

name: Wire-Haired Dachshund
description: This Schleich Wire-Haired Dachshund figure is a charming hand-painted replica of a beloved pet, capturing its distinctive features.
marketingDescription: The Wire-Haired Dachshund raises its cute tousled head with its distinctive moustache. It watches your every move and knows when you are about to leave the house. Going out? It's right there with you! This little whirlwind is very lively and always up for an adventure. It gets especially excited when there is a wild animal in the forest to be sniffed out. That's when its hunting instinct kicks in. It isn't even afraid of going into deep holes. Although it has short legs, it can dig holes like a champ. Before you know it, its long little body has completely disappeared!

name: British Shorthair Cat
description: This Schleich British Shorthair Cat figure captures the grace and poise of a cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and expressive features.
marketingDescription: Got something tasty there? With wide eyes, the British Shorthair Cat looks up and fixes its eyes on the plate. Who could resist? Of course, the fluffy play figure deserves a treat. It daintily samples the food and then cleans her shimmering bluish fur thoroughly afterwards. She likes to be cozy and spends her days indoors. She isn't keen on going outside at all. She prefers to be pampered by her human and enjoys long cuddles on the couch. You can't say no to that, surely?

name: Lionhead Rabbit
description: This Schleich Lionhead Rabbit figure captures the long ears, cotton-ball tail, and alert posture. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The Lionhead Rabbit is especially popular with children, because it is quite small and friendly. It's especially happy when it finds a playmate. It loves to romp around the meadow and is always ready to learn new games. Hey, what's up? Those big, black eyes are shining with an adventurous look. Will you play with me? But it also loves a good cuddle and to have its lion's mane stroked. So fluffy!

name: Chameleon
description: This Schleich Chameleon figure showcases the independently moving eyes, curled tail, and textured skin of this extraordinary colour-changing lizard. Hand-painted with lifelike colouring and texture.
marketingDescription: The chameleon is perfectly prepared for life in trees with its clawed feet and strong curly tail. So it can cling to branches with its body without being blown down by the wind. Of course it can also camouflage itself by adapting the color of its scaly skin to the tree or rock it happens to be sitting on. But sometimes it changes color when it wants to attract attention. Can your chameleon grab your attention like that?

name: Indian Rhinoceros Baby
description: This Schleich Indian Rhinoceros Baby figure captures the armoured hide, powerful build, and distinctive horn of this prehistoric-looking herbivore. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy. This young figure captures the endearing proportions of a juvenile.
marketingDescription: The thick, scaly skin of the baby armored rhinoceros already looks a lot like its parents. But it doesn't have a horn yet. That's a good thing, actually, because otherwise it would poke its mother in the belly when it nurses. Do you think it might be hungry, the way it raises its head? No wonder: it  drinks up to 30 liters of milk a day! Maybe there's some more milk in the fridge?

name: Thomson Gazelle
description: This Schleich Thomson Gazelle figure captures the slender, elegant build and alert posture of one of the savanna's most graceful antelopes. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Is that a rustling in the bushes? The pretty Thompson gazelle carefully observes its surroundings. There might be a cheetah hiding somewhere. The gazelle isn't interested in ending up as that cat's breakfast! Unfortunately, its long, twisted horns are of little use against the cheetah. The best mode of action is to run away, dodging left and right like a pro. Or to stays put, where the grass is low and it has a good overview. Actually, the living room carpet is a pretty safe bet, too!

name: Harpy Eagle
description: This Schleich Harpy Eagle figure showcases this eagle, with its powerful talons, keen eyes, and impressive wingspan. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail.
marketingDescription: The Harpy looks impressive with its dark plumage and the striped feathers on its legs. But watch out: Its feathery crest is sticking back which should be a warning! It means that the large bird of prey is on high alert.  What do you think it has spotted? The Harpy may be about to set off on a hunt. With its powerful claws it can even kill monkeys and carry them away! But it also lets friends carry it around and will even feed from your hand!

name: Aardvark
description: This Schleich Aardvark figure is a hand-painted wildlife replica capturing the natural beauty of this species with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Aardvark is at home in the African savannah and looks more like a rabbit with its long ears, but that's where all the similarities end. Instead of carrots, it prefers to eat ants. With its long snout, it cleverly sniffs out insects living underground and digs them up in no time at all. It's especially active at night. Who will stay awake long enough to keep the Aardvark company?

name: Blue Poison Dart Frog
description: This Schleich Blue Poison Dart Frog figure showcases the smooth skin and powerful hind legs of this fascinating amphibian. Hand-painted with lifelike colouring and texture.
marketingDescription: The bright Blue Poison Dart Frog with black spots on its back is beautiful. Although it's so small, it immediately stands out with this fancy coloring. Contrary to its name, its skin is only poisonous when it eats the ants in its native rainforest in South America. If you feed it other food, you can safely take the pretty little frog in your hand. Give it a try!

name: Otter
description: This Schleich Otter figure captures the sleek body and playful expression of this intelligent aquatic mammal. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: Any moment now, the otter will jump back into the water to hunt for fresh fish. It loves fresh fish more than anything. It's such a good swimmer that it catches its prey effortlessly. The otter's thick oily pelt protects it from the cold in the water - the water simply runs off. I'm pretty sure it also wants to try out your bathtub!

name: Cheetah Baby
description: This Schleich Cheetah Baby figure captures the sleek build, black "tear marks," and spotted coat of the fastest land animal on Earth. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy. This young figure captures the endearing proportions of a juvenile.
marketingDescription: The sassy cheetah baby looks so cute with its beady little eyes and black snub nose. At birth it weighs only 300 grams, but by now it's already had some time to grow. You can tell right away that it's a cheetah baby by its typical black spots. It playfully raises a paw - I think it wants to catch something. Maybe a leaf blowing in the wind? Or has someone thrown it a ball of wool?

name: Caracal Female
description: This Schleich Caracal Female figure captures the distinctive tufted black ears and sleek reddish-gold coat of this agile wild cat. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The pretty female Caracal stalks through the steppe on her long legs. She is probably looking for food for herself and her young. She tracks down her prey quickly, because she can hear the slightest rustle in the bushes. No wonder: Her long brush ears work like fine antennae and she can feel even the slightest vibration! I wonder if she just heard something. She looks as if she's about to pounce and take out a mouse with one powerful leap.

name: Caracal Baby
description: This Schleich Caracal Baby figure captures the distinctive tufted black ears and sleek reddish-gold coat of this agile wild cat. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy. This young figure captures the endearing proportions of a juvenile.
marketingDescription: I wonder what the cute Caracal cub with sand-colored fur wants? It must be hungry. Look how cute it is, you simply have to give it something to eat! Where is the mother? She must be out hunting in the African savannah, chasing mice or other small mammals to bring home for supper. Maybe the Caracal cub could share your sandwich in the meantime?

name: Quetzalcoatlus
description: This Schleich Quetzalcoatlus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Quetzalcoatlus, one of the largest flying animals ever, with an enormous wingspan rivalling small aircraft. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: On land, the Quetzalcoatlus doesn't look very elegant. But it make up for that once it's in the air! After it has taken off, the giant pterosaur can soar silently through the sky. It only has to flap its movable wings occasionally to stay on course. It can stay up in the sky for several hours at a time just soaring. I wonder where it will eventually decide to land!

name: Tarbosaurus
description: This Schleich Tarbosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: From the powerful tip of its tail to its elongated head, the Tarbosaurus grows to be twelve meters long! This makes it one of the largest dinosaurs around. Its head hovers a lofty five meters above the ground! No wonder it has to eat so much. It loves to snatch smaller dinos for supper with its sharp teeth and flexible jaws. The Tarbosaurus runs after its prey on strong legs until it catches them, so it's best to stay on its good side!

name: Monolophosaurus
description: This Schleich Monolophosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Monolophosaurus is easy to identify by the long crest on the back of its nose, giving it a fearsome appearance. Like a dragon, spikes run from the tip of its head to the tip of its tail. I wonder if it will stay calm. This dinosaur belongs to the family of lizard-hipped dinosaurs. It is probably looking for food right now. It walks along the shore on its strong legs looking for prey. Better not disturb it!

name: Gastonia
description: This Schleich Gastonia figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Who would have guessed, the Gastonia is a herbivore and wouldn't hurt a fly, even though it looks fearsome with the large spines on its back and long tail. This dinosaur, which belongs to the avian dinosaur family (that means bird-like), only pretends to be dangerous. Instead of getting into trouble, it prefers to wander through the countryside on its sturdy legs. It's probably out looking for a lush meadow.

name: Edmontosaurus
description: This Schleich Edmontosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Edmontosaurus really is a giant at a height of 13 meters. But it's really friendly. You can see that right away. The Edmontosaurus is also rather pretty: it has a striking cockscomb on its head and a long neck. Its favorite thing to do is to take a leisurely stroll through the woods and meadows and have a nibble on the bushes there. But because it's so big, it takes ages to finish its meal of leaves and twigs. Maybe you can keep it company?

name: Gallimimus
description: This Schleich Gallimimus figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Watch out! The Gallimimus is about to run by! Yikes - it's disappeared again! The dinosaur can run so fast that you can easily lose sight of it. Maybe that's why you should keep it close. That way, you can take your time admiring this dino, which has feathers on its front legs, an elegant long neck and a thick beak, like a bird. It can't fly, but the Gallimimus doesn't need to, because it can just run away at lightning speed instead!

name: Dog kennel
description: This Schleich Dog kennel figure is a lovingly detailed replica capturing the loyal character and distinctive breed features. Hand-painted with realistic colouring.
marketingDescription: The Australian Shepherd is a very sporty, energetic dog. It loves being outside and herding sheep. The new kennel offers it protection from wind and rain. In order to keep out the cold weather, the kennel is insulated with a thick, warm layer of padding.

name: Puppy pen
description: This Schleich Puppy pen figure is a lovingly detailed replica capturing the loyal character and distinctive breed features, with the irresistible charm of a puppy. Hand-painted with realistic colouring.
marketingDescription: A Maltipoo, a Chihuahua and a Labrador Retriever play together in the puppy pen. What a wild time the three of them are having! They romp around on the cuddly blanket, compete for the teddy bear and play hide-and-seek. In between, they take a well-deserved nap in the dog basket.

name: Rabbit and guinea pig hutch
description: This Schleich Rabbit and guinea pig hutch figure captures the round body, curly tail, and expressive snout of one of the farm's most intelligent animals. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: There's plenty to discover in the rabbit and guinea pig hutch from the schleich® FARM WORLD. The animals hide in their hutch, suck at their drink bottle, nibble the lettuce or walk over the rocking toy. This also serves as a practical ramp that they can use to climb or hop onto the roof of their hutch. The fence sections can be connected in any way or combined with other schleich® fences.

name: Mobile Chicken Coop
description: This Schleich Mobile Chicken Coop figure is a hand-painted bird replica, capturing the plumage, posture, and distinctive features with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: After a restful night in the chicken coop, the rooster hops to the rooftop to welcome the morning sun. Cock-a-doodle-doo! Mother hen is the first to awaken...she's already pecking for seeds and grain. Open the roof of the Mobile Chicken Coop and peek inside...oooh, look! There are eggs in the nest! The cutest chick ever is hungry for breakfast. What will your farm animals do today?

name: Chicken Friends
description: This Schleich Chicken Friends figure is a hand-painted bird replica, capturing the plumage, posture, and distinctive features with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: When these three chicken friends from schleich® FARM WORLD are together, messes and mayhem aren't far behind. Stealing corn from the farmer's harvest? Yep, done that. Painting the sleeping rooster? You betcha! Dumping your crayons on the bathroom floor? Blame the chickens! Can you figure out which one is the biggest troublemaker?

name: ELDRADOR® Mini Creatures Shadow Lava Robot
description: This Schleich ELDRADOR® Mini Creatures Shadow Lava Robot is a collectible miniature from the popular Mini Creatures series, carefully crafted to capture distinctive features in a compact format perfect for collecting and trading.
marketingDescription: Watch out, a volcanic eruption! Oh no, my mistake. It's just our ELDRADOR® MINI CREATURES Shadow Lava Robot from schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES. Your orange friend loves to go for walks in nature with you. But when his home, Lava World, is crushed, even he gets in a bad mood. But who can blame him if he uses his red-hot lava axe to stand his ground in battle. When the time comes, you'd better get all your stuffed animals and other flammable toys to safety as soon as possible. With its weapon, the lava robot can effortlessly cut through ice or set entire jungle forests on fire. So better keep a glass of water next to your bed. And always be ready to cry: "Fire!"

name: Robot Shadow Ice
description: This Schleich Robot Shadow Ice figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: ELDRADOR® Mini Creatures Shadow Stone Robot
description: This Schleich ELDRADOR® Mini Creatures Shadow Stone Robot is a collectible miniature from the popular Mini Creatures series, carefully crafted to capture distinctive features in a compact format perfect for collecting and trading.
marketingDescription: Stoooone headed your way! When the Shadow Stone Lord sits down in the Stone Robot's command center of the ELDRADOR® MINI CREATURES, from schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES, the tough duo goes into battle to save the Stone World. It's a bit like when a rider gets on a horse and gallops off. Unlike the horse, however, the Stone Robot has a gigantic hammer, which it skillfully uses against its enemies. They mostly come from the Ice World, Jungle World or Lava World. There is still no clear winner. That's probably also because everyone is quite enjoying the battle, but no one would admit it... a bit like when you fight with your brothers or sisters.

name: Robot Shadow Jungle
description: This Schleich Robot Shadow Jungle figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Watch out, that hurts! The ELDRADOR® MINI CREATURES Shadow Jungle Robot from schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES not only has a green thumb, but the rest of him is also completely green. Everywhere the expert gardener steps, green grass grows behind him... 3, 2, 1 tadaaa: green grass. With his nifty razor-sharp thorny sword, he regularly clears the jungle world of pesky vines, fallen tree trunks and knotted shoelaces. But when the jungle lord sits down in the robot's command center, enemies from the other worlds are probably not far away. The two plant friends, of course, want to make sure that the lush green jungle landscape keeps growing in ELDRADOR®. They are true green heroes!

name: Gorilla Family
description: This Schleich Gorilla Family figure captures the powerful build and thoughtful expression of the largest living primate. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Leaning forward on her arms, the gorilla mom stands by her little ones and watches carefully to make sure they are safe. One of the baby gorillas is probably still a bit tired. It sits on the ground gazing around sleepily. Maybe it's time for a little nap. Its sibling is much more active: trying to stand, crawling on all fours through the jungle and even climbing onto its mother's back. There are so many different games to play with this lifelike lowland gorilla family. Maybe the cute babies will grow up to be big gorillas in your playroom someday?

name: Moose Cow with Calf
description: This Schleich Moose Cow with Calf figure depicts a charming young animal with the realistic markings and sturdy build of this essential farm animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.

name: Horse Obstacle Course Accessories
description: This Schleich Horse Obstacle Course Accessories figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: Training is fun, but winning at the show jump is even better! With the obstacles from the HORSE CLUB by schleich® you can do both. For optimal training, the height of the obstacles can be changed gradually. This way, you can introduce the horses to jumping gradually, depending on their ability, and improve their technique bit by bit. When they are ready, it's off to the real show. There's even a ditch and a hedge with a water basin in front of it. It's a good thing you trained so well beforehand!

name: Horse Transporter Accessories
description: This Schleich Horse Transporter Accessories figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: A well-maintained saddle is so important! Not only does it ensure a perfect seat when you're riding. It also keep its shape so that it doesn't hurt the horse's back. The is the same with the bridle. How lucky that there are suitable accessories for exactly that! The horse blanket and saddle find optimal space on the saddle stand. The bridle can also be neatly hung up here and there is even space for the riding hat. Keep everything together, and it's the perfect complement to the separately available horse transporter from schleich® HORSE CLUB.

name: Horse Transporter
description: This Schleich Horse Transporter figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: Wow, this horse transporter really has what it takes! Lisa has everything on board to travel to the next tournament with her family and as many as four horses. They have such a great time on their way there. During the journey the horses are safe and sound in their boxes. Once they've arrived, Lisa sets up the transportable paddock with fencing. She even has obstacles with her so that they can practice for the upcoming tournament. Lisa never gets bored of coming up with new exercises. And the parents? They get to relax in the rooftop pool.

name: Moose Family
description: This Schleich Moose Family figure captures the towering proportions and impressive palmate antlers of the largest member of the deer family. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The stately moose cow cares lovingly for her little calf. She suckles it several times a day. To keep her strength up, the mom needs to eat plenty of fresh grass. In search of a lush meadow, she stretches her long muzzle into the air and sniffs. When she gets the scent of some juicy grass, she strides off with big steps ahead through the forest with her calf following behind.

name: Granite Wolf
description: This Schleich Granite Wolf figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Granite Wolf creeps through the night like a dangerous shadow. Its green eyes shimmer ominously. It's on the lookout for easy prey it can seize with its sharp fangs. If you look closely, in the distance you will spot the green glow of its poisonous back crystals just in time. Then it's a case of running away as quickly as possible, because the Granite Wolf is no fool.

name: Shadow Raptor
description: This Schleich Shadow Raptor figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Respect! The Shadow Raptor didn't become the most feared primeval monster in Eldrador by being nice. With its sharp teeth and pointed claws, it knows how to defend itself. The nasty scars on his back, which shine from afar, are living proof. They are battle scars from his opponents, but he always came out victorious. It might be a good idea to be the Shadow Raptor's friend rather than its enemy!

name: Swamp Monster
description: This Schleich Swamp Monster figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Watch out! The Swamp Monster is lurking in the swamp and you can see immediately it’s not here to make friends. It has a pretty large mouth. I wonder what will get caught between those  long fangs next! It may well end badly… But the Swamp Monster also has a spiked tail to defend itself. One blow from it can easily knock out any opponent. And the cleverest thing about the Swamp Monster is its ability to blend into the background, as it is perfectly camouflaged with its green scales. There are even lianas on its back, making it even harder to spot. If you are not careful, it will jump out and surprise you in the swamp. One snap and you’re dinner, so watch out!

name: Magma Lizard
description: This Schleich Magma Lizard figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Its yellow eyes look mean and know no mercy. Although the Magma Lizard looks like a fiery creature, it actually has a heart of ice. Anyone who dares to disturbs it is greeted with a sinister snort from its powerful snout. If that's not enough, it opens and closes his jaws in warning. You can even see its thick, yellow tongue. No one wants to get too close to the Magma Lizard. That would be much too dangerous. You might burn your fingers on the transparent fin of flames on its back!

name: Battle Rhino
description: This Schleich Battle Rhino figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Battle Rhino stomps through Eldrador with its ten-ton body. It doesn't look like it as much of a sense of humor, either. Small eyes narrowed, this fighter has a mean glint in its eye. It knows exactly if you are planning to challenge it and will not hesitate to attack. The Battle Rhino looks like a rock that isn't going anywhere fast. But that impression is misleading! When it gets really angry, it can turbo-charge, taking a run-up and threatening its opponent with its dangerous, transparent horn.

name: Shadow Stone Monster
description: This Schleich Shadow Stone Monster figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: You'd probably rather not meet the Shadow Stone Monster in person! As a Stone Monster it was already pretty scary. But then it fell in battle with a stronger opponent. Now it has mutated into the Shadow Stone Monster and is more frightening than ever! On huge feet, it stomps through the terrain and waves its claws in the air. No grass or flowers will grow on earth that it thumps with its fist. The Shadow Stone Monster throws sharp, transparent crystals at its enemies. If that doesn't make you run for your life, it will scare you with a bloodcurdling scream from its huge gaping mouth. Let's get out of here!

name: Isabelle on Dolphin
description: This Schleich Isabelle on Dolphin figure captures this dolphin, showcasing the sleek, streamlined body and intelligent expression of one of the ocean's most beloved creatures. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The mermaid princess Isabelle spends her days exploring shadow-y shipwrecks and discovering treasures in the ocean's depths. She lives in an underwater castle and talks to dolphins and seahorses. But mermaid life isn't entirely magical...her sister Gabrielle still gets on her nerves sometimes. Can't she find somewhere else in the ocean to swim?

name: Elementa Fire Unicorn Stallion
description: This Schleich Elementa Fire Unicorn Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: In a fast gallop, the proud Elementa Fire Unicorn stallion runs through the wide meadows of BAYALAS®. The red and gold glittering hooves drum against the floor so loudly that you can hear it from afar. The transparent mane and the stallion’s long reddish tail flicker like flames at this fast pace in the wind, and even a storm can’t put it out. Where do you think he's going so fast?

name: Elementa Water Unicorn Mare
description: This Schleich Elementa Water Unicorn Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The Elementa Water Unicorn mare has beautiful, dark eyes and looks at you in a kind and friendly way as she starts to trot gracefully away. Where is she going? The pretty horn on her forehead peeks out from behind the dense fringe. A small starfish keeps the mane from getting in her eyes. Lots of glitter and a few shimmering lumps of foam have gotten caught up in her luscious blue mane.  Did she gallop straight out of the sea? Her beautiful tail is certainly as lush as a thundering waterfall.

name: Elementa Water Flames Unicorn Foal
description: This Schleich Elementa Water Flames Unicorn Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: Like blazing firewater? The mane of the Elementa Water Flame Unicorn foal looks exactly like that: Blue like the ocean and sparkling like the waves, the mane also curls like flickering flames. It is obvious who the parents of the Elementa Water Flame Unicorn foal are: Coat, mane and tail are as blue and glittery as the mother’s, the Elementa Water Unicorn mare. But its flickering mane looks just like its father’s, the Elementa Fire Unicorn stallion. The foal dances boldly over the meadow. Who did it inherit its personality from?

name: Pink Sapphire Turtle
description: This Schleich Pink Sapphire Turtle figure captures this sea turtle, with its streamlined shell and powerful flippers for graceful ocean navigation. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: You can spot the crystal turtle's friendly nature right away. Or would those gorgeous big eyes with the silky, long eyelashes lie? It can swim skillfully through the sea and glide through the waves in Meamare. When it comes ashore, the sparkling rhinestones really stand out on its body. So pretty!

name: Phoenix
description: This Schleich Phoenix figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The magnificent Phoenix majestically spreads its wings. Is it about to take into the skies? From up there, it has all of BAYALA® in its sights. Nothing escapes its large, dark eyes. The awe-inspiring silhouette can be seen from near and far as it circles in the sky. Its plumage is such a bright yellow that it competes with the sun, and the tips of its primary feathers have a reddish tinge. Landing, it fans out the magnificent tail feathers and looks around inquisitively with a friendly gaze. Where are its playmates?

name: Llama Unicorn Foal
description: This Schleich Llama Unicorn Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The sweet Llama unicorn foal is lucky because it was born in BAYALA®. It can wander over the multi-colored flower meadows with its mother and other magical animals and go on exciting adventures in the beautiful world of BAYALA®. It loves to proudly show the glitter blossoms in its hair. Aren’t they beautiful? Glitter is even all over the hooves, coat and legs. Where has the Llama Unicorn foal been jumping around this time? The glitter looks so adorable!

name: Night Sky Dragon
description: This Schleich Night Sky Dragon figure is an intricately detailed dragon with powerful wings, sharp claws, and formidable features. Hand-painted to bring the mystery of dragonkind to life.
marketingDescription: The Night Sky Dragon looks quite impressive with the golden star on his forehead, his dark purple scale armor and his bright, transparent wings. Its tail is adorned with golden curls that flicker like flames. But if you look at the night sky dragon's face, you want to be its friend. Adventurously, he stretches his short snout into the air. Who wants to climb onto his magnetic back and mount the golden saddle? Go ahead: Then it goes high into the air. Yippee, what an adventure!

name: Fairy in Flight on Glam-Owl
description: This Schleich Fairy in Flight on Glam-Owl figure is a delicate, enchanting being from the bayala® fantasy world, hand-painted to capture woodland magic and wonder.
marketingDescription: Dreams are brought to life in the skies over BAYALA®! Soaring among the clouds on the wings of her owl friend, the fairy spots the Sunshine Elves in the meadows far below. This 2-piece set features a shimmering fairy figurine and a richly detailed owl toy with a built-in magnet to stay together in flight.This fairy and her glamourous owl friend are recommended for children ages 5 and up. A built-in magnet ensures these two friends stay close together as they swoop and soar above BAYALA®. The owl toy's movable wings feature intricate detail and an 11" wingspan for swift transport through limitless storyscapes. The Fairy in Flight toy is a part of schleich®'s BAYALA® collection of fairies, mermaids, unicorns and other enchanted creatures. The enchanted figurines and playsets of schleich® BAYALA® introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From majestic owls and woodland elves to glittering flower houses and unicorn stables, schleich® BAYALA® lets your stories run wild. Mythical creature figurines twinkle in rich detail, while authentic playsets enrich every tale! Our fairy toy figurines love to be whisked away into stories featuring schleich® dinosaur toys, wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® mythical creature toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and enchanted kingdom safety standards.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex, red
description: This Schleich Tyrannosaurus Rex, red figure is a meticulously detailed replica of the fearsome T. rex, capturing the powerful jaws and menacing stance of one of the largest land predators that ever lived. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: Although the Tyrannosaurus Rex looked quite threatening, it could hardly use its front legs armed with just two claws since they did not even reach his mouth. Nearly seven metres tall and thirteen metres long, the Tyrannosaurus Rex was probably not a very skilled hunter, but rather a scavenger which probably fed on the leavings of other animals. It had more than fifty teeth measuring more than 15 centimetres in length which it used not for chewing but rather for tearing, since it swallowed its food in large chunks. To improve depth-perception when searching for food, the eyes of the Tyrannosaurus Rex were oriented toward the front such that the fields of vision of both eyes overlapped.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex Blue
description: This Schleich Tyrannosaurus Rex Blue figure is a meticulously detailed replica of the fearsome T. rex, capturing the powerful jaws and menacing stance of one of the largest land predators that ever lived. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The king of the dinosaurs was once one of the largest land predators. It could grow to be up to thirteen meters in length and seven meters high. Given its size and mass, the T-Rex was probably not a hunter, but more likely a scavenger. It is presumed that the T-Rex had an exceptional sense of smell, with which it could detect carrion from a great distance.

name: 5-Piece Horse Collector Bundle
description: This Schleich 5-Piece Horse Collector Bundle figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.

name: Stork
description: This Schleich Stork figure showcases this stork, with its impressive size, long legs, and distinctive bill. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail.
marketingDescription: What is the first thing you notice about our Stork from schleich® FARM WORLD? Exactly! Its long, red beak. Our white stork particularly likes to use this to poke around for insects, worms or frogs in the water. The black and white feathered bird really enjoys them. That and dancing on pillows. To be able to walk through swampy areas, the bird also has particularly long legs. They are also useful for karate. It's an unusual hobby for a bird, isn't it? He once karate chopped a pencil with his long legs. Then realized that he actually needed it to do his homework. Oops.

name: Belgian Draft Horse
description: This Schleich Belgian Draft Horse figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription:
Imagine you're riding through snow-covered woods in a horse-drawn carriage. A woolen blanket is tucked around you for warmth. All is quiet except the jingling sleigh bells of the draft horse as snowflakes fall gently on you. The horse pulling your sleigh is the biggest horse you've ever seen, a Belgian Draft Horse. And tucked in your coat pocket is a picture-perfect replica, a toy Belgian horse from schleich®.

schleich® farm toys for toddlers and kids introduce the endless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From little donkey foal figurines to big barns filled with horses and cows, schleich® FARM WORLD has all the animal figures and farmer figures and sets you need to let your stories run wild! For even more action and adventures, our farm toys and figures play well with schleich® unicorn toys, dinosaur toys, wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® playsets are built to last. All our toys meet the highest national and international safety standards.

name: Icelandic Pony Mare
description: This Schleich Icelandic Pony Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Icelandic horse, a breed developed over a thousand years in isolation, capturing the sturdy build and distinctive character of these sure-footed horses.
marketingDescription:
On a mist-shrouded island far to the north, a small horse braves a harsh, wintery climate and treacherous terrain. Her thick coat and mane are flecked with snow. She looks to the skies and sees the Northern Lights, dancing like fairies among the stars. Something in those auroras calls to her...a mystery, perhaps? What ancient story is waiting to be told in this land of fire and ice?

schleich® HORSE CLUB playsets and figurines introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. Featuring dozens of toy horses, riders and accessories, schleich® HORSE CLUB lets your adventure stories run wild. Horse figurines canter in rich detail, while authentic playsets provide an always expanding setting for the adventures of Hannah, Sofia, Lisa and Sarah! Our horse and rider figurines love to be whisked away into stories featuring other schleich® play worlds, from the grasses of the savanna to the majestic pines of the forest! schleich® toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national and international safety standards.

name: Icelandic Pony Stallion
description: This Schleich Icelandic Pony Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Icelandic horse, a breed developed over a thousand years in isolation, capturing the sturdy build and distinctive character of these sure-footed horses.
marketingDescription: If you hear "Only one more minute!" then our Icelandic Pony Stallion from schleich® HORSE CLUB doesn't want to sleep any longer. Instead, he wants to spend hours in the bathroom admiring his mane. However, he is not only known for his stylish look, but also for his lively and gentle nature. This is probably because he has no natural enemies in his Iceland homeland. Not even the loudest thunder disturbs his peace. So you can plan exciting rides even when the weather forecast predicts summer thunderstorms. The only thing that the brave Stallion finds unnerving is the strange whistling of the schleich® Tapirs. Do you agree?

name: Trakehner Foal
description: This Schleich Trakehner Foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the Trakehner warmblood from East Prussia, showcasing the refined elegance and athletic ability of this distinguished sport horse breed. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.
marketingDescription:
Determined. Stately. Regal. The distinctive characteristics of a Trakehner make the breed a popular choice among HORSE CLUB collectors. The Trakehner foal figurine display every bit of the poise and dignity that define this graceful breed.

name: Oldenburger Mare
description: This Schleich Oldenburger Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription:
Nothing compares to the bond between a rider and her horse. You'll fall in love with this detailed Oldenburg mare figurine, a favorite with HORSE CLUB fans. She may even look just like your horse!

schleich® HORSE CLUB playsets and figurines introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. name: Oldenburger Stallion
description: This Schleich Oldenburger Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription:
First, the good news: You've captured a stolen treasure. Now the bad news: An angry crew of pirates is chasing you. Fortunately, your swift Oldenburger Stallion will carry you away and as you gallop away into legend, fame, and fortune.

A great new character to add to your HORSE CLUB cast, the Oldenburger Stallion figurine is beautifully hand-painted featuring Schliech's renowned accuracy and attention to detail. Suitable for all ages, this figurine looks great on a shelf-but you won't want to keep it there.

schleich® HORSE CLUB playsets and figurines introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. name: Oldenburger Foal
description: This Schleich Oldenburger Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: You can see from the leg length of our Oldenburg Foal from schleich® HORSE CLUB that it will grow up to be a big horse. The young horse has almost fully grown legs at a young age. This makes it easier to buy shoes. Both this and the calm, Nordic nature mean that the horse breed is particularly suitable for beginner riders. But professionals can also handle big obstacles. From low jumping obstacles like microwaves, to large ones like rain barrels outside in the garden, our horse can master anything from day 1. Maybe at some point it will jump so high that the foal's tail touches the clouds. Have you tried it yet?

name: Criollo Definitivo Mare
description: This Schleich Criollo Definitivo Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription:
When you love wide-open spaces and riding outdoors, the Criollo is an ideal companion. She's strong and curious...a horse you can trust while exploring long dusty roads and wind-swept fields. So saddle up your schleich® Criollo mare toy figurine...a lifetime of adventures and memories awaits!

name: Criollo Definitivo Foal
description: This Schleich Criollo Definitivo Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription:
The herd is welcoming a new member today...ooooh, look! It's an adorable Criollo foal! Do you think she loves to run? What's it like living in Patagonia? Does she like apples? We're so excited to welcome her...we've never met a Criollo foal before!

name: Flamingo
description: This Schleich Flamingo figure showcases the Flamingo, with its iconic pink plumage, curved neck, and distinctive one-legged stance. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail.
marketingDescription: Pink? Purple? No, definitely pink! That's what color of the Flamingo from schleich® WILD LIFE. At first, before it is fully grown, the feathers are still gray. Then they turn this chewing gum pink from the shrimp that it loves eating. Preferably for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Even with a full belly, our exotic wild bird can fly well as long as it has a good run-up. It can also balance incredibly well on one leg. No gym lessons required! All the other birds always want to be photographed with it. What about you?

name: Tapir
description: This hand-painted Schleich Tapir figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2022, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription:
Tapirs eat as much as 75 pounds of fruit, berries, and leaves a day, so be sure to stock your refrigerator with lots of fresh produce. This one has a HUUUUUUGE appetite! In fact, this tapir likes foraging in the pantry after you go to sleep, and might even eat the veggies off your dinner plate if you don't pay attention. It's a true story...on of a million gazillion true stories our little tapir will star in once you bring it home. 

schleich® wild animal figurines for toddlers and kids introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play.  From realistic ocean and jungle animal figurines to our popular playsets, schleich® WILD LIFE lets your stories run wild. Authentic wild creature figurines toys prowl, swim, and soar with rich, accurate detail and texture, while our full-featured wild life playsets bring learning to life. Our wild animal toys love cross into new play worlds to create stories with schleich® enchanted creature toys, farm animal figurines and dinosaur toys! schleich® wild animal toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national and international safety standards.

name: Tapir Baby
description: This hand-painted Schleich Tapir Baby figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2022, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: What fruit do you think of when you see our Tapir Baby from schleich® WILD LIFE? That's right! Its stripes and spots look a little like a watermelon. The fun pattern fades as it grows up. As it grows, the little greedy guts puts on a lot of weight. As an adult, your little trunked friend weighs almost as much as a horse. Wow. That's heavy. But it can also be very useful. It can simply lean against trees to knock them over. Then the Tapir calf can get to the most delicious fruits at the very top. A truly impressive animal! Until then, however, it prefers leaning on your schoolbag. Not to knock it over, but simply because it's cozy.

name: Slow Loris
description: This hand-painted Schleich Slow Loris figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2022, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Slow what? Very few people know the name of our Slow Loris from schleich® WILD LIFE. Hardly anyone has ever seen one. The clever primate is usually awake at night. Its big eyes help it see everything well, even in the dark. Like a real secret agent. This allows it to effortlessly balance on the highest branches at night without losing track of where it is. And when it grabs a villain, the little primate uses its poison! It's hidden the crook of their arm. All of this makes it the best secret agent in the rainforest, don't you agree?

name: Cougar
description: This Schleich Cougar figure is a hand-painted woodland creature replica with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Cougars can't roar, but they can purr, meow, and whine about doing chores. Cougars in the wild can leap 40 feet - that's longer than 90 schleich® cougar figurines lined up end to end!schleich® wild animal figurines for toddlers and kids introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play.  From realistic ocean and jungle animal figurines to our popular playsets, schleich® WILD LIFE lets your stories run wild. name: Iguana
description: This Schleich Iguana figure showcases the spiny crest, scaly skin, and muscular build of this impressive tropical lizard. Hand-painted with lifelike colouring and texture.
marketingDescription: WWUUAAAARRR! Although the Iguana from schleich® WILD LIFE is smaller than its reptile relatives, it is still a tough little lizard. Flaky skin protects it from sharp teeth and UV light. So it doesn't need to be afraid of little enemies or sunscreen. Our little crawler also has a tail that can be almost twice as long as the rest of its body. Perfect for defense or drawing pictures in the sand. With its magnificent head, our brave Iguana not only nods in time with the beat at concerts, but also communicates with other iguanas. This can sometimes lead to dance-talk misunderstandings.

name: Beaver
description: This Schleich Beaver figure captures the flat tail, dense fur, and strong teeth of nature's most accomplished engineer. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.

name: Mandrill
description: This Schleich Mandrill figure captures the vivid blue-and-red facial colouring of the world's largest and most colourful monkey. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription:
What if a miniature Mandrill figurine were more than a toy? What if a monkey could turn a slowly ticking clock into the sounds of a jungle at night? What if a Mandrill could speak a secret language only a child can understand? Some monkeys are good at swinging from vines...and some, like this one, help the littlest storytellers let their imaginations run wild.

name: Emperor Scorpion
description: This hand-painted Schleich Emperor Scorpion figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2022, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Attention, poisonous sting! It's a big one. Our Emperor Scorpion from schleich® WILD LIFE is one of the largest scorpions in the world. It is most often found in tropical African forests, in underground caves or under large rocks. The giant insect looks dangerous, but actually isn't at all. In fact, the arachnid is known for its calm nature. The dark scorpion likes playing with you on a quiet, freshly mown lawn. And drinking delicious juice - preferably orange. This scorpion also prefers to use its armor for decoration instead of protection as you enjoy the sunshine together. It shimmers beautifully in the light. Do you see it?

name: Amargasaurus
description: This Schleich Amargasaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription:
Imagine you're a scientist researching deep in the jungles of prehistoric Argentina. You and your fellow scientists spy a long-necked dinosaur with two rows of spikes along the sauropod's spine. What on earth are those spikes? You and your fellow dino researchers are baffled. Can you come up with a theory? Your answer could shape the story of Amargasaurus for all of eternity. 

schleich® dinosaur toys introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From fierce Velociraptor figurines and the popular brachiosaurus toy to our popular Large Dino Research Station, schleich® DINOSAURS let your stories run wild. Authentic dinosaur toys prowl with rich, accurate detail and texture, while full-featured dinosaur playsets bring action and learning to life. Our dino toy figurines love to crawl, fly and swim their way into stories featuring schleich® mythical creature toys, farm animal figurines and toy wild animals! schleich® dinosaur toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and prehistoric safety standards.

name: Parasaurolophus
description: This Schleich Parasaurolophus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Parasaurolophus, with its distinctive long curved hollow crest used for producing deep resonating calls. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription:
The prehistoric Parasaurolophus could walk on either two legs or four...although this one prefers to ride a skateboard. If you're looking for a dinosaur gift, this hard-headed herbivore is a strong contender.

schleich® dinosaur toys introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From fierce Velociraptor figurines and the popular brachiosaurus toy to our popular Large Dino Research Station, schleich® DINOSAURS let your stories run wild. Authentic dinosaur toys prowl with rich, accurate detail and texture, while full-featured dinosaur playsets bring action and learning to life. Our dino toy figurines love to crawl, fly and swim their way into stories featuring schleich® mythical creature toys, farm animal figurines and toy wild animals! schleich® dinosaur toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and prehistoric safety standards.

name: Nothosaurus
description: This Schleich Nothosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The prehistoric seal - that's what the other animals in the toy box call our Nothosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS. With its wide, fan-like legs, the dinosaur was able to dive deep in the water, but also glide elegantly over the dunes on land. Its long, thin neck is perfect for rooting around ocean corals for small fish and in your sock drawer for matching pairs. You get the socks and it will eat the fish - preferably for breakfast, lunch and dinner. This dinosaur is a true connoisseur, and coats them with breadcrumbs. Following an old recipe from 240 million years ago. Would you like to try it?

name: Majungasaurus
description: This Schleich Majungasaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Our Majungasaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS is one of the slowest dinosaurs in a sprint, but is still a huge fan of racecars. The lack of speed is because it is a very strong dinosaur, but doesn't have the right legs for its height. It also brings quite a lot to the scales - when grown up, your prehistoric friend weighs as much as two elephants. That and its length of just under eight meters means that it usually brings up the rear in the monthly dinosaur toy race. On the other hand, it's incredibly fast at mental arithmetic. It usually has its homework done before the math book is even opened. This means it can head off to lunch a few minutes before the others and isn't the last to arrive when they're serving its favorite food.

name: Styracosaurus
description: This Schleich Styracosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription:
Direct hit! Our Styracosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS loves playing ring toss. With a large horn on its nose, the dinosaur is great at catching rings and does a happy dance every time it catches one. Its mouth is also slightly different than you might expect. The beak-like shape helps it pick the juiciest leaves and strong jaws let it eat even the hard, most fibrous plants.

The prehistoric giant usually uses its large neck shield as protection or as a canvas for its dinosaur toy friends. Everyone can paint with washable water colors here. But only if you help it wash off in the sink afterwards.

name: Shadow Wolf
description: This Schleich Shadow Wolf figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Legend in the realms of Lava and Ice, Jungle and Stone tells of a hidden world in ELDRADOR®...a world where phantoms lurk in darkness, waiting...a Shadow World. As the battle of ELDRADOR® Creatures rages, a dark and menacing figure prowls the icy terrain. Transformed by defeat in battle, the Snow Wolf takes new form as a Shadow Wolf, its face frozen in a fearsome scowl. A haunting new story is beginning in ELDRADOR®!

name: Shadow Lion
description: This Schleich Shadow Lion figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
