marketingDescription: In the darkest dark of night, when the icy wind cuts like a jagged stone, the sound thunders in your ear…it's your heart racing, alerting you to unseen danger. Your sense tell you all you need to know: The Shadow Lion is nearby.

name: Koala Mother and Baby
description: This Schleich Koala Mother and Baby figure captures the fluffy ears, button nose, and tree-clinging posture of Australia's most beloved marsupial. Hand-painted with lifelike detail. This young figure is especially endearing.
marketingDescription: The Koala Mother and her baby from schleich® WILD LIFE love a good breakfast of eucalyptus together. Eu-ca-lyp-tus...say that 10 times fast without getting tongue-tied! After breakfast, the little joey hangs on tight onto his momma's back as she carries him up into the trees.

name: Horse Shop
description: This Schleich Horse Shop figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: Ding-dong! Customers are arriving at the schleich® HORSE CLUB riding store. What special treat will you pick up for your horse? Horse feed, saddles, brushes...this tack store has everything! There's even a friendly dog to help you find what you need. Load up your pack, then it's time to head back to the stables...sorry, you can't escape your stable chores by shopping all day.

name: Horse Stall Extension
description: This Schleich Horse Stall Extension figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: After a busy day of riding and jumping, your English Thoroughbred, Moonlight, is ready to rest and unwind. The cozy horse stall is calling! A nibble of hay and a gulp of water and your stallion is feeling muuuuuch better. All that's missing is a cozy blanket and some quiet music.

name: Ice Tiger
description: This Schleich Ice Tiger figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Frozen for centuries beneath the snow, the Ice Tiger stalks ELDRADOR® with the steely gaze of a predator. The Ice Tiger's powerful figure casts a chill across the land. Suitable for kids ages 7 and up - ELDRADOR® CREATURES, beware!In a world of Lava Dragons and Ice Giants, of Stone Monsters and Shadow Panthers, schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES is erupting with characters that let your stories run wild. Invite adventure with our rich-in-detail figurines and world-expanding playsets. Every battle-ready brute in the realm of ELDRADOR® CREATURES meets rigorous national and international safety standards. Ignite limitless storytelling with schleich®!

name: Lava Tiger
description: This Schleich Lava Tiger figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Born in the fiery pits of the Lava World, a ferocious new predator stalks ELDRADOR® with a burning intensity. Beware  the Lava Tiger! With its searing gaze and a red-hot temper, the Lava Tiger is ready to claw its way into the play stories of children ages 7 and up.In a world of Lava Dragons and Ice Giants, of Stone Monsters and Shadow Panthers, schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES is erupting with characters that let your stories run wild. Invite adventure with our rich-in-detail figurines and world-expanding playsets. Every battle-ready brute in the realm of ELDRADOR® CREATURES meets rigorous national and international safety standards. Ignite limitless storytelling with schleich®!

name: Stone Dragon
description: This Schleich Stone Dragon figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription:
The ground shakes. The air rumbles. Is it an earthqake? A clap of thunder? This is no storm: A mighty Stone Dragon is rampaging right toward you. Are you a goner, dinner for a starving dragon...or is he running away from an adorable llamacorn? Only you can decide where the story goes next...adventure awaits!

In a world of Lava Dragons and Ice Giants, of Stone Monsters and Shadow Panthers, schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES is erupting with characters that let your stories run wild. Invite adventure with our rich-in-detail figurines and world-expanding playsets. Every battle-ready brute in the realm of ELDRADOR® CREATURES meets rigorous national and international safety standards. Ignite limitless storytelling with schleich®!

name: Shadow Dragon
description: This Schleich Shadow Dragon figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The first sign of danger in ELDRADOR® isn't a shriek or the roar of battle. It's the dark...when the sunlight vanishes in mid-day and the air grows still. In that eerie quiet, terror takes shape in the shadows. Black of night arcs across the sky, the haunting silhouette of an awakened legend: the Shadow Dragon.

name: Aryon on Unicorn
description: This Schleich Aryon on Unicorn figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: Aryon and his brave Unicorn share a love for the ocean and for all things blue. Together with his magical unicorn friend, Aryon explores the depths of the oceans...and your dark, mysterious toybox. What treasures will they find beneath the sea? Take the plunge and invite this merman and unicorn to join your toy collection.

name: Isabelle on Dolphin
description: This Schleich Isabelle on Dolphin figure captures this dolphin, showcasing the sleek, streamlined body and intelligent expression of one of the ocean's most beloved creatures. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The mermaid princess Isabelle spends her days exploring shadow-y shipwrecks and discovering treasures in the ocean's depths. She lives in an underwater castle and talks to dolphins and seahorses. But mermaid life isn't entirely magical...her sister Gabrielle still gets on her nerves sometimes. Can't she find somewhere else in the ocean to swim?

name: Sunrise Pegasus
description: This Schleich Sunrise Pegasus figure depicts the legendary winged horse with magnificent feathered wings. Hand-painted to capture the majesty and freedom of this mythological creature.
marketingDescription: As the morning sun tipoes through your window, soft sunlight twinkles off the pink and silver wings of the Sunrise Pegasus. You yawn and roll over, still sleepy. The pegasus spreads its wings and sunlight splashes against your bedroom walls, speckling them with bright, warm light. Wake up, sleepyhead!

name: Sunrise Pegasus Foal
description: This Schleich Sunrise Pegasus Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: Imagine you're watching the morning sun peek above the horizon. First, a hint of pink tickles the clouds. Next, a soft yellow glow warms the sky. Twinkles of light dance off the dew drops. Is this colorful symphony the morning sun, or just the Sunrise Pegasus Foal stretching its wings?

name: Marshmallow Unicorn Stallion
description: This Schleich Marshmallow Unicorn Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription:
The forests of BAYALA® are bursting with sweetness since the Marshmallow Unicorns arrived. Flowers have blossomed into sweet, fluffy marshmallow bites...colorful clouds rain miniature marshmallows...there's even a hot cocoa waterfall spilling out of the hills. These sugar-y unicorns have left their delicious hoofprint throughout BAYALA®!

The enchanted figurines and playsets of schleich® BAYALA® introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From majestic owls and woodland elves to glittering flower houses and unicorn stables, schleich® BAYALA® lets your stories run wild. Mythical creature figurines twinkle in rich detail, while authentic playsets enrich every tale! Our fairy toy figurines love to be whisked away into stories featuring schleich® dinosaur toys, wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® mythical creature toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and enchanted kingdom safety standards.

name: Marshmallow Unicorn Mare
description: This Schleich Marshmallow Unicorn Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: Close your eyes and picture a marshmallow…can you feel the gooey treat making your fingers sticky? Can you feel the pillow-y softness on your tongue? That's the powerful magic of the Marshmallow Unicorn Mare! Blink your eyes open and catch a glimpse of this enchantingly sweet unicorn as she prances over the hillsides of BAYALA®!

name: Marshmallow Unicorn Foal
description: This Schleich Marshmallow Unicorn Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: Where do the charming colors of the Marshmallow Unicorn Foal's come from? It's a mystery the residents of BAYALA® have yet to unravel. One thing's for sure: The swirling colors of this "mini marshmallow" unicorn are magical.

name: Rainbow Love Unicorn Stallion
description: This Schleich Rainbow Love Unicorn Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription:
Imagine a rainbow-haired unicorn in your hand, galloping through a field of wildflowers. But, oh no! The flowers are missing their colors! Can you help the unicorn sprinkle rainbow love on the flowers to bring back their colors? With the Rainbow Love Unicorn toys from schleich®, the story possibilities are endless. What magical stories will you and your rainbow unicorns tell next?

The enchanted figurines and playsets of schleich® BAYALA® introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From majestic owls and woodland elves to glittering flower houses and unicorn stables, schleich® BAYALA® lets your stories run wild. Mythical creature figurines twinkle in rich detail, while authentic playsets enrich every tale! Our fairy toy figurines love to be whisked away into stories featuring schleich® dinosaur toys, wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® mythical creature toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and enchanted kingdom safety standards.

name: Rainbow Love Unicorn Mare
description: This Schleich Rainbow Love Unicorn Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: Picture yourself sliding down a rainbow on a shimmering white, glittery unicorn. Colors are splashing in all directions as you slide…sunshine-y yellows, cheerful reds, and sparkling blues. Together, you and your unicorn are speckling the world with color and joy. With the Rainbow Love Unicorn toys from Schleich, the story possibilities are endless. What magical stories will you and your rainbow unicorns tell next?

name: Rainbow Love Unicorn Foal
description: This Schleich Rainbow Love Unicorn Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: Imagine you’re on a midnight hike to a magical waterfall. A gentle mist twinkles in the air as you hug the river bend. Moonlight twinkles in the tiny water droplets, bathing the night sky in rainbow hues. You’ve never seen a moonlight rainbow before! Are your eyes playing tricks on you, or did you just glimpse a glittering unicorn splashing in the rainbows? With the Rainbow Love Unicorn toys from Schleich, the story possibilities are endless. What magical stories will you and your rainbow unicorns tell next?

name: Rainbow Dragon
description: This Schleich Rainbow Dragon figure is an intricately detailed dragon with powerful wings, sharp claws, and formidable features. Hand-painted to bring the mystery of dragonkind to life.
marketingDescription: It's here! In the BAYALA® world, they say that catching sight of it is even more rare than shooting stars at night or finding a clover leaf with exactly four leaves. But when our Rainbow Dragon from the schleich® BAYALA® world appears on the ceiling of your children's room, it is either on its way to you or the supplies in its cave have run out again. Or both. Its colorful plumage reflects all the sun's rays with every single stroke of its wings. You can usually hear it too - either because of its loud call or because its tail has swept something off the shelf again. Do you think it will tidy up its mess?

name: Silver Dapple Mare
description: This Schleich Silver Dapple Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The Silver Dapple Mare from schleich® FARM WORLD actually has a dark coat, but the so-called "silver dapple" gene means that it is much lighter and looks silvery. Even the eyelashes of silver dapple horses are light, usually even white. This coloring is common in Rocky Mountain Horses, Scandinavian ponies and American horse breeds such as Morgan, American Saddlebred and Tennessee Walking Horse.

name: Sorraia Mustang Stallion
description: This Schleich Sorraia Mustang Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Mustang, the free-roaming horse of the West, capturing the hardy, independent spirit of these resilient horses.
marketingDescription: The Sorraia Mustang Stallion from schleich® FARM WORLD has a narrow dorsal stripe on his back. This is a characteristic of these horses, as is the dun coat and the dark snout. The mane and tail show another characteristic of the breed: They are always bi-colored! Sorraia horses are considered the ancestors of Andalusians and Lusitanos. It is to them that these breeds owe their high-set, strong neck.

name: Llama
description: This Schleich Llama figure captures the distinctive long neck and soft coat of this South American pack animal. Hand-painted with anatomical accuracy for farm play scenes and collection.
marketingDescription: The Llama from schleich® FARM WORLD has a thick, white coat. Its wool is wonderfully soft, warm, and perfect for people with allergies. Llamas are hump-less camels that originate in the South American Andes, and eat plants and grasses. They have a split upper lip and are known for spitting at rivals in order to establish ranking within their herd. Despite this, they are extremely gentle and friendly towards people.

name: Swan
description: This Schleich Swan figure showcases this Swan, with its gracefully curved neck and elegant plumage. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail.
marketingDescription: The Swan from schleich® FARM WORLD has a pronounced black knob at the base of its beak. "Mute" refers to the fact that this species is less vocal than other swan species. The large birds are part of the water fowl order and prefer to live by lakes and ponds. They feed on water plants and small animals. When foraging for food they dabble with their long necks and heads in the water. Once a year they molt to get rid of their old plumage and renew their feathers.

name: Pura Raza Española Mare
description: This Schleich Pura Raza Española Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The Pura Raza Española Mare from schleich® HORSE CLUB enchants with her long, flowing mane that is typical for this horse breed. Her similarity to the Andalusian horses is no coincidence as the Pura Raza Española, or PRE for short, are a breeding line within the Andalusian breed. They have been recognized as a separate breed by the Spanish breeder's association since 1912. You can therefore say that all PREs are Andalusians but not all Andalusians are PREs.

name: Pura Raza Espanola stallion
description: This Schleich Pura Raza Espanola stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The Pura Raza Española Stallion from schleich® HORSE CLUB is a proud black horse with an elegant arching neck, a noble head shape, a long, flowing mane and a luxuriant tail. Horses of this breed are often mistaken for Andalusians, and vice versa. This comes as no surprise because they are a separate breeding line within the Andalusians. The stud books are kept according to fixed rules to differentiate them from other horses.

name: Pura Raza Española Young Horse
description: This Schleich Pura Raza Española Young Horse figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The Pura Raza Española Young Horse from schleich® HORSE CLUB is a curious, dark, dappled gray horse with an attentive gaze and pricked up ears. Pura Raza Española move as gracefully as dancers from a young age and are therefore often lovingly and patiently trained as young horses for demanding high-class horsemanship. They learn impressive dressage elements such as pirouettes and canters.

name: German Riding Pony Mare
description: This Schleich German Riding Pony Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the pony breed, capturing the compact build, intelligence, and sure-footedness that make ponies beloved riding partners.
marketingDescription: The German Riding Pony Mare from schleich® HORSE CLUB has a beautiful chestnut coat. The braids in her mane are held together with cute, small ties. These are a special eye-catcher at tournaments. German Riding Ponies are very friendly animals that are specially bred for riding by children and youth. They look like little horses and are suitable for both dressage and show jumping.

name: German Riding Pony Gelding
description: This Schleich German Riding Pony Gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the pony breed, capturing the compact build, intelligence, and sure-footedness that make ponies beloved riding partners.
marketingDescription: The German Riding Pony Gelding from schleich® HORSE CLUB has a beautifully braided mane. Despite his low height, he looks like a full-size horse. That is a special feature of this pony breed. The animals have long, slender legs and an elegant physique. This differentiates them from other ponies that have shorter, more stocky legs and a more thickset body. The German Riding Pony is also known as a miniature warmblood.

name: Hanoverian mare, black
description: This Schleich Hanoverian mare, black figure is a hand-painted replica of the Hanoverian warmblood from northern Germany, showcasing the athletic build and powerful gaits that make this breed a champion in equestrian sport.
marketingDescription: The mane of the Hanoverian Mare, Black from schleich® HORSE CLUB is braided into small standing tournament braids. Her lively pose shows that she is full of energy and can hardly wait to perform with her rider. Hanoverians are amongst the oldest warmblood breeds and are excellent tournament horses. They are easy to train, bold and determined, and have a gentle, kind character.

name: Hannoverian Gelding, Red Dun
description: This Schleich Hannoverian Gelding, Red Dun figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: The Hanoverian Gelding, Red Dun from schleich® HORSE CLUB has a splendidly shiny dun coat, dark legs and a dark snout. He is ready for the next competition with his carefully braided mane and tail. Dressage or show jumping? Hanoverians are exceptionally talented horses in both disciplines. They are competitive, learn quickly, have an even temperament and move both gracefully and powerfully.

name: Hannoverian Foal, Red Dun
description: This Schleich Hannoverian Foal, Red Dun figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The light coat of the Hanoverian Foal, Red Dun from schleich® HORSE CLUB is exceptionally beautiful. The mane and tail are dark, as is typical for a dun horse. The foal also has dark legs and a cute, dark snout. It's sure to be a beauty when fully grown. The erect and refined posture that it already has shows that it's sure to prove a jumping and dressage talent at tournaments in the future.

name: Manatee
description: This Schleich Manatee figure captures the Manatee, the gentle "sea cow" with its rounded, peaceful form. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The Manatee from schleich® WILD LIFE is a mammal that lives in tropical waters and feeds on seagrass, algae and other aquatic plants. Its closest relative is an elephant. Its front legs have evolved into fins over millions of years, while its hind legs have completely disappeared. The manatee's tail is shaped like a paddle, whereas a dugong, which looks very similar, has a tail fluke that looks like a dolphin.

name: Platypus
description: This Schleich Platypus figure captures the duck-like bill, beaver-like tail, and unique body of one of nature's most extraordinary egg-laying mammals. Hand-painted with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Platypus from schleich® WILD LIFE is one of the few egg-laying mammals. It is native to Australia. It lives in rivers and lakes, feeding on prawns, insects and worms. Its wide bill looks similar to that of a duck. The bill senses the electrical signals of other animals and allows prey to be tracked down. Compared to other mammals, the Platypus has a very low body temperature of only 32 degrees Celsius.

name: Emperor Penguin
description: This Schleich Emperor Penguin figure captures this penguin, with its distinctive black-and-white plumage and upright waddle. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The Emperor Penguin from schleich® WILD LIFE is the largest and heaviest penguin species. It is also unique for living so far south in Antarctica. Emperor Penguins don't build a nest, instead brooding directly on the ice. After laying an egg, the female goes back to sea to hunt for fish, leaving the male to look after the egg. He places it on his feet and incubates it under his abdominal crease.

name: Badger
description: This Schleich Badger figure captures the stocky build, strong claws, and distinctive facial markings of this tenacious burrower. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The Badger from schleich® WILD LIFE is a nocturnal predator of the marten family. The black and white coat, long snout, stocky body and short sturdy legs are other features of this animal. Badgers live in hilly forest areas of Europe and feed on earthworms, insects, rodents, grains and berries. Badgers use their powerful paws to dig extensive branched funnel systems underground, which are used over generations.

name: Warthog
description: This Schleich Warthog figure captures the distinctive facial warts, tusks, and sturdy build of this hardy African wild pig. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The Warthog from schleich® WILD LIFE is a mammal that lives in Africa and primarily eats roots, tubers and berries. It has wart-shaped growths under the eyes and above the nose. They aren't actually warts but rather particularly thick skin that protects the animal from serious injury during fights. The tusks are used to defend against lions, hyenas, leopards and wild dogs.

name: Anteater
description: This hand-painted Schleich Anteater figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2021, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.

name: Desert Fox
description: This Schleich Desert Fox figure captures the bushy tail, pointed ears, and clever expression of one of nature's most resourceful predators. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.

name: Proboscis Monkey
description: This hand-painted Schleich Proboscis Monkey figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2021, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The Proboscis Monkey from schleich® WILD LIFE is a primate that lives in rainforests and mangrove forests on the Asian island of Borneo. The males have a strikingly large nose that can be up to 10 cm long. But they don't have a strong sense of smell. Researchers believe that it is used to impress females. Proboscis Monkeys are day-active mammals who live in small groups and feed on leaves and fruits.

name: Vulture
description: This Schleich Vulture figure showcases this vulture, with its broad wingspan designed for soaring on thermal currents. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail.
marketingDescription: The Vulture from schleich® WILD LIFE is a mature griffon vulture. It lives all over Europe, North Africa and Asia. The bird of prey prefers living in open landscapes, on cliffs or in gorges. It has reddish brown plumage, gray-black wings, and an almost featherless neck with a ring of white down around it. Vultures are particularly important to the ecosystem. They eat dead animals that could otherwise spread disease.

name: Pachycephalosaurus
description: This Schleich Pachycephalosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Pachycephalosaurus, with its remarkably thick dome-shaped skull used for head-butting contests. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Pachycephalosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS is the largest beaked, herbivorous dinosaur ever discovered. It grew to around 4-5 m in length, 450 kg, moved on two legs and lived in the Late Cretaceous period in North America. Its strong domed skull was 20-25 cm thick. Scientists believe that it used the skull to ram or impress rivals. Pachycephalosaurus means "thick-headed lizard."

name: Kaprosuchus
description: This Schleich Kaprosuchus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Kaprosuchus from schleich® DINOSAURS was named after its teeth and head shape: its name means "boar crocodile." The animal lived in the Late Cretaceous period, probably primarily on land where it hunted small animals. So far only one skull of the animal has been found in the Sahara, so scientists can only guess at its actual appearance. It's estimated that the dinosaur was around 6 m long.

name: Mosasaurus
description: This Schleich Mosasaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Mosasaurus, the fearsome marine reptile with powerful jaws that ruled the Cretaceous oceans. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The movable jaw of the Mosasaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS contains many pointy teeth. When hunting prey such as fish or turtles, the dinosaur opened its mouth very wide and bit down powerfully. The shape of its teeth means that it probably didn't chew, and simply swallowed. As an adaptation to the habitat, its front and hind legs transformed into fins. It also had a fin on the end of its tail.

name: Brontosaurus
description: This Schleich Brontosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Brontosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS has a long tail, an enormous body and a narrow neck. The dinosaur grew to around 15 tons and 22 m. While skeletons of the Brontosaurus have been found, scientists have never found a skull. It probably had a small head similar to the Apatosaurus. The name Brontosaurus means "thunder lizard." Scientists used to believe that the dinosaur snapped its tail like a whip.

name: Dinosaur Air Attack
description: This Schleich Dinosaur Air Attack figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The helicopter from schleich® DINOSAURS Attack from the Air is perfect for following and catching dinosaurs from the air. Dino researcher Luis specially developed a tranquilizer cannon to be attached to the helicopter. Luis takes to the air to take a round flight in his helicopter. But be careful! A large Tapejara isn't at all pleased to find the helicopter has entered its territory, and immediately takes chase. Luis skillfully uses the control stick to make a fast 180 degree turn. The Tapejara tries to swerve but Luis activates the tranquilizer dart and net perfectly. The dinosaur is caught and can be easily carried with the winch on the helicopter.

name: Friendship Horse Tournament
description: This Schleich Friendship Horse Tournament figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: Sofia and Lisa are giddy with excitement...tournament day is here! Coordination, riding ability, and horsemanship are on display. The HORSE CLUB friends have practiced all year for this moment. One thing's for sure: Horse show friends are the best friends! The Friendship Horse Tournament playset from schleich® HORSE CLUB introduces kids to the world of horse tournaments and riding competitions. With two horse figurines and more than 30 accessories included, the set allows young horse lovers to tell their own stories about life as an equestrian. Combine it with other HORSE CLUB playsets (each sold separately) for an always-expanding play world for horse lovers. schleich® HORSE CLUB playsets and figurines introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. Featuring dozens of toy horses, riders and accessories, schleich® HORSE CLUB lets your adventure stories run wild. Horse figurines canter in rich detail, while authentic playsets provide an always expanding setting for the adventures of Hannah, Sofia, Lisa and Sarah! Our horse and rider figurines love to be whisked away into stories featuring other schleich® play worlds, from the grasses of the savannah to the majestic pines of the forest! schleich® toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national and international safety standards.

name: Rock Beast
description: This Schleich Rock Beast figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: A really tough lump. The Rock Beast from schleich® ELDRADOR® Creatures lives in the inaccessible, rugged mountains of the Stone World. Its front legs have powerful and razor-sharp claws that let it effortlessly scale steep rock walls. Not even the slightest movement escapes its toxic green eyes - which is why every intruder immediately attracts the attention of the dangerous loner. Once an enemy is discovered, the Rock Beast picks up the chase. If it comes to a fight, the four-legged monster is well equipped: Its neck is covered in strong armor and can withstand any attack, no matter how violent. But that's not all - on its head are four horns made of magical crystal that can be the downfall of enemies. One touch of these sparkling green horns is all it takes to turn the opponent to stone.

name: Shadow Panther
description: This Schleich Shadow Panther figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Careful! The Shadow Panther from schleich® ELDRADOR® Creatures prowls through the jungle undergrowth like a dark phantom. His jet black coat lets him move invisibly through the shadows to ambush his enemies. If an intruder comes too close, he leaps out of his cover to take his opponent by surprise and attacks them with his razor-sharp claws. Often the attacks ends up in a breathtaking chase, which the strong jungle inhabitant easily wins. The dangerous Shadow Panther is particularly proud of his lithe, spiny tails. They help him keep his balance during leaps. Plus, he can also use the strong tails as a double whip. The spines on the end of his tails and on his muscular back are very dangerous. They contain a paralyzing poison that immediately disables his enemies.

name: Winged Baby Lion Training
description: This Schleich Winged Baby Lion Training figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The training for winged baby lions is a great event in BAYALA®. Because the two baby lions want to fly majestically through the air soon. But since they still have small wings, they playfully train their flying skills on the ground. They have an arch with two podiums and a ring through which they can run, jump or fly. But that's not all: with one paw, the baby lions can turn everything around and turn it into a seesaw on which they can swing merrily and romp wildly. While they practice their tricks, many funny things happen and sometimes a baby lion falls out of the busket. All BAYALA hears its happy meowing and is delighted by the cute winged kittens.

name: Hatching Owl Chicks
description: This Schleich Hatching Owl Chicks figure showcases this owl, with its large forward-facing eyes and silent-flight feathers adapted for nocturnal hunting. Hand-painted with realistic colouring and fine detail. This young figure captures the endearing appearance of a chick.
marketingDescription: In BAYALA® you can hear cheerful beeping sounds, because the hatching baby owls are playing merrily in the tree and in the nest. The two little birds, freshly hatched from the egg, romp around wildly in their warm nest so that the feathers fly. The beautiful tree, which is nicely decorated with flowers, berries and leaf tendrils, is sometimes shaking. Even a star dangles from a branch and at the foot of the tree there is a magic crystal. The little baby owls even have a slide, which they like to whizz down with funny beeping. It never gets boring in this nest. And you can hear that very far. The owl chicks look really cute when playing and enchant the whole fairy kingdom.

name: Fairy Café Blossom
description: This Schleich Fairy Café Blossom figure is a delicate, enchanting being from the bayala® fantasy world, hand-painted to capture woodland magic and wonder.
marketingDescription: Eyela LOVES blueberry cake! Feya dishes up a delicious slice for her fairy friend and pours two fresh cups of coffee...with extra maple syrup!  This Fairy Café flower playset is part of the schleich® BAYALA® enchanted play world. The blossom doubles as a handy carrying case and a café for gatherings with friends. Reusable stickers are included so you can decorate the blossom again and again. Comes with two fairy figurines, a unicorn figurine, and lots of fun accessories for limitless storytelling. The enchanted figurines and playsets of schleich® BAYALA® introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From majestic owls and woodland elves to glittering flower houses and unicorn stables, schleich® BAYALA® lets your stories run wild. Mythical creature figurines twinkle in rich detail, while authentic playsets enrich every tale! Our fairy toy figurines love to be whisked away into stories featuring schleich® dinosaur toys,  wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® mythical creature toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and enchanted kingdom safety standards.

name: Meerkat Hangout
description: This Schleich Meerkat Hangout figure captures the alert, upright sentinel posture these social desert mongooses are famous for. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.

name: Playful foal
description: This Schleich Playful foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The Playful Foal from schleich® HORSE CLUB includes a play ball that has been specially developed for horses. It has a grip that the Quarter horse foal can hold onto with its teeth. During play the foal mistakes the cute little hedgehog for the ball, but quickly realizes how spikey it is! Luckily neither is hurt in this funny encounter and the two become friends. After frolicking around, the foal drinks from the nursing bottle and has a warm blanket laid over it so that it doesn't get cold.

name: Mini Creatures Lava Robot
description: This Schleich Mini Creatures Lava Robot is a collectible miniature from the popular Mini Creatures series, carefully crafted to capture distinctive features in a compact format perfect for collecting and trading.

name: Lava Smasher
description: This Schleich Lava Smasher figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The Lava Smasher from schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES radiates so much heat that (almost) no one dares to get close. Because attackers know that everything the blazing giant touches goes up in flames. His massive body is made of molten lava rock, and a blazing mane roars on his head. Despite being so massive, the Lava Smasher is extremely agile, making him a fiendish opponent. The fact that he can completely rotate his upper body means that he never misses the slightest movement. Anyone who comes close to him is immediately discovered. With his movable arms, he grabs the enemy like lightning and shakes them hard. The Lava Smasher can also move his jaw: As soon as he opens his sparking mouth, his blazing fiery breath escapes - and it not only smells of burned rock, it's also unbearably hot!

name: Fairy in Flight on Winged Lion
description: This Schleich Fairy in Flight on Winged Lion figure is a delicate, enchanting being from the bayala® fantasy world, hand-painted to capture woodland magic and wonder.
marketingDescription: The winged lion and her fairy rider soar gracefully above BAYALA®, the pinks and golds and blues of the flower meadows below mirrored in the fairy's wings and the lion's mane. Their friends await as they climb toward the clouds, swooping higher! The modeling and paint work showcase schleich®'s unmatched attention to detail. The lion's movable wings feature intricate coloring and a 12" wingspan for swift transport wherever your story leads you. The wings are easily popped into sockets on the lion's torso and move back and forth. The fairy has a built-in magnet that helps her stay on the lion's back. The Fairy in Flight toy is a part of schleich®'s BAYALA® collection of fairies, mermaids, unicorns and other enchanted creatures.The enchanted figurines and playsets of schleich® BAYALA® introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From majestic owls and woodland elves to glittering flower houses and unicorn stables, schleich® BAYALA® lets your stories run wild. Mythical creature figurines twinkle in rich detail, while authentic playsets enrich every tale! Our fairy toy figurines love to be whisked away into stories featuring schleich® dinosaur toys, wild animal figures and toy horses! schleich® mythical creature toys and playsets are built to last for generations. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and enchanted kingdom safety standards.

name: Mandala Unicorn Stallion
description: This Schleich Mandala Unicorn Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The mandala unicorn stallion enchants every inhabitant of BAYALA® who sees him, with his breathtaking blaze of color and his proud attitude. His beautiful mandala shows a mysterious triangle, which is a sign of his magical power. The blue tattoo in the middle shines as intensely as the color of the sky. The stallion is a respectful creature and at the same time a gentle and very loving father who loves to play with his mandala unicorn foal. The new, colorful mandala unicorn family can be recognized by their unique mandala tattoos. They live together and secluded in the vastness of the colorful mandala hills of BAYALA.

name: Mandala Unicorn Foal
description: This Schleich Mandala Unicorn Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The mandala unicorn foal immediately catches the eye of every inhabitant of BAYALA®, because it is colorful, playful and curiously sticks its nose everywhere. Its beautiful mandala tattoo is a magic circle that emanates the positive power of its great cheerfulness. The tattoo of the mandala unicorn foal is magical pink in the middle. The little foal often keeps its mandala unicorn parents on their toes, because it makes a lot of fun. Sometimes it looks after beautiful clouds and tries to catch them. Thereby it jumps cheerfully into the air. The new, colorful mandala unicorn family can be recognized by their unique mandala tattoos. They live together and secluded in the vastness of the colorful mandala hills of BAYALA®.

name: Mandala Unicorn Mare
description: This Schleich Mandala Unicorn Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The mandala unicorn mare causes many astonished looks in BAYALA®, because she is a colorful magical creature. Her beautiful mandala tattoo is a magic circle, which is a sign of her mystical origin. The tattoo of the mandala unicorn mare is mysteriously pink in the middle. The mare is a very elegant appearance. Her warm heart makes her the perfect mummy for her small, wild mandala unicorn foal. The new, colorful mandala unicorn family can be recognized by their unique mandala tattoos. They live together and secluded in the vastness of the colorful mandala hills of BAYALA®.

name: Black Forest Stallion
description: This Schleich Black Forest Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The Black Forest Stallion from the schleich® FARM WORLD has a very dynamic pose. It shows how powerful and vigorous the Black Forest cold blood horses are. The animals are also known as "WÃ¤lderpferde" (Woods Horse) because they used to help with heavy forestry work. These days the lively Black Forest cold bloods are mainly popular as recreational horses and are used for riding or to pull carriages and sleighs.

name: Black Forest Mare
description: This Schleich Black Forest Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: The Black Forest cold blood is a small but powerful and agile horse. It has an even-tempered and docile character while at the same time being very lively and full of energy. As with this Black Forest Mare from the schleich® FARM WORLD, the mane and tail of this horse breed is always flaxen. It creates an exciting contrast to the dark, chestnut-coloured coat of the horse.

name: Black Forest Foal
description: This Schleich Black Forest Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The Black Forest Foal from the schleich® FARM WORLD has a dark, chestnut-coloured coat and an enchanting blaze. Its mane and tail are still short, but the flaxen hair will later be as luxuriant and long as is typical for the horse breed. Black Forest cold bloods are a very rare horse breed that originate from the Black Forest in southern Germany.

name: Turkey
description: This Schleich Turkey figure is a hand-painted bird replica, capturing the plumage, posture, and distinctive features with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Turkeys are part of the pheasant family and are originally from North America. The male birds have black plumage with individual metallic shimmering colourful feathers. The head and neck are featherless and coloured bright red and light blue. When male turkeys compete for females during mating season they spread their tail feathers out like a fan, as shown by the turkey from the schleich® FARM WORLD.

name: Frisian mare
description: This Schleich Frisian mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: Frisians were named after their home, the Dutch Friesland, and are one of the oldest horse breeds in Europe. They have a characteristic black coloured coat, a magnificent mane and a pretty tail. Another feature of Frisians is the long hair on their legs. The Frisian mare by schleich® HORSE CLUB has elaborate braiding on her fetlock, which makes her a unique collector's item.

name: Arabian stallion
description: This Schleich Arabian stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Arabian breed, capturing the distinctive dished face profile, high tail carriage, and spirited expression that have made Arabians prized for centuries.
marketingDescription: Arabians are often referred to as the most beautiful horse breed in the world. They have a slim, noble physique and often a small, elegant kink in the nose. The Arabian stallion by schleich® HORSE CLUB has a braided tail, which is beautifully displayed with its proud pose. He also has a magnificent dark mane and his coat is an elegant, attractive shade of brown.

name: Arabian mare
description: This Schleich Arabian mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Arabian breed, capturing the distinctive dished face profile, high tail carriage, and spirited expression that have made Arabians prized for centuries.
marketingDescription: With its calm and relaxed pose, the Arabian mare by schleich® HORSE CLUB expresses that the spirited horse breed also has a gentle and sensitive side. Her tail is an interesting colour: It is black at the top and white at the bottom. Another highlight of the figurine is the dark mane and the dark front legs, because they serve as an exciting contrast to the light coat.

name: Trakehner Gelding
description: This Schleich Trakehner Gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the Trakehner warmblood from East Prussia, showcasing the refined elegance and athletic ability of this distinguished sport horse breed.
marketingDescription: Trakehner are considered a very noble warmblood breed. The dynamic pose of the Trakehner gelding by schleich® HORSE CLUB clearly shows the great liveliness, elegance and temperament of the horse breed. Trakehner are talented sport horses and often win medals at tournaments. Their stamina and intelligence means that their strengths lie primarily in eventing and endurance riding.

name: Knabstrupper mare
description: This Schleich Knabstrupper mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Knabstrupper breed from Denmark, featuring the eye-catching spotted coat pattern that has made this breed famous since 1812.
marketingDescription: Knabstrupper are from Denmark and are great therapy horses. Even anxious people quickly come to trust them. Is it her funny, dark spots on her white coat or her charming nature? The lovingly painted Knabstrupper mare by schleich® HORSE CLUB with her relaxed and friendly pose definitely invites you to play with her straight away.

name: Akhal Teke Stallion
description: This Schleich Akhal Teke Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: Akhal-Teke horses are considered one of the most beautiful horse breeds. In China, Akhal-Teke are called "heaven horses", who, like the Akhal-Teke stallion by schleich® HORSE CLUB, have a gold-shimmering coat. These animals are a very old horse breed with a history spanning a period of almost 3,000 years. They were named after a 100 km long oasis strip on the edge of the Karakuma desert in Turkmenistan.

name: American Saddlebred mare
description: This Schleich American Saddlebred mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Saddlebred, known as "The Horse America Made," capturing the high-stepping action and proud carriage of this charismatic breed.
marketingDescription: The American Saddlebred mare by schleich® HORSE CLUB carries her head and long tail very high, as is typical for this horse breed. In the past, American Saddlebreds were used as riding and driving horses by the American settlers. Today they are mainly used as show horses. Some not only master step, trot and gallop but also the slow gait and so-called rack gaits. Both are pleasantly soft, four-beat movements.

name: American Saddlebred gelding
description: This Schleich American Saddlebred gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Saddlebred, known as "The Horse America Made," capturing the high-stepping action and proud carriage of this charismatic breed.
marketingDescription: American Saddlebreds are well-known for keeping their heads and their beautifully curved tail high - like the American Saddlebred gelding by schleich® HORSE CLUB. The horse breed has a balanced, even-tempered nature and is extremely willing to perform. Some American Saddlebreds master two additional gaits, the slow gait and the so-called rack gait.

name: Giant tortoise
description: This Schleich Giant tortoise figure showcases the detailed shell pattern and sturdy build of one of the longest-lived animals on Earth. Hand-painted with lifelike colouring and texture.
marketingDescription: Giant tortoises are large and can weigh over 400 kg. Like the giant tortoise from schleich® WILD LIFE, they have short but powerful legs that they use to move around in the search for fresh grass and herbs. The reptiles can reach an impressive age and often live more than 100 years in the wild.

name: Hippopotamus Calf
description: This Schleich Hippopotamus Calf figure is a hand-painted farm animal replica with realistic proportions and distinctive features.

name: Dromedary
description: This Schleich Dromedary figure is a hand-painted wildlife replica capturing the natural beauty of this species with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Dromedaries live in the deserts of Africa and Asia. They eat mostly leaves, dry grass and thorny plants. The hump of the mammal isn't used to store water; it stores fat. If they can't find any food in the desert they can live off it for weeks. The dromedary from schleich® WILD LIFE has eaten well recently and has an upright, well-filled hump.

name: Red Panda
description: This hand-painted Schleich Red Panda figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2020, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The red panda is a small mammal that lives in the eastern Himalayas and south-west China. It eats mainly bamboo. In the same way as the red panda from schleich® WILD LIFE, at first glance the animal looks like a cross between a raccoon, a fox and a cat. And despite its name it isn't a panda. A new animal family was created for the red panda, with the scientific name Ailurus.

name: Wombat
description: This Schleich Wombat figure captures the sturdy, barrel-shaped body of this powerful Australian burrowing marsupial. Hand-painted with lifelike detail.

name: Hammerhead Shark
description: This Schleich Hammerhead Shark figure captures the Hammerhead Shark, with its unmistakable hammer-shaped head that provides extraordinary wide-angle vision. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.

name: Baby Killer Whale
description: This Schleich Baby Killer Whale figure depicts a young this whale species, capturing the graceful proportions and gentle nature of these ocean giants. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Killer whales are also known as orcas and are actually part of the dolphin family. The animals are easy to differentiate from other whales thanks to their distinctive colouring: While the skin on their back is pitch-black, their bellies are a bright white, as you can see on the killer whale calf from schleich® WILD LIFE. After just a few months the calves start hunting for their own fish, marine mammals and sea birds.

name: Reindeer
description: This Schleich Reindeer figure captures the graceful proportions and alert ears of this elegant woodland herbivore. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: Reindeer are a deer species that live in large herds in the colder regions of North America, northern Europe and northern Asia. In nature they have the same stick-like antlers as the one from schleich® WILD LIFE. They are the only deer species where the female also has antlers. Another special feature is their hooves. They are very wide and spread as they walk. This creates a characteristic creaking or cracking sound.

name: Snow Leopard
description: This Schleich Snow Leopard figure captures the beautiful rosette-patterned coat and stealthy build of this adaptable big cat. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The snow leopard is a large cat that lives in the high rocky mountains of Central Asia. It feeds mainly on sheep, ibex and goats. Thick fur protects it against freezing cold temperatures but its beauty means that many animals fall prey to poachers. That's why the snow leopard is an endangered species. A special feature is its tail which, like the snow leopard from schleich® WILD LIFE, is nearly as long as its body.

name: Postosuchus
description: This Schleich Postosuchus figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The postosuchus was an archosaur and thus a close relative of modern crocodiles. It had strikingly ossified skin and a long, narrow snout. It usually moved on four legs. Sometimes it stood on its hind legs so that it could hold prey with its claws. When the postosuchus from schleich® DINOSAURS opens its powerful, movable jaw the sharp, dagger-like teeth become visible.

name: Ceratosaurus
description: This Schleich Ceratosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Ceratosaurus, featuring the prominent nasal horn and distinctive predatory build. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Ceratosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS was a carnivorous dinosaur that lived around 150 million years ago in the Late Jurassic period. Two bumps at the eyes and a large horn on the nose were made of bone. They were used either in combat or to deter rivals. On its back were also numerous spike-like bones. The many bumps and plates gave it its name: Ceratosaurus means "horned lizard."

name: Cryolophosaurus
description: This Schleich Cryolophosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: When the cryolophosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS opens its movable jaw you can see its dangerous teeth! In the Early Jurassic epoch it was the largest carnivorous dinosaur and is the first dinosaur whose fossils were found in Antarctica. When it roamed the earth this part of the earth was not yet covered in ice. Instead it was covered with forests, though in the winter months temperatures dropped to under zero, which was extremely cold for dinosaurs.

name: Agustinia
description: This Schleich Agustinia figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The long, narrow spines of the agustinia make it look so unique that it is impossible to mix up with any other dinosaur. It was also covered with unusual-looking ossified skin plates. As a harmless herbivore it probably needed the spines and plates to protect against other carnivorous dinosaurs. The agustinia from schleich® DINOSAURS is also always ready to defend itself!

name: Baryonyx
description: This Schleich Baryonyx figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.
marketingDescription: The long, narrow and flat head of the baryonyx from schleich® DINOSAURS is similar to that of a crocodile, making it an especially exciting prehistoric reptile. This dinosaur is believed to have hunted primarily in the water, and could immerse its perfectly shaped snout into the water to catch fish. It also had unusually large and heavy hook-shaped thumb claws to grab prey.

name: Ankylosaurus
description: This Schleich Ankylosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Ankylosaurus, featuring the thick armoured plates and massive tail club of this living tank. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: As an herbivorous dinosaur, the ankylosaurus did not hunt, but knew how to defend itself! If it felt threatened it gathered momentum with its heavy, bone tail club and hurled it against attackers. It was presumably able to shatter even large bones. There are plenty of exciting situations to create with the ankylosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS!

name: Fjord Mare Feeding
description: This Schleich Fjord Mare Feeding figure is a hand-painted replica of the Norwegian Fjord, one of the world's oldest breeds, showcasing the distinctive dun colour with dark dorsal stripe and compact, powerful build.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex attack
description: This Schleich Tyrannosaurus Rex attack figure is a meticulously detailed replica of the fearsome T. rex, capturing the powerful jaws and menacing stance of one of the largest land predators that ever lived. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: Can Flynn protect Steggy the little stegosaurus from the dangerous T-Rex? Wild dinos are quickly subdued with the pole-arm.

name: Accessory Horse Show Jewelry
description: This Schleich Accessory Horse Show Jewelry figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.

name: Large Horse Show
description: This Schleich Large Horse Show figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: The schleich® HORSE CLUB big horse show is taking place at Lakeside! Sarah and Tori are cleaning their Tennessee walking mare and Lusitano stallion with a hoof pick, curry comb and brush from the grooming box. From the back of the arena, they fetch decorative hearts, bows and flowers to put on the bridle, harness and spats. In the tent, the girls make themselves up in front of their mirrors with the lipstick, make-up brush and compact from their make-up case. Outside, the arena is decorated with plants, bows, vine bunting and flags. It's showtime! Sarah smooths down her pull-off skirt, while Tori takes the blanket off her horse. Beneath the spotlights, they lead the horses from the paddock and over the carpet to the jury's table. What will be on the scoreboards? Luckily there are only winners, as there are rosettes as well as the trophy! With over 100 accessories, the set promises hours of play!

name: Attack Of The Hyena
description: This Schleich Attack Of The Hyena figure captures the powerful jaws and spotted coat of this highly successful African predator. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.

name: Eyela riding on golden unicorn
description: This Schleich Eyela riding on golden unicorn figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: Whenever Eyela saddles the golden unicorn, she wonders what adventures await her. The magic unicorn has very special skills and surprises the crown princess again every time with new feats. However, the golden unicorn stops by the royal court only on special days and can only be ridden by Eyela.

name: Mermaid riding on sea unicorn
description: This Schleich Mermaid riding on sea unicorn figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: The mermaid lives hidden on her pearly unicorn in the underwater world of Meamare. Explore the magical world together and visit the mermaid friends Annabelle, Isabelle, Gabriella, and Michelle! Then she will tell exciting stories of the adventures she has had and will bring along special presents from her trips.

name: Fire Eagle
description: This Schleich Fire Eagle figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: His watchful eyes don't miss a thing: High above the volcanoes of the lava world, the fire eagle by schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES circles majestically through the air. His movable wings ensure that the skillful bird has plenty of propulsive force and easily masters complicated flight manoeuvres. The fire eagle perceives even the smallest movements on the ground - and if it's an intruder, the bird of prey doesn't hesitate for long: He spans his movable, transparent wings and dives toward the enemy. He pulls a glowing, blazing tail behind him, making him look like a falling comet. The fire eagle has razor-sharp claws, which he mercilessly grips with. Another weapon he uses in attacks is his curved, pointed beak. As a crowning glory, the fire eagle creates a massive firestorm with his wings, which simply sweeps his enemies away.

name: Monster Gorilla
description: This Schleich Monster Gorilla figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Plant Monster
description: This Schleich Plant Monster figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Jungle Creature
description: This Schleich Jungle Creature figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Blossom Pegasus
description: This Schleich Blossom Pegasus figure depicts the legendary winged horse with magnificent feathered wings. Hand-painted to capture the majesty and freedom of this mythological creature.
marketingDescription: The colorful flower pegasus by schleich® BAYALA® is a magical animal. He is as shy and mysterious as all magical horses, living secluded in the beautiful flower fields and being a loving protector of the sweet flower unicorn foal. To win his trust is very difficult, but the royal sisters managed to win him over as a good and faithful friend. The princesses Surah and Sera love to meet him and admire his beautiful wings and great mane!

name: Blossom unicorn foal
description: This Schleich Blossom unicorn foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The flower unicorn foal of schleich® BAYALA® is, in contrast to the colorful flower pegasus, very wild and playful. It 1loves to play with his friend the flower dragon baby through the beautiful flower fields in which it lives, but it also cheerfully explores the rest of the BAYALA® world. When the wild little unicorn visits the royal sisters, they all like to play catching or hiding. With its flowered mane, it can easily hide in the flower meadow.

name: Blossom dragon mother and child
description: This Schleich Blossom dragon mother and child figure is an intricately detailed dragon with powerful wings, sharp claws, and formidable features. Hand-painted to bring the mystery of dragonkind to life.
marketingDescription: In the wide meadows of the schleich® BAYALA® world live the flower dragon mother and her cute child. There, the dragon baby has found a new friend to play with: The wild little flower unicorn foal. Together they romp around and have a lot of fun. Sometime

name: Mermaid Feya on underwater unicorn
description: This Schleich Mermaid Feya on underwater unicorn figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.
marketingDescription: Transformed by a magician into mermaids, the beautiful and playful fairy Feya with her golden hair and her best friend Eyela, the highest-ranking crown princess in the BAYALA® fairy kingdom, dive together down to their mermaid friends. Diving as a mermaid is so much fun for both of them. To celebrate their visit, the mermaid princess Isabelle is giving a big party.

name: Mermaid Eyela on underwater horse
description: This Schleich Mermaid Eyela on underwater horse figure is a hand-painted replica capturing the beauty and grace of this horse with lifelike detail, from its coat colouring to its natural posture.
marketingDescription: Transformed by a magician into mermaids, the majestic Eyela, the crown princess of all the sun fairies in BAYALA®, and her best friend, the beautiful fairy Feya, dive down together to their mermaid friends. Diving as a mermaid is so much fun for both of them. To celebrate their visit, the mermaid princess Isabelle is giving a big party.

name: Antylar Dragon
description: This Schleich Antylar Dragon figure is an intricately detailed dragon with powerful wings, sharp claws, and formidable features. Hand-painted to bring the mystery of dragonkind to life.
marketingDescription: The colourful and graceful dragon dad Antylar is the eye-catcher from the BAYALA® movie. His beautiful wings have waited so long to embrace his lost dragon baby Nugur again. Now Antylar can give his dragon baby flying lessons and they can finally experience exciting adventures together. Let's go to the dragon festival, the bloom in BAYALA® has to be celebrated together with everyone.

name: Paint horse mare
description: This Schleich Paint horse mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Paint Horse, featuring the unique combination of white and dark markings that make each individual distinctively patterned.
marketingDescription: How can you tell apart a Paint horse mare and a pinto mare? It's easy to mix them up, because they both have patched coats. Essentially, the only way to tell for sure is to consult the studbook: while pintos are only a colour breed, Paint horses are an official breed in their own right.

name: Paint horse gelding
description: This Schleich Paint horse gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Paint Horse, featuring the unique combination of white and dark markings that make each individual distinctively patterned.
marketingDescription: Paint horse geldings are especially popular with cowboys because they are more even-tempered than stallions. They also have "cow sense" and are very quick and nimble, especially over short distances, which makes cattle driving a doddle. This makes cattle driving a doddle. Paint horses are versatile, strong-nerved and extremely hardy.

name: Paint horse foal
description: This Schleich Paint horse foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Paint Horse, featuring the unique combination of white and dark markings that make each individual distinctively patterned. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.
marketingDescription: Paint horse foals have the breed's beautiful characteristic patches right from birth. They are actually just dappled Quarter Horses. In the past, however, only solid-coloured animals could be registered in the studbook. But Paint horses were so popular that just two decades later they were recognised as a breed in their own right.

name: Lipizzaner Stallion
description: This Schleich Lipizzaner Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Lipizzaner breed, famous for the Spanish Riding School in Vienna, capturing the classical elegance and strength of these renowned dressage horses.

name: Trakehner mare
description: This Schleich Trakehner mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Trakehner warmblood from East Prussia, showcasing the refined elegance and athletic ability of this distinguished sport horse breed.
marketingDescription: A Trakehener mare can only have a foal with a Trakehner, Arab or Thoroughbred stallion. This rule is intended to preserve the breed's elegant build and spirited character. Trakehners originated in the East Prussian town of Trakehnen, near Kaliningrad in Russia.

name: Knapstrupper stallion
description: This Schleich Knapstrupper stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: Knapstrupper and Appaloosa stallions look very similar, as they both have spotted coats. However, the two breeds developed independently. The Knapstrupper breed comes from Denmark, while Appaloosas originated in the USA. Knapstruppers are not only popular because of their coat pattern, but are also talented dressage horses.

name: Knapstrupper foal
description: This Schleich Knapstrupper foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: Knapstrupper foals are born already with their characteristic black spots. But not all Knapstruppers look the same. Although most have a white coat under black spots, some Knapstruppers have a snowflake pattern, which is the exact reverse: white spots on a dark coat.

name: White-tailed buck
description: This hand-painted Schleich White-tailed buck figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2019, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: White-tailed bucks are very shy animals. When they get scared, they wave their tails back and forth. If there is indeed a predator nearby, the deer stretch their tails upwards. The white fur that gives them their name becomes clearly visible. The biggest enemies of the white-tailed deer are wolves, coyotes, pumas, bears, alligators and jaguars.

name: White-tailed doe
description: This hand-painted Schleich White-tailed doe figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2019, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: White-tailed does can see and hear very well, but rely mainly on their sense of smell and their speed. They are very agile and can sprint up to 48 km/h. Their grey-brown winter coat isn't just camouflage against predators. Because the hairs are hollow, they also store body heat very efficiently.

name: White-tailed fawn
description: This hand-painted Schleich White-tailed fawn figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2019, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: White-tailed fawns have lots of small white spots on their fur. These serve as camouflage, since the dots make them harder to spot in high grass. When its mother is off looking for food, the white-tailed fawn hides in the tall grass. It stretches out flat on the ground, even laying its head and neck down flat.

name: Wolf
description: This Schleich Wolf figure captures the powerful build, thick fur, and intense gaze of this iconic pack predator. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: It is said that wolves howl at the moon, but their sounds actually serve to communicate with each other. By howling, they want to draw the attention of the other pack members to something important, call them to hunt together, or try to drive away wolves that don't belong to the pack. Their cries can be heard for many kilometres.

name: Lynx
description: This Schleich Lynx figure captures the tufted ears, short tail, and powerful build of this elusive forest wild cat. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The lynx is best known for the striking tufts of hair on its ears. These do not protect the ears of this predatory cat from the cold, but actually help it to hear better. Lynx that live in colder areas have larger and more heavily padded paws. Like snowshoes, they help the animals not to sink into the snow.

name: Quokka
description: This Schleich Quokka figure captures the round face and seemingly permanent smile of the "world's happiest animal". Hand-painted with lifelike detail.

name: Lioness
description: This Schleich Lioness figure captures the powerful build and commanding presence of the "King of the Jungle". Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: With lions, it is almost exclusively the females that go hunting. Many of their prey are faster than they are, so these predators first creep up to a few meters from different sides and then sprint towards their prey. Even though the lionesses usually do the hunting, the males are always the first ones to eat.

name: Komodo Dragon
description: This Schleich Komodo Dragon figure is an intricately detailed dragon with powerful wings, sharp claws, and formidable features. Hand-painted to bring the mystery of dragonkind to life.
marketingDescription: The Komodo dragon is the largest lizard in the world. An ambush predator, it waits in the high grass for small rodents, birds and other reptiles. It tries to bite them with its short, sharp teeth. If it succeeds, the animals do not die because of the bite, but because of a poisonous fluid that it transmits via glands in its mouth.

name: Lemur
description: This Schleich Lemur figure is a hand-painted bird replica, capturing the plumage, posture, and distinctive features with lifelike accuracy.

name: Raccoon
description: This Schleich Raccoon figure captures the distinctive black face mask, ringed tail, and dexterous front paws of this intelligent mammal. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: Raccoons are small but intelligent predatory animals. They learn very quickly and have a good memory. They are active at night, when they feed on small animals such as insects, beetles, worms, fish, but also on plants, fruits and nuts. Before winter arrives, raccoons eat enough to put on a thick layer of body fat.

name: Tarantula
description: This hand-painted Schleich Tarantula figure captures the distinctive features of this creature with remarkable attention to detail. Part of the Schleich collection since 2019, this figure is crafted to be as realistic as possible, making it perfect for imaginative play and collection.
marketingDescription: Tarantulas are among the largest spiders in the world. In contrast to many other spiders, they do not spin a web, but lay in wait for their prey - especially frogs, mice and birds. People don't have to be afraid of them. Tarantulas may have a strong bite, but they are good-natured, and their venom is weaker than that of bees.

name: Okapi
description: This Schleich Okapi figure captures the dark body and striking zebra-striped legs of the giraffe's elusive forest-dwelling relative. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.

name: Spinosaurus
description: This Schleich Spinosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Spinosaurus, the largest carnivorous dinosaur, featuring the distinctive sail-like back structure and crocodile-like snout. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Spinosaurus was one of the most dangerous dinosaurs. It is considered the biggest carnivore because it was even bigger than the Tyrannosaurus rex and the Giganotosaurus! It can be easily distinguished from the other two dinosaurs by the spiny sail on its back and its crocodile-like snout.

name: Giganotosaurus
