description: This Schleich Giganotosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Giganotosaurus, one of the largest predatory dinosaurs, rivalling T. rex in size. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Giganotosaurus looks very similar to the T-rex. Both were dreaded hunters, had very short arms, walked on two legs and had a large skull. However, the Giganotosaurus lived much earlier and was at home in North America, whereas the Tyrannosaurus rex lived in South America.

name: Dimetrodon
description: This Schleich Dimetrodon figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Dimetrodon, with its distinctive sail-like back structure — a Permian creature more closely related to mammals than to dinosaurs. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Dimetrodon is often referred to as a dinosaur. However, it is a primeval reptile, a so-called Pelycosaurus. The sail on its back was made of skin and bones, helping it to warm itself quicker in the sun. If it wanted to cool down, it positioned the sail parallel to the sun's rays.

name: Dimorphodon
description: This Schleich Dimorphodon figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Animantarx
description: This Schleich Animantarx figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.

name: Dracorex
description: This Schleich Dracorex figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Diabloceratops
description: This Schleich Diabloceratops figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Plesiosaurus
description: This Schleich Plesiosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of this Plesiosaur, with its long neck and four large flippers, a graceful predator of prehistoric seas. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Plesiosaurus was a prehistoric reptile that lived in the sea and fed mainly on fish. It wasn't just its long neck that made this dinosaur stand out, but its swimming style: instead of using its paddle-shaped fins to row, it moved forward by beating them like wings - just like a sea turtle.

name: Giganotosaurus juvenile
description: This Schleich Giganotosaurus juvenile figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Giganotosaurus, one of the largest predatory dinosaurs, rivalling T. rex in size. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.

name: Trakehner mare riding tournament
description: This Schleich Trakehner mare riding tournament figure is a hand-painted replica of the Trakehner warmblood from East Prussia, showcasing the refined elegance and athletic ability of this distinguished sport horse breed.
marketingDescription: Trakehner mares are gifted jumpers and dressage horses, and are often entered into shows. Because they have a sensitive temperament and quickly become distracted by noises, at shows they often wear a "fly veil" over their ears. This allows them to concentrate better on their jumps or dressage exercises.

name: Frisian stallion riding tournament
description: This Schleich Frisian stallion riding tournament figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: Frisian stallions are always an impressive sight at horse shows. They inherited their powerful build and even temper from coldbloods, while their elegant, energetic gait and proud bearing come from fiery Spanish horses. The white fly veil protects the Frisian stallion from loud noises, and the elegant white fetlock boots help prevent injuries.

name: Paso Fino stallion horse show
description: This Schleich Paso Fino stallion horse show figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The magnificent Paso Fino stallion is THE highlight at the big horse show in Lakeside. The onlookers are completely thrilled and in awe, because the stallion has a particularly smooth gait, which is even where the horse breed's name comes from. Paso Fino means precisely that: fine gait.

name: Rocky Mountain Horse mare horse show
description: This Schleich Rocky Mountain Horse mare horse show figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: At the horse show in Lakeside, the Rocky Mountain Horse mare has all eyes on it with its graceful movements. This horse breed has a natural predisposition for the “Tölt” gait, in which at least one leg always remains on the ground. This lets the rider sit particularly comfortably in the saddle.

name: Mother wolf with pups
description: This Schleich Mother wolf with pups figure captures the powerful build, thick fur, and intense gaze of this iconic pack predator. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring. This young figure captures the curious nature of a juvenile.
marketingDescription: Wolf pups are blind and deaf at birth and therefore depend on their mother. Only after two weeks do they first open their eyes, and after about ten weeks they begin to explore the world around them. They like to play hide-and-seek, roll around in the grass and hunt small insects. As soon as they are two years old, they leave the pack to start one of their own.

name: Pony agility training
description: This Schleich Pony agility training figure is a hand-painted replica of the pony breed, capturing the compact build, intelligence, and sure-footedness that make ponies beloved riding partners.
marketingDescription: During agility training, the ponies playfully familiarise themselves with a variety of obstacles. First, they are allowed to sniff them up and down. Then, the ponies are carefully led over, through and around them. For some obstacles, the ponies need to muster up a lot of courage. At such times it is important to be patient and lovingly encourage them.

name: Pony agility race
description: This Schleich Pony agility race figure is a hand-painted replica of the pony breed, capturing the compact build, intelligence, and sure-footedness that make ponies beloved riding partners.
marketingDescription: If a pony has successfully completed the training, it can participate in the Agility Race. The anticipation is great - and at the same time the tension. How will the course be laid out? Will the pony shy away or confidently overcome the obstacles? Agility is at least as exciting as riding!

name: Pony Slalom
description: This Schleich Pony Slalom figure is a hand-painted replica of the pony breed, capturing the compact build, intelligence, and sure-footedness that make ponies beloved riding partners.
marketingDescription: Slalom is part of the ground work and is great fun! The pony is not ridden, however, but is guided on foot through slalom poles, alternating left and right. The slalom promotes the intelligence of the pony, is good for its health and also strengthens the trust between the human and the animal.

name: Pony Curtain Obstacle
description: This Schleich Pony Curtain Obstacle figure is a hand-painted replica of the pony breed, capturing the compact build, intelligence, and sure-footedness that make ponies beloved riding partners.
marketingDescription: With the fly curtain, a pony learns to lose its shyness about waving flags and fluttering ribbons. Most ponies are very scared of them and sometimes even jump suddenly to the side. When working with the fly curtain, a pony can get used to the ribbons at its own pace, and sniff at them.

name: Fire bull
description: This Schleich Fire bull figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Uh oh: that smouldering in his eyes spells trouble. The fire bull is always in attack mode! Which is no wonder given how hot-tempered he is: all it takes to make him snap is for a single bird to perch on his spiky back, which is made of cooled lava! Anyone who approaches him will feel his pointy, glowing-hot horns, which can skewer even the best-armoured opponents. But even if they manage to dodge the horns they shouldn't start celebrating just yet: the fire bull has another ace up his sleeve in the form of his flaming tail - one hit from which will put even the most tenacious opponent out of action! Friend or foe, best not get too close unless you want your fingers burnt - under his hard shell bubbles a deadly-hot core of molten lava...

name: Ice Spider
description: This Schleich Ice Spider figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Explore the mystical world of ELDRADOR® with the Ice Spider, a fun, educational toy figurine from schleich®! This set is authentically detailed, and is ideal for hours of imaginative play.schleich® is a German toy company, and we bring realism to a new level. Our high quality, immersive playworlds open up a world of imaginative possibilities to toddlers and kids through safe and educational play. All schleich® products are carefully designed to inspire healthy and creative pretend play for children as both a single toy or part of a larger collection. All products and the materials used meet or exceed the strictest applicable national and international toy safety requirements. We are the world's leading figurine company, and currently offer six different themed worlds and over 300 products designed to teach and inspire kids as they move through developmental stages. From the realistic worlds of FARM WORLD, WILD LIFE and HORSE CLUB to the mystical realms of BAYALA® and ELDRADOR® CREATURES, we put The World in Your Hands.

name: Lava scorpion
description: This Schleich Lava scorpion figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Incredibly dangerous - and very patient: the lava scorpion lurks well hidden in the rugged rocks of the lava world, waiting for its victims, and is ready to attack at all times. Its shell is made from hard, cooled lava stone, but liquid hot lava is bubbles inside of it. If an enemy gets too close to it, it attacks them without warning with his red-hot, ultra-strong pincers. If its prey doesn't hold still, it will feel a burning sting. In combat against multiple attackers, the lava scorpion also uses its huge stinger, which it can swing around like a terrible club in all directions. Because it can defend itself so well, it fears nothing and no one. So it always claims, at least. Because there is one creature it is in fact secretly afraid of: the ice dragon, with its icy breath, is a formidable enemy - and might blow the lava scorpion into an ice statue!

name: Ice griffin
description: This Schleich Ice griffin figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The ice griffin has several pointy weapons to neutralise its enemies: in a duel, it first pierces the attacker's armour with its many, pointed claws, then it pecks at him with its massive, sharp beak. Sometimes it might do things in the opposite order, depending on what it feels like. What's more, the cold-blooded monster has six razor-sharp ice feathers on each of its mighty wings, which it uses to keep enemies at a distance. But sometimes it's already enough when it caws with deafening noise - because the sound is ear-piercing! Its opponents thus often choose to take off into the distance! It forms an ice-cold team together with the ice dragon, which rules over the bone-chilling heights of the ice world.

name: Moon Unicorn Stallion
description: This Schleich Moon Unicorn Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: Explore the magical world of BAYALA® with this Moon Unicorn Stallion, a fun, educational toy figurine from schleich®! This toy is detailed and handheld, and is ideal for hours of imaginative play.The Moon Unicorn Stallion is part of BAYALA® - a fantasy world made up of fairies, unicorns, and mermaids. All the fairies and unicorns live in the Sun Kingdom called Soleyas, while the Mermaids and their magical animal companions live in the Water Kingdom called Meamare. All the inhabitants are looking forward to the engagement of crown princess Isabelle and Ayron of Meamare. Come join the adventure! Ideal for children aged 5-12.schleich® is a German toy company, and we bring realism to a new level. Our high quality, immersive playworlds open up a world of imaginative possibilities to toddlers and kids through safe and educational play. All schleich® products are carefully designed to inspire healthy and creative pretend play for children as both a single toy or part of a larger collection. All products and the materials used meet or exceed the strictest applicable national and international toy safety requirements. We are the world's leading figurine company, and currently offer six different themed worlds and over 300 products designed to teach and inspire kids as they move through developmental stages. From the realistic worlds of FARM WORLD, WILD LIFE and HORSE CLUB to the mystical realms of BAYALA® and ELDRADOR® CREATURES, we put The World in Your Hands.

name: Star Pegasus, mare
description: This Schleich Star Pegasus, mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: This beautiful star Pegasus mare is not from this world. She comes from the infinite space of the universe and you can see this at first glance. She's guarding secrets we could never even imagine. Her outward appearance makes her look especially magical, giving the impression that she has just descended from the starry night sky. She and her family, the proud moon unicorn stallion and her cute shooting star unicorn foal, form a magical unit.

name: Shooting-star-unicorn, foal
description: This Schleich Shooting-star-unicorn, foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: The cute shooting star unicorn foal is more daring than the adult unicorns. His bold and curious ways help him to explore the magical world of BAYALA®. Nevertheless, he is always well protected by his parents, the beautiful star Pegasus mare and the proud moon unicorn stallion. You can clearly see the small foal’s special pedigree just by looking at him. His appearance makes it look as if he just landed as a shooting star from the night sky in the magical BAYALA® world. And who knows, maybe that’s what happened...

name: Quarter Horse Mare
description: This Schleich Quarter Horse Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Quarter Horse, the most popular breed in the United States, showcasing the compact, muscular build ideal for sprinting and ranch work.

name: Quarter Horse Stallion
description: This Schleich Quarter Horse Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Quarter Horse, the most popular breed in the United States, showcasing the compact, muscular build ideal for sprinting and ranch work.

name: Quarter Horse Foal
description: This Schleich Quarter Horse Foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the American Quarter Horse, the most popular breed in the United States, showcasing the compact, muscular build ideal for sprinting and ranch work. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.

name: English thoroughbred mare
description: This Schleich English thoroughbred mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Thoroughbred, the fastest breed on the racecourse, depicting the sleek, athletic build and competitive spirit of this legendary racing horse.
marketingDescription: All English Thoroughbreds can be traced back to three Arab stallions born between 1680 and 1724. Other breeds are often crossed with English Thoroughbreds to make them more elegant. English Thoroughbreds were particularly influential on the development of warmbloods such as Trakehners, Holsteiners, Quarter horses and Morgan horses.

name: English Thoroughbred Stallion
description: This Schleich English Thoroughbred Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Thoroughbred, the fastest breed on the racecourse, depicting the sleek, athletic build and competitive spirit of this legendary racing horse.

name: English Thoroughbred Foal
description: This Schleich English Thoroughbred Foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the Thoroughbred, the fastest breed on the racecourse, depicting the sleek, athletic build and competitive spirit of this legendary racing horse. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.

name: Holsteiner mare
description: This Schleich Holsteiner mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Holsteiner warmblood from northern Germany, showcasing the powerful, athletic build that produces top-level show jumping competitors.
marketingDescription: Holsteiners have powerful hindquarters that allow them to jump very high. They often win medals at the Olympic Games and other major equestrian events. While the average leisure horse is around 155 cm tall, Holsteiners are significantly bigger: usually 165-175 cm.

name: Holsteiner gelding
description: This Schleich Holsteiner gelding figure is a hand-painted replica of the Holsteiner warmblood from northern Germany, showcasing the powerful, athletic build that produces top-level show jumping competitors.
marketingDescription: Holsteiners are very popular sport horses and are one of the oldest German breeds. The monks at Uetersen Monastery, located in what is now Schleswig-Holstein in northern Germany, started breeding them in the 14th century. However, the first recorded mentions of Holsteiners are much older, dating back to the year 1225.

name: Holsteiner foal
description: This Schleich Holsteiner foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the Holsteiner warmblood from northern Germany, showcasing the powerful, athletic build that produces top-level show jumping competitors. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.
marketingDescription: Holsteiners are very talented jumpers. Just a few days after birth, the foals will jump joyfully and energetically over small obstacles. However, jumping training only begins in earnest at the age of two to three. By the age of five to six, the horses' muscles are sufficiently developed for them to carry a rider while jumping too.

name: Appaloosa mare
description: This Schleich Appaloosa mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Appaloosa breed, featuring the distinctive spotted coat pattern that makes each individual unique, originally bred by the Nez Perce people.
marketingDescription: Appaloosas' unique coat patterns will melt the heart of any horse fan. The beautiful spots and flecks have given rise to fantastical names such as leopard and snowflake. Appaloosas are often trained as western horses because they are reliable, fast and agile with strong nerves.

name: Appaloosa Foal
description: This Schleich Appaloosa Foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the Appaloosa breed, featuring the distinctive spotted coat pattern that makes each individual unique, originally bred by the Nez Perce people. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.

name: Connemara Pony Mare
description: This Schleich Connemara Pony Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the pony breed, capturing the compact build, intelligence, and sure-footedness that make ponies beloved riding partners.

name: Morgan Horse Stallion
description: This Schleich Morgan Horse Stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Morgan breed, one of the earliest American horses, depicting the compact, refined build and willing character of this versatile breed.

name: Morgan Horse Mare
description: This Schleich Morgan Horse Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Morgan breed, one of the earliest American horses, depicting the compact, refined build and willing character of this versatile breed.

name: Welsh pony stallion
description: This Schleich Welsh pony stallion figure is a hand-painted replica of the Welsh Pony, known for hardiness and gentle temperament, depicting the refined build that makes Welsh breeds popular worldwide.
marketingDescription: Welsh ponies are among the most popular riding ponies in Europe. They are spirited but very good-natured and friendly. Welsh ponies can be small and dainty or big and stocky. For this reason, they are subdivided into several different breeds, such as Welsh mountain ponies and Welsh cobs.

name: Welsh Pony Mare
description: This Schleich Welsh Pony Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the Welsh Pony, known for hardiness and gentle temperament, depicting the refined build that makes Welsh breeds popular worldwide.

name: Dartmoor Pony Mare
description: This Schleich Dartmoor Pony Mare figure is a hand-painted replica of the pony breed, capturing the compact build, intelligence, and sure-footedness that make ponies beloved riding partners.

name: Velociraptor
description: This Schleich Velociraptor figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Velociraptor, featuring the distinctive sickle-shaped claw and alert posture of this intelligent feathered predator. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: Velociraptors were likely very intelligent dinosaurs that hunted in packs. Although they were only 60 cm in height, these carnivores were able to overpower significantly larger prey. These dinosaurs reached speeds of up to 65 kilometres an hour and were capable of quick turns thanks to their stiff tails. To consume their prey, Velociraptors had at their disposal eighty sharp, crooked teeth in their flat snout, some of which 2.5 cm in length. The velociraptor is considered to have been one of the most intelligent and fastest dinosaurs. A formidable hunter.

name: Carnotaurus
description: This Schleich Carnotaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Carnotaurus, featuring the pair of bull-like horns above the eyes of this swift "meat-eating bull". A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Carnotaurus is a meat-eating predator from the Late Cretaceous. It lived about 70 million years ago. The only skeleton ever found of it was dug up in Argentina. The Carnotaurus was 9 metres in length and estimated to weigh 1.5 to 2 tonnes. Its snout was more rounded than that of its relatives and its teeth looked like crooked knife blades. It was undoubtedly one of the most dangerous predators of its time.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
description: This Schleich Tyrannosaurus Rex figure is a meticulously detailed replica of the fearsome T. rex, capturing the powerful jaws and menacing stance of one of the largest land predators that ever lived. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Tyrannosaurus rex looked very menacing, but was hardly capable of using it short front legs equipped with two claws, as they could not even reach its mouth. At nearly seven metres in height and thirteen metres long, the Tyrannosaurus rex was probably not a particularly good hunter, but rather a scavenger that fed on what other animals left behind. It had over fifty teeth, measuring over 15 cm in length, but it didn't use them to chew, but to tear, swallowing its food in large pieces. In order to better perceive depths while hunting for food, the eyes of the Tyrannosaurus rex were pointed forwards, allowing the field of vision of its eyes to overlap.

name: Polar Bear
description: This Schleich Polar Bear figure captures the powerful build and impressive stature of this formidable mammal. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.
marketingDescription: The polar bear's habitat is the Arctic. In winter, the temperature there can drop to -50° Celsius. Although its fur coat appears white, its hair is transparent and hollow on the inside. The air inside these hairs is warmed by the sun, so that polar bears do not freeze even at icy temperatures.

name: Seal
description: This Schleich Seal figure captures this seal, with its sleek body and expressive face perfectly adapted for life in cold waters. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Besides walruses and sea lions, the various types of seals include, of course, common seals. They don't spend much time on land, and usually swim in the icy waters of the North Atlantic and the Arctic Ocean. While hunting for fish and shellfish, common seals dive 200 m deep and can hold their breath for up to 30 minutes.

name: Seal Cub
description: This Schleich Seal Cub figure depicts a young this seal, with its sleek body and expressive face perfectly adapted for life in cold waters. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.

name: Walrus
description: This Schleich Walrus figure captures the Walrus, with its impressive tusks, whiskered face, and massive build as an icon of the Arctic. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.

name: Arctic Wolf Cub
description: This Schleich Arctic Wolf Cub figure captures the powerful build, thick fur, and intense gaze of this iconic pack predator. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring. This young figure captures the curious nature of a juvenile.

name: Arctic Fox
description: This Schleich Arctic Fox figure captures the bushy tail, pointed ears, and clever expression of one of nature's most resourceful predators. Hand-painted with realistic fur texture and colouring.

name: Blue whale
description: This Schleich Blue whale figure captures the Blue Whale, the largest animal ever to exist, with its immense proportions scaled to lifelike detail. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The blue whale is the largest mammal on the planet. Its tongue alone weighs as much as an elephant, and when it opens its mouth, up to 90 tonnes of water can fit into it. It also has the biggest heart in the world, weighing 180 kg and making it about as large and heavy as a gorilla.

name: Killer Whale
description: This Schleich Killer Whale figure captures this whale species, capturing the graceful proportions and gentle nature of these ocean giants. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The orca is a large, toothed whale that belongs to the dolphin family. Its black and white colouring makes its unmistakable. Animals swimming under it don't recognise it, because the surface of the water is just as bright as its belly. And from above, you can hardly tell its apart from the sea floor thanks to its black back.

name: Dolphin
description: This Schleich Dolphin figure captures this dolphin, showcasing the sleek, streamlined body and intelligent expression of one of the ocean's most beloved creatures. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Dolphins are quick, agile swimmers, often jumping impressively over the water surface. Underwater, they produce high-pitched whistling and clicking sounds to create echoes. That's how they orient themselves and track down prey. Dolphins are very social and often seek physical contact with their families.

name: Great white shark
description: This Schleich Great white shark figure captures the Great White Shark, the ocean's most famous predator, with its powerful build and rows of serrated teeth. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The great white shark is the largest predatory fish on the planet. The way its teeth work is somewhat reminiscent of a revolver and they consist of several rows. When one of its sharp, triangular teeth breaks out of the front row, it is quickly replaced by another from the row behind it. New replacement teeth are constantly growing.

name: Zebra female
description: This Schleich Zebra female figure captures the bold black-and-white stripes — each pattern unique like a fingerprint. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Zebras live in the African savannah and belong to the horse family. Each zebra has a unique fur coat pattern consisting of black and white stripes. Even its mane is striped. The pattern provides camouflage, confuses predators, protects against mosquitoes, makes the heat more bearable, and helps the animals to recognise each other.

name: Zebra Foal
description: This Schleich Zebra Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: Zebra foals can run with the herd just 20 minutes after birth. In the first days, however, the mare stays very close to her foal, so that it can acquaint itself with her scent, appearance, and voice. Zebra foals don't just have a mane on their neck. Its continues along their entire back, up to their tail.

name: Lion
description: This Schleich Lion figure captures the powerful build and commanding presence of the "King of the Jungle". Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: In order to become the leader of the pack, lions must win a duel. The larger their mane, the more respect they are shown by their rival. But not only does it look breath-taking - it also protects the animals from serious injuries on their heads and necks.

name: Lion cub
description: This Schleich Lion cub figure captures the powerful build and commanding presence of the "King of the Jungle". Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy. This young figure captures the endearing proportions of a juvenile.
marketingDescription: After birth, lion babies have a sand-coloured fur coat with dark, circular spots. They are well camouflaged in the savannah. Within the first four to six weeks, they remain in a den. At the age of three months, they are strong enough to follow their mother wherever she goes.

name: Hippopotamus
description: This Schleich Hippopotamus figure captures the massive barrel-shaped body and wide-opening jaws of the third-largest land mammal. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Although hippopotamuses cannot swim particularly well, they spend nearly all day in the water. They cannot simply drift along, because they're just too heavy. If they wish to cross a river, they allow themselves to sink to the bottom and walk along the river bed to the other shore.

name: Koala
description: This Schleich Koala figure captures the fluffy ears, button nose, and tree-clinging posture of Australia's most beloved marsupial. Hand-painted with lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Koalas are quite the sleepy heads. They spend about 14 hours each day taking extensive naps. The rest of the time, they are busy eating eucalyptus leaves. They consume about a kilogram of them every day. They are very picky and will only go for 12 of the about 300 eucalyptus species.

name: Indian rhinoceros
description: This Schleich Indian rhinoceros figure captures the armoured hide, powerful build, and distinctive horn of this prehistoric-looking herbivore. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: The Indian rhinoceros lives in Northeast India. Its thick folds of skin make it unmistakable, as though it were wearing thick armour. Contrary to its African relatives, however, it is very calm and peaceful. It spends most of its time eating grass, twigs, leaves, branches, and fruits.

name: Chimpanzee Male
description: This Schleich Chimpanzee Male figure captures the expressive face and intelligent posture of our closest living relative. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.
marketingDescription: Chimpanzees are true masters when it comes to solving puzzles and using tools. They build spoon-like rods to scoop out honey or crack open nuts using stones. To prevent hurting their fingers, they knuckle-walk. In doing so, they place only the middle phalanxes of their hands on the ground.

name: Triceratops
description: This Schleich Triceratops figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Triceratops, showcasing its three facial horns and large bony frill that made it one of the most recognisable dinosaurs. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Triceratops was one of the last large dinosaurs. Despite being an herbivore, it had a total of up to 800 teeth, which constantly grew back. Nonetheless, it was incapable of chewing food, as its jaw could not move from side to side. It used its teeth to cut up palm leaves and ferns.

name: Oviraptor Dinosaur
description: This Schleich Oviraptor Dinosaur figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Dinogorgon
description: This Schleich Dinogorgon figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Therizinosaurus
description: This Schleich Therizinosaurus figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Therizinosaurus, featuring the longest claws of any known animal — up to one metre each. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: Of all animals that ever lived on earth, the Therizinosaurus probably had the longest claws. It used them to dig, grasp, pierce, and peel off bark. It lived towards the end of the dinosaur age, together with other herbivores such as the Kentrosaurus and Pentaceratops.

name: Psittacosaurus
description: This Schleich Psittacosaurus figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Tawa
description: This Schleich Tawa figure is a beautifully crafted fantasy creature, hand-painted with imaginative detail for creative play and collection.

name: Therizinosaurus Juvenile
description: This Schleich Therizinosaurus Juvenile figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Therizinosaurus, featuring the longest claws of any known animal — up to one metre each. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex Juvenile
description: This Schleich Tyrannosaurus Rex Juvenile figure is a meticulously detailed replica of the fearsome T. rex, capturing the powerful jaws and menacing stance of one of the largest land predators that ever lived. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.

name: Pteranodon
description: This Schleich Pteranodon figure is a meticulously detailed replica of Pteranodon, showcasing the impressive wingspan and toothless beak of this iconic flying reptile. A collectible piece in the Schleich prehistoric range.
marketingDescription: The Pteranodon was one of the largest pterosaurs in the Cretaceous period. The striking bony crest on the rear of its head provided a counterweight to its long beak. It probably didn't flap its wings very often, but instead took advantage of the wind to glide through the air - similar to an albatross.

name: Dolphin Mum with Babies
description: This Schleich Dolphin Mum with Babies figure captures this dolphin, showcasing the sleek, streamlined body and intelligent expression of one of the ocean's most beloved creatures. Hand-painted with lifelike accuracy.

name: Dartmoor Pony Mare and Foal
description: This Schleich Dartmoor Pony Mare and Foal figure is a hand-painted replica of the pony breed, capturing the compact build, intelligence, and sure-footedness that make ponies beloved riding partners. As a foal, it captures the long-legged charm and playful energy of a young horse.

name: Kraken Monster
description: This Schleich Kraken Monster figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Snow wolf
description: This Schleich Snow wolf figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: Anyone who enters the ice world had better take care – the snow wolf will definitely be lying in wait somewhere! With his white fur, he can move almost unseen in the snow and then, at the right moment, ambush opponents! Not even the smallest movement gets past his eagle eyes and, with his fine sense of smell, he can pick up even the faintest trail. He is a loner and also very tenacious, which is why he doesn't have a problem overpowering his opponents on his own. But when he needs help, he can call up the ice dragon with his wolf howl. The icy duo's opponents are then not only trembling from the cold. The snow wolf does not like the lava world (too hot) or the water world. If he is not thirsty, for him water should be frozen.

name: Monster Fish
description: This Schleich Monster Fish figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Lava dragon
description: This Schleich Lava dragon figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: The lava dragon is the ruler of the skies above the lava world - anyone who intrudes upon his space has to deal with him! To defend himself, during a battle he thrashes his spiked tail against his enemies. And that really hurts! Fast-paced pursuits in the sky are no problem for him: his large, strong wings make him an agile hunter with the speed of an arrow! With his ultra-hot fiery breath, he can even melt stones - something which often makes the stone monster see red! The closer he is to the lava source in the temple, the stronger he is. It is also so nice and warm there!

name: Ice dragon
description: This Schleich Ice dragon figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Sea Monster
description: This Schleich Sea Monster figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.

name: Stone monster
description: This Schleich Stone monster figure is a detailed, hand-painted replica of a prehistoric creature, carefully sculpted to reflect palaeontological understanding with realistic proportions and lifelike detail.
marketingDescription: You can often hear the fierce colossus from afar - when he moves, all of ELDRADOR® shakes! Because the stone monster is so gigantic and heavy, he can only move slowly. He is also not particularly bright - but for that extremely strong! He can rotate his upper body around its axis, meaning he can cause a lot of harm and damage with his mighty stone fists. He gains his strength from the large crystal which he also uses as a dangerous weapon. He gets stronger and stronger each day because he eats more and more crystals from the stone world. He has now polished off so many that they are even growing out of his back! His greatest enemy is himself. He is actually practically invincible. But if he falls over, it takes ages for him to get up again because of his weight...

name: Unicorn Standing
description: This Schleich Unicorn Standing figure is a beautifully crafted magical creature featuring a spiralling horn and ethereal coat. Hand-painted with exquisite detail from the bayala® fantasy realm.

name: Sea unicorn, mare
description: This Schleich Sea unicorn, mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: In the expansive underwater world of Meamare, a unicorn family lives in a shell clearing nestled in the sea forests. Only those who are very lucky and patient get to encounter the unicorn parents and their little ones. And once you've seen them, you will never forget them – the three magical creatures are so beautiful and mysterious. A mermaid has even managed to become friends with them. She visits them regularly, pets them, and even speaks with them. Just look what a fantastic pattern they have on their fur coat and how their tails and manes glisten. Which sea unicorn is your favourite?

name: Sea Unicorn Stallion
description: This Schleich Sea Unicorn Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.
marketingDescription: The schleich® figures are modelled with attention to detail, hand-painted with care, and provide educationally valuable playtime. In the expansive underwater world of Meamare, a unicorn family lives in a shell clearing nestled in the sea forests. Only those who are very lucky and patient get to encounter the unicorn parents and their little ones. And once you've seen them, you will never forget them – the three magical creatures are so beautiful and mysterious. A mermaid has even managed to become friends with them. She visits them regularly, pets them, and even speaks with them. Just look what a fantastic pattern they have on their fur coat and how their tails and manes glisten. Which sea unicorn is your favourite?

name: Sea unicorn, foal
description: This Schleich Sea unicorn, foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: In the expansive underwater world of Meamare, a unicorn family lives in a shell clearing nestled in the sea forests. Only those who are very lucky and patient get to encounter the unicorn parents and their little ones. And once you've seen them, you will never forget them – the three magical creatures are so beautiful and mysterious. A mermaid has even managed to become friends with them. She visits them regularly, pets them, and even speaks with them. Just look what a fantastic pattern they have on their fur coat and how their tails and manes glisten. Which sea unicorn is your favourite?

name: Decorated Unicorn Mare
description: This Schleich Decorated Unicorn Mare figure portrays a mare with graceful proportions and a calm, confident stance. Hand-painted to highlight the musculature and coat details, this figure reflects the quiet strength of a female horse.
marketingDescription: Explore the magical world of BAYALA® with this Decorated Unicorn Mare, a fun, educational toy figurine from schleich®! This toy is detailed and handheld, and is ideal for hours of imaginative play.The Decorated Unicorn Mare is part of BAYALA® - a fantasy world made up of fairies, unicorns, and mermaids. All the fairies and unicorns live in the Sun Kingdom called Soleyas, while the Mermaids and their magical animal companions live in the Water Kingdom called Meamare. All the inhabitants are looking forward to the engagement of crown princess Isabelle and Ayron of Meamare. Come join the adventure! Ideal for children aged 5-12.schleich® is a German toy company, and we bring realism to a new level. Our high quality, immersive playworlds open up a world of imaginative possibilities to toddlers and kids through safe and educational play. All schleich® products are carefully designed to inspire healthy and creative pretend play for children as both a single toy or part of a larger collection. All products and the materials used meet or exceed the strictest applicable national and international toy safety requirements. We are the world's leading figurine company, and currently offer six different themed worlds and over 300 products designed to teach and inspire kids as they move through developmental stages. From the realistic worlds of FARM WORLD, WILD LIFE and HORSE CLUB to the mystical realms of BAYALA® and ELDRADOR® CREATURES, we put The World in Your Hands.

name: Decorated Pegasus Stallion
description: This Schleich Decorated Pegasus Stallion figure depicts a stallion in a powerful, commanding pose. Hand-painted with fine detail to capture the muscular build and spirited character of a male horse.

name: Decorated Unicorn Pegasus Foal
description: This Schleich Decorated Unicorn Pegasus Foal figure depicts a young foal with characteristic long legs and curious posture. Hand-painted with careful attention to detail, the figure captures the playful energy that makes foals so appealing.
marketingDescription: Explore the magical world of BAYALA® with this Decorated Unicorn Pegasus Foal, a fun, educational toy figurine from schleich®! This toy is detailed and handheld, and is ideal for hours of imaginative play.The Decorated Unicorn Pegasus Foal is part of BAYALA® - a fantasy world made up of fairies, unicorns, and mermaids.
